In all of the other orders, I ordered several sides of yams and cheese grits and many of them were missing....and they are not cheap. They left out my Kool-aid as well. One time I ordered peach cobbler and there was not 1 slice of peach on in. It was just bread and the glaze/sauce. Our last order alone, $22 of food was missing from the order. We often receive the wrong pieces of
chicken, or white meat when we asked for dark meat. 
On a positive, I love their cheese grits and yams and biscuits and cornbread, and they are very nice. Unfortunately, I can't eat the chicken. I don't know what kind of oils or whatever it is that they use to cook the chicken with, but I can't eat it due to severe acid-reflux and indigestion when I eat the chicken. I don't get that from any other fried chicken, just theirs. My mom loves their chicken though. Lastly, they are not providing butter, the grape butter, or any other condiments despite my requesting it. I don't know if this is due to short staff due to the pandemic, but it's still very frustrating.
Excellent food! If you are in this part of Sac, this place is a must go! Delicious! Maybe a bit princely but it is worth it, I promise!

Man the chicken is so delicious here!!! Crispy, juicy tender chicken and so savory. Delicious! We ordered the chicken and waffles. Waffles were very good as well. Although they were slightly thin, it was crispy and made with quality ingredients. Tasted like cinnamon esp with the special butter. Fried green tomatoes were very good as well

Closed because of Covid but ordered the fried chicken to go. I can't really review it because they were closed, but the food was great and the people working there were sweet and fun. I can't wait until I can really try out this restaurant, I think it will be great. I know the chicken was!

I was sitting at the bar. Went to use the restroom, came back and someone took my seat! Yes! That busy! The girl in the front found me a chair and seated me at the end of the bar instead. Thank You Sweetheart!! I ordered 2 wings and a waffle. I waited over 30 minutes for my meal!! I'm giving 4 stars because it was delicious food and great service but the wait was rediculous! Thank You Ol Skool for the great service!!
Omg their food is top notch I had the smoother chicken it was very tasteful , everything was prefect customer service was top notch .

Gone her for the first time during Covid and had to go back again 2 weeks later.  They have traditional souls food that will satisfy everyone.  The fried chicken was good, although think that may be hard to mess up which had good seasoning and crisp but not too crispy.  Collard greens well cooked and seasoned just right.  Cornbread was tasty and the macaroni was one of the best I have had.  My mother in law makes Mac and cheese which I request every holiday but sad to say that this was better than hers.... shhhh don't tell her.  My husband was afraid to say it but he definitely agrees.  We went back just to confirm that this place was just as good as the first time and it was.  I actually went here because it was part of the Yelp Scavenger hunt.  So cool it forced me to go somewhere I may not have visited otherwise.  Oh and cannot forget the banana pudding which we ordered at both visits.  OMG, oh ma goodness this place is slap yo momma good!!!

My husband and I went during a Friday around 2:00, and were seated right away. The server was welcoming and greeted us promptly. We started off with the catfish nuggets, which were so light and seasoned to perfection. Probably the best catfish nuggets I've ever had. I had the chicken and waffles with a side of greens and all were good. My husband had the smothered chicken with Mac N Cheese, and Cheese grits and the Mac N Cheese was screamin!! We cannot wait to go back and try a few other entrees. I'd say the only thing I did not care for was the kool-aid, wayyyyyy too sweet.

Be prepared to wait, for a long while. Do not come hungry, my suggestion is to come put your name in then run some errands or eat before you come. Is packed so I assume the food is really good but o have no clue since we are still waiting outside for a table. It's been over an hour, been seeing people pick up food, and others willing to wait so we'll see....  Also have them read back to you your phone number, apparently the staffer wrote our number down incorrectly and says they attempted to call us tho we had been sitting right outside. Once we got in and were able to order, there were a couple items on the menu they were out of which was a bummer. The food we did order was really good. We had mixed reviews actually and we all loved the greens. Cornbread was OK and I really love the mac & cheese. However, the rest of my family did not like their mac & cheese. I had a chicken breast which I enjoyed but my husband did not enjoy his food which was the fried fish and wings. My daughter also felt the food was a bit bland. We've gone a couple times since then, and it was very inconsistent in terms of the quality. Such a shame because it's really hard to find really good soul food that is consistent but I feel like this place is so far one of the best I found recently.

Came here for the soft opening on Saturday at 6 pm, we were celebrating my uncle's birthday. The ambiance of the restaurant is very nice... Lots of pictures and decorations.

We had a large party of 12 I believe

So excited to discover this new southern food stop! Fried chicken is moist and crispy! They serve grape butter! So delicious I had to take some home! They have a full bar. Fun atmosphere! Outside seating too! Friendly staff and we met former Mayor and basketball player, Kevin Johnson!

Phenomenal. Having quick and easy access to soul food this great in Sacramento is such a win. Too good to not check out, at least once. Hot chicken sandwich, fries, Mac & Cheese, Chicken & Waffles - all amazing. I'm definitely gonna keep going back.

Food was wonderful. I ordered the chicken with collard greens yams and Mac n cheese . The biscuits and grape butter was tasty . The drinks are good too, had a margarita. The fried green tomatoes were delicious. My boo had the cat fish only, complaint corn fitters were dry. The restaurant had a good vibe very welcoming. Thank you.

Our family went on a Friday at 6:30 and were able to get right in!  We had the catfish bites as an appetizer and they were delicious, loved the dipping sauces. My wife and I both had the 2 piece fried chicken with potato salad and coleslaw. Chicken was so light and crispy, delicious!  the coleslaw was tasty and surprise red peppers added to give it an interesting tang. Potato salad was a mustard style and right up our taste alley. My daughter ordered the Gumbo and was very pleased with her choice. Our waitress was very attentive and kind. really enjoyed the ambience and design of restaurant. My wife loved the Lavender lemon drop. Really the only downside was the parking in non existent.   We had to park blocks away.
Great food. Love the bar tenders and waitresses/waiters! Highly recommend the catfish bites!!

The fried chicken and waffles are amazing and so is the salad with homemade dressing. The restaurant is clean and lively, and the staff are very friendly and helpful. The desserts are an added bonus. I tried the banana cream pudding which was heavenly!
Incredible food and vibe from the staff. Highly recommend. Chicken n waffles and sweet tea were amazing.
Really, really good food and service. C&W is the best. Nice location. Great bloody Mary's.

For my family and I hands down the best mac n cheese and collard greens. The chicken is delicious and never overly greasy. The catfish nuggets were the bomb. Will definitely come back and try it as a main course. The chicken sandwich was huge but also really yummy. I personally found the kool-aid pickles addictive. I always had heard of them and never before tried before fixins. The rest of the fam weren't a fan so I'm thinking it's an acquired taste. And the biscuits were good too. We have plenty more we need to try. Service was also excellent even being so busy.

The food was good but the customer service was phenomenal! We had a server named Jenna and she was very polite and attentive. The manager Brittany was equally great and accommodating. The atmosphere was definitely a vibe and the kool aid was the icing on the cake. My friend had the chicken and waffles, and i had oxtails Mac n cheese and fried deviled eggs. I will say that as much as I love deviled eggs I don't like the fried texture, but to each his own. The bar is really nice touch and the menu is something that I will have to come back to unpack some more! Overall it's a great new place
As a southern in north California it was hard to find a good soul food restaurant. This one was on point and had actual sweet tea. Definitely on point and true soul food!

Great food I had ox tails & greens, my wife had chicken & waffle.  The wait was a little extra long but it was Sat & a popular time for dinner.  Food came out quick, hot, well seasoned.  Waitress was nice & accommodating.  I will definitely be going back.

We ordered for the first and last
time. Oxtails were not tender, smothered chicken was awful, greens had to many stems and to spicy, canines yams were good, still looking for the Banana in the so called banana pudding,
Peach Cobbler was missing crust (little pcs. of raw dough). All in all $60.00 was a waste. P.S., ice cream was good.

I've come here at least 10 times in the past year & every time has been 5 stars! After all of those times... I finally decided to sit down to write this review. EVERYTHING on the menu is good! No lie. The food, the drinks, the desserts... everything! We have now decided that every time we come to Sacramento from the Bay... we have to stop by Fixins before we leave!

To make this short, Fixins is a vibe!! The food is beyond amazing. Our sever Damiano was fabulous and prompt, even on such a busy night. I got the smothered chicken(fire), greens(bomb), and yams(left me speechless). My better half ordered the ox tails, mac&cheese, and potato salad. And from the bites I stole everything was amazing!! 

The drinks were amazing !! 
Can't wait to back!!

Everything about Fixins has soul. The food, the kitchen, the staff, and the customers. Stepping into fixins is the best thing I ever did! Everything I ate I would rate a 10! If you want real southern soul cooking look no further. This is hands down some of the best fried chicken I have ever had. I will fly back again just to eat here! The only plate I don't have a picture of is the Wings. They were so good and devoured so fast!

Let's begin with the outside. It has a cool waiting area and it was a happening spot on a Sunday evening. The only downside was that we checked in, we waited for our text message to be seated, but when we walked in, someone took our spot. They called my name and someone else, who just walked in from the street while we waited 30 minutes, took my spot. So, we had to wait for another table. The hostess was very apologetic and seated us 5 minutes later. The fried chicken was amazing. My child loved the pancakes. My husband was very fond of the fried chicken as well. The environment is hip and lively. I will definitely visit here again, all the way from Rocklin, CA.

Food was great! Service was awful. 4 stars because I hope next time we won't get the same waitress. Don't blame the food, just the messenger. 
Everyone loved the chicken sandwiches. I got the catfish, the crust was insane! The tartar sauce was good and I had okra and greens for sides and those were great. The greens needed a lot of hot sauce.
I was in Sacramento visiting family we ordered meals for pickup to feed 6 people. Everything was amazing and I can't wait to go back Sac for my Fixins soul food.

I love supporting my black owned business but not if they are poorly ran. The first thing about this place is why wait over an hour for just basic southern food . Makes no sense. 2 if your going to make people wait for over an hour please make sure the food is amazing. I have been here twice and both experiences were bad. The gumbo is not gumbo it's soup ! The Oxtails hmmm maybe you should hire someone who truly knows how to cook them proper! The fried chicken your better off going to Popeyes or just passing it all together. Oh and another thing if the business closes at 9 why continue to seat people at 8 and then bring the last crumbs of the food or just not fresh tasting. I will say this the customer service was amazing so kudos to that.

10/10 food and service is great! I've had soul food before but nothing like grandma's! Definitely hits home. The ox tails, shrimp and grits, artichoke dip, fried green tomatoes and waffles were great! Fried chicken was mid but with the hot sauce, wow, elevated! Thanks Desiree-eeeeee for serving us! If you like spicy like me, bring some peppers lol hope you guys enjoy!

We heard good reviews and bad reviews. So we were torn. But we were optimistic and decided to try this place ourselves. We arrived at 11am, restaurant was not busy, and we were seated promptly- no line and no waiting- perfect. However, our wait staff did not arrive at our table for at least 10-12 minutes- not even an acknowledgement from any wait staff.  The tables in front of us, behind us, and off to the side were greeted and served. WTH? Finally, we flagged down a wait staff and he notified the wait staff for our table.  Funny, the same wait staff that finally waited on us also served and chatted with the table behind us but advised us that she was on break-really? D grade for initial greeting and lying.  But she was friendly after that point. but enough on the service - on to the food. 

We heard that the portions were small and not worth the money. However, I must say those reviews were wrong. We ordered the oxtail entree : huge, flavorful, and looked impressive when served. The fried chicken and waffles and three piece entree were delicious and the pieces of fried chicken were not small and waffle was crispy. The butter that came with the waffle was also delicious. We compared their fried chicken to the version served at South- we had a difficult time deciding but finally believe Fixin's fried chicken was better in terms of value, non greasy, and nice flavor-just a slight nudge above South - yup. Their pancakes tasted homemade and the hot link was meaty, nice flavor, just the right spice, and not greasy. The collard greens were just a little too salty, the biscuit was flaky and had a full butter flavor without adding more butter, red beans and rice had a nice flavor but also a little too salty. but overall- not bad. The red velvet cake was huge! and the peach cobbler looked good- our friends took those home so we can't vouch on the taste. 

overall- we are happy we tried this place.  Would have given a higher rating but the initial service was poor - but the food made the score from a 3 to a 4 star rating - would have been a 5 if the initial service was better and sides less salty.
Great meal and service. Will definitely be back! We liked the vibe. Very laid back and relaxing after a long day.

Good food. I had fried catfish, greens, fritters and green beans. Excellent service and very generous quantities of food. 

Iced tea is served in a mason jar sans handle. The staff checked on me frequently. Beautiful restaurant and great old style R&B playing in the background. The music was at a level where you could also talk. 

I will return.

Food was great and the price wasn't bad. The fired deviled eggs were oh so good. I ate all of the fried chicken off the bone. Oxtails, yams, grilled cheese, Mac n cheese, catfish and fries were a 10 out of 10. Try the food you won't be disappointed!
Food taste old like it's been sitting there for awhile. Best thing there is their butter
Good food great atmosphere very polite staff seat u pretty fast enjoy all the sides and great drinks
My partner and I stopped in for brunch and couldn't have been happier to have found this place. Amazing food and staff!

Ok, we love Fixin's. Been there at least a dozen times over the last year. Ate most of them in our truck. I would never order food from here to be delivered. It has to be popping hit. We always ordered our food at the restaurant and took it around the corner to eat. Absolutely no complaints. The last time we ate there, my daughter and our grandkids (24 and 16) came for the first time. Catfish nuggets, fried deviled eggs, chicken and waffles, a chicken sandwich, two orders of chicken and sides and my usual--shrimp and grits. We ate like the polite people we are. No talking with your mouth full. It was very quiet at our table. Or server was incredible and so was Aunt Pearl, who we found out is Mr. Johnson's Aunt. Every single mouthful was delightful. For dessert we had two orders of banana pudding and one order of peach cobbler. Couldn't ask for a better meal to share with our family. To be honest, we've never eaten dinner there. We don't like going out for dinner because most places are too crowded. If you want to have an incredible dining experience, try Fixin's for a late lunch or early dinner. You won't be disappointed. Oh, and by the way, disregard these one and two star reviews. Those people don't know what they're talking about.

Don't know what happened with this order but it was jacked up. I ordered through door dash and reviewed my order of 2 piece fried chicken, oxtails, 2 sides of greens, 1 side of mac n cheese, 1 order of peach cobbler. I got the fried chicken, ox tails with some weird sauce on them, the 2 greens, NO mac n cheese - instead red beans n rice, and extra yams. The chicken was over fried and not very tasty. The oxtails were not good. The greens were good. Red beans n rice - not so much.  
Very expensive for the quantity and quality. Disappointed to say the least.
Took my entire family on Memorial Day....the best decision we could have made! We drove an hour, only waited a few minutes and the food, was OMG-Good!
One of the best restaurants in Sac. Their fried chicken is amazing, and you gotta try the Kool-Aid.

Impressed. Sunday around 10am is when we arrived a s a walk in party of two. The wait was quoted 10 but only took about 5 mins. When we left the wait looked a While lot longer, we got there just in time. The service was great the atmosphere was open, bright and clean. Solid place for families to dine or if you just wanna hit the bar for a drink and some food with a friend. I'll def be back likely when I'm able to try the drink menu. The food was very fresh and flavorful. We ordered chicken and waffles, side of bacon and the biscuits and gravy. No regrets. All delicious and we will definitely be back!
Absolutely fantastic! I am a southern girl and crave soul food. They did not disappoint with the food and service.  The biscuits, fried chicken and collard greens were amazing!
Good food. Long wait after we were sat. Took about 1 hour  to get our food after it was ordered.
BEST SOUL FOOD in town! Hands down! I can't say anything bad about this place. They are Four diamonds!
Best Soul Food I have had in NORCAL.   I have tried almost every one in NORCAL.  This is my place of choice.
Omg! The chicken was sooo good! It took us a while to get seated but they had an awesome patio area where we can wait. The calorie intake are truly worth it! Lol!!!
This place is amazing! Super friendly staff and the most delicious food. You have to try the deep fried deviled eggs. Sooo good!

The food was great.  Our server Aimee was super pleasant and welcoming.   
We all got meals to go as well.  

Definitely recommend that everyone who loves good food visit this restaurant.  

We'll be back for sure.

The food was absolutely delicious and the staff is very professional, helpful and respectful. The cook need a raise, this was my second time eating here and this time, l can truly say the food was great. Catfish, greens, yams, potato salad, black eye peas, hush puppies, Mac & cheese and fried chicken, you can't go wrong. I brought a couple of friends and it was their first time eating at Fixin's. We all left there very full and happy.
What can I say .... delicious delicious delicious  The wait staff was friendly ... price point just right and facility clean and comfy.

I visited this restaurant last month I was visiting from out of town. The atmosphere from the outside was nice, didn't make it inside the hour-plus wait was too long, we ordered our food to go. Being from out of state I thought the $30 tab for one meal was a bit steep, but what do I know I just figured it was just California prices. The to-go wait wasn't too bad the food was ready in under 30 minutes. For the amount, I paid the amounts were very large. The food was decent, nothing to write home about. I would visit again just to eat inside the establishment to find out what the ambiance is like.

my cousin recommended this place to try for lunch and it did not disappoint! we ordered the two piece chicken combo with two sides and got the candied yams, coleslaw, & mac and cheese.

first, the portions are HUGE. the prices were a bit high but not bad considering how much food they give you. i barely finished half my plate before i got full. 

the food itself was great, and i especially loved the jam they give us with the bread. chicken was delicious and i loved the sides, with the exception of the yams.

service was nice & quick, will definitely come back some time in the future :)
Food and drinks was good. Service was super slow. Took forever to order our food and food to come out. Felt like we were forgotten by the staff. I don't think I will be coming back because of that.

I have been frequenting this establishment for the past few months, and I love it! They're food is delicious enough to remind me of my home town where I grew up eating this same food. In other words, they're food is surprisingly good enough to compare to the Midwest food I used to, and still do eat in Illinois, where I am from. The ambiance is amazing as well. I drive an a hour and 15 or more minutes to get food from here at least twice to three times a week.  Definitely a top notch restaurant. Many blessings to the staff. Sierra and another male staff member were very nice and helpful as well as made sure I got everything I ordered made fresh to order. Try this place once, you won't go anywhere else for soul food.
Great people, great food! New family place to eat. Gumbo is the best in Sac! Thank you Auntie for your hospitality!
Great food and service. I ordered the fried chicken with some great sides. Can't wait to go back.
Love it great service delicious food and the Kool aid is to die for love it love it love it
Some of the tastiest fried chicken in Sacramento!  Great for breakfast too.

Actually was my third time visiting the restaurant last week. At the time thought my food was amazing as usual really like the outdoor seating. But what I didn't notice and didn't know until after I posted a reel on Instagram abs tiktok was that my chicken wings still had feathers in it . Not sure how to feel about it but it more then one person says it's because the chicken isn't properly washed and with cleanliness being a major key not sure if I'll be going back.
Very friendly and such good food I go the constantly and so does my family we love it sooooo muc.
#hgrfood blessed incredible comfort food feel's like you are in New Orleans. Go tell your friend!

This is an amazing new restaurant in Oak Park in Sacramento. Everything we ate was very good. The Mac n cheese was authentic African American Mac n cheese and so good. Fried catfish was excellent! The restaurant and bathrooms are nice and clean. Definitely a must try!

I enjoyed everything!!! The service was great!!! Definitely will go back!!! I ordered smothered chicken, collard greens, mac n cheese n the cornbread~  Oh n tried fried green tomatoes....deeelissshhh!!! And cant forget the adult kool-aid!!!
Foooood was excellent!! Deep fried deviled eggs! Phenomenallllllll! Cat fish was great as well

Came in this morning with my mother and my son, always wanted to try this place for some time now! Hands down the best breakfast I've had in a long time! This place is a must try we first started out with two lemonades, and our server recommended I try the red koolaid it was made perfectly. We then shared the fried deviled eggs, my son had the wing and waffle, my mom had the two piece combo with waffle and I had the three piece, paired with corn bread and eggs! The butter we could not believe how good it was  the chicken was huge portions we are deff going to take this back home to go, we are super full! I highly recommend you try this gem

The food was absolutely wonderful! I had the smothered chicken with collard greens and charred okra. Talia delivered wonderful service, I recommend her for future customers! The overall aesthetic of the restaurant is casual and comfortable.

One of my favorite places to eat. The hot chicken sandwiche is amazing. All the food here is made with love and soul and it makes me smile to see Aunt Perle visiting everyone asking how their food is.

You're treated and loved like family. 

Which makes the food taste even better.

we've ordered take out before, and it was amazing, but nothing beats the experience of coming in and sitting down to eat in the restaurant. the food and drinks were absolutely fantastic, our waitress JC was the best, and the music and lighting set the perfect atmosphere! cant wait to come back!!!!
Every time I travel to Sacramento,  I must dine in or order from Fixins.  One of my favorite meals is their  Catfish Fillet Dinner with Mac & Cheese,  Candied Yams, and Biscuit with Compound Butter.

The food is outstanding and the service was even better.  Our server Chloe brought us hot food with a smile and she was very attentive, she knew the menu and could make recommendations.  She also made small talk with was nice to see in a super busy atmosphere. The catfish was well seasoned, the collared greens, yams, Mac & cheese was good also.  My mom picked this place because she saw it on the news, far exceeded my expectations. Kevin Johnson (ex mayor) is part owner and he was on site for a while.  Nice ambiance,nice music playing, friendly patrons, everybody was smiling.   Will definitely be back and have already started telling my friends.  Took hubby oxtails to go.

Found this gem of a place quite by happy accident the other night. My BFF and I both had the 2 piece fried chicken which was to die for crispy and delicious! You get your choice of 2 sides that would make my great grandma from Missouri proud. I chose the red beans and rice, Cole slaw and you get a fluffy and delicious biscuit on the side with a side of grape butter. The red beans and rice were creamy dreamy delicious with just the right amount of spicy kick. Getting those tiny Chunky nuggets of ham and sausage were amazing. 
The perfect foil to the spicy kick of my red beans and rice was the coleslaw. Just that hint of sweetness was enough to balance out the heat since I'm a sucker for my favorite Louisiana hot sauce for dipping my chicken into.  Our server was also fantastic, in fact, all the lovely people there were working hard and super nice. Definitely give this fabulous find a try! Oh, and come hungry because of you don't, you'll regret not having the room!

Was visiting from San Diego for the weekend and Im so happy I found this place thru yelp 10/10 plus more food and drinks so delicious I had the sac town mango lemonade and 2 piece chicken plate with sides everything was so flavorful and good omg! service amazing I loved the place vibes was excellent I would definitely be coming back when Im in town again!
So good! Chicken and waffles were perfect, our server gave wonderful service as well as the hosts. Will definitely be coming back!!

20-30 minute wait on Saturday. Worth the wait! I haven't tasted southern food like this since I visited the state of Georgia. Ever piece of food in the pictures were deliciously cooked. The chicken was perfectly crisp, juicy and flavorful. Mac & Cheese was cheesy, yummy and perfect. The special grape jelly butter was hella good on the biscuits. The customer service was soulful and reminded my husband of home (Atlanta, GA). Our server Nate was amazing!!!

This place was bomb! I had a fried chicken omelette, it came with grits and it was delicious! The wait was around 45min, but you can eat at the bar, so that may not be an issue for all. 
One thing I didn't particularly like was the window that separates the bar to the outside. I didn't care that you can see people outside. 
Lastly, they don't have a very wide selection of beer. I know that may not seem like a big deal, but It just seem odd. But the food was the best part and that's all it matters!

This is the best southern food I've had in the west. The fried green tomatoes in a spicy remoulade were amazing. I had the two piece dark meat chicken with collards and roasted okra. Chicken was crispy but could have used more seasoning. Collards and okra fantastic! Biscuit was tender and tasty with butter not the grape jelly spread that was weird. Spouse had the oxtails over rice and sweet potatoes. Tasty mas oxtails but runny sweet potatoes. Had the peach cobbler with ice cream, proper crust to peach ratio but very, very sweet. We had the special house whiskey and loved it. We would definitely come back!
Fixings is a must stop whenever I find myself in the Sacramento area.  It is reliably delicious and always exceeds my expectations.
I've ordered delivery from here so many times, the food is absolutely amazing but everytime I order they forget the drink.
My mom and I came here and sat at the bar. The bartender was a very nice guy. The food was really good. We dang near ordered one of everything on the menu and it was all yummy
Great food in Midtown . I will definitely be back to enjoy another delicious meal with my family. They even got a picture with Mayor Kevin Johnson

Took a chance an ordered two fish dinners and two wing and waffle plates on Wednesday after reading the reviews on Yelp. The fish and all the sides were sooo good. We had the coleslaw, potato salad, greens and yams. The wings and waffles were good too. Only two things that need to be improved upon, the hush puppies were hard, dense and not good. There was no syrup for the waffles. Other than that, the food was A+ and I am looking forward to returning!!
The food here is usually great. Sides are all pretty good. Mac & cheese is rich and flavorful. Wait times and sometimes limited service are why I give it a 4/5

Food was cool/ok BUTTTT I wouldn't consider the Oxtails as smothered they were definitely more Jamaican Style flavored not smothered brown soul food gravy at all fried devil eggs were good and different yams and greens need some assistance I really would give them a 3.6 since we expected it to be a soul food spot

Sacramento is more than limited when it comes to quality soul food options, so THANK YOU FIXINS. This trendy spot provides a great ambiance with exposed brick, beautiful lights, TV's and a nice music selection. As I visited on a Sunday after church, it was nice to hear gospel music playing as I dined.
Due to COVID-19 guidelines there was limited seating. Limited seating resulted in over an hour long wait. As the wait was lengthy, it would've been nice to have the option of having a drink to enjoy while waiting. I suggest in the future this option be made available. After I was seated, I noticed that it was quite cold outside, so I asked my server if she could please turn on the outdoor heater. The heater worked for about five minutes and then turned off. I alerted my server who then said she would relay the message to her manager. The manager never came out to change out the propane tank (which I assumed was the problem). So, my entire outdoor dining experience was affected. I was hugging myself the entire time to try to keep warm. As my check was being processed the manager began walking around the tables and checking on everyone. He asked about my service and I told him about the heater situation. He was very apologetic and told me that there were short staff in the kitchen, and he needed to help out. He also told me that it was my responsibility to keep asking my server about the heater, until the situation was handled. As a customer this is simply not something I wanted to hear. This situation negatively affected my overall dining experience and it could've been such a quick fix.

My meal consisted of a starter, drink, and an entree.
Starter: Catfish Nuggets
Entree: Shrimp and Grits
Drink: Extra Spicy Bloody Mary
The Catfish nuggets are a nice alternative if you would like to try their catfish, but don't want an entire entree. The nuggets came with two dipping sauces. The white sauce was comparable to a regular tartar sauce and an orange spicy sauce. The spicy sauce was to die for and I dipped every bite in it. My adult drink of choice was a Bloody Mary. This Bloody was the perfect amount of spicy. It was packed with celery, cauliflower, a red pepper, and a piece of maple glazed bacon. I took my time drinking it as I didn't want to finish it. The pièce de résistance was the Shrimp and Grits. As a creole girl, I know quality Shrimp and Grits when I taste it, and I am highly impressed. The shrimp was huge and the sauce was absolutely amazing, and I wanted more of it. The grits were cooked perfectly and not over salted.

The disappointment with the heater was not enough to ruin my overall dining experience. The absolute quality in the food made up for it. I would recommend this restaurant to anyone seeking an authentic soul food experience.

Ok..so this restaurant is the best soul food ... hands down! The oxtails = tender, flavorful huge portions.  The catfish = moist on the inside, crispy on the outside with to die for collard greens and hush puppies!  Then the potato salad! Let's give a salute to the chefs !  The best I've tasted since my Godmother was alive.  We also tried the deep fried deviled eggs - a surprise yum!  To top it all off we had pink Kool-aid and peach cobbler with ice cream... a real treat.  This place is a must visit! Great service also. Hubs treated me for my birthday and it was a special treat.
Food is amazing.  Good service, good food and the tunes!  The design of the restaurant is a modern look with a touch of classic.  5 stars all the way.

I must say this place is outstanding. I have had or at least tried there is nothing to disappoint you about. One of the best places during Covid to get food to go too. It's all good , come down and try it.
Loved the atmosphere and location. I ordered the oxtails.. it was okay. Kool aid was delicious!
Coming from the south and craving a home cooked meal was hard to find. We found this place and really enjoyed the food and atmosphere!

This review marks my second visit to this establishment and I must say, I am impressed. I rate it a 4 out of 5 stars solely based on the acoustics and music volume level in the building. The music was very loud, however, it wasn't bad. The food was just as good this visit as was my last. I ordered the Gumbo which almost had me licking the bowl, it just went so fast, but I have a little self control. I had the buttermilk pie for desert is to die for. Overall I must say I am very impressed and can't wait to find a reason to come back.

Delicious!  Easily to become one of our favorites in town.  We had Sunday breakfast there and all exceeded our expectations.  The service was terrific and Toni was super friendly.  The food was fabulous. The chicken and waffles were better than any we have had in Harlem or North Carolina.  And the grits were creamy and rich enough to write home about.  Will definitely return!

Their service is HORRIBLE!!! When the host sat us at our table, we we're sitting there for 20 minutes before the waiter approached us and serviced us water. We told her we were ready to order but she said she would be back, it took another 15 minutes to come back to our table. We waited 35+ minutes to finally order our food. Honestly we should have just left because the food was mediocre. The catfish was fried to hard and was very salty. I'm from the south I don't know why I thought it was going to taste like real southern food when we're in Cali.

I am blown away by my experience today.  First time at Fixins.  The food was AMAZING and portions were really big. The staff was so down to earth and actually fun to chat with.  The atmosphere was really cool and the prices are reasonable!  This is my new "go to" spot.  I cannot think of one thing I would improve on and I am picky when it comes to restaurants. Keep up the excellent quality and great service!!!

We finally got to eat here. We waited around 15 mins for a party of 7 on a sunny Sunday afternoon. We had the chicken with red beans and rice (2x), chicken and waffle, and chicken tender. We also had fried green tomatoes, and artichoke with crackers for appetizers. We didn't wait long for neither however the help good be better. Our server was great but just one of the server wasn't on point. He came with our order and announce who had what. He then waited there until we took the plate from his hands instead of placing on the table. He did that to all of us on the table. Kind of odd but hey, our main server was good. As for the food it's good. I tasted better food but it was on the East Coast. It's good for the west coast. A place to try and see how you like it. You won't be disappointed in my opinion.

Met a friend for lunch and we decided to order the Fried Chicken and Oxtail to share. Both were SO good! Great atmosphere, extremely friendly staff and very clean! Street parking can be tough, but the food is well worth it! Would definitely recommend!

First timer and I wasn't disappointed! We ordered the oxtails 1 with red beans and rice the other with collard greens. I was surprised how many oxtail pieces came in one order. Almost a pound if not more. I liked the gravy but I would have put less it totally drowned the rice. Either way it was so good I didn't stop for a picture. Dessert we got the peach cobbler and banana pudding. Out of this world!!! Bomb.com
Being from LA we are always told to tru different soul food places and have always been disappointed until now! Food was Good, Clean Restrooms, Great Service and they serve Kool Aid!

I should've taken a photo of my dinner. Because it was probably the best fried chicken, gravy, mac and cheese, red beans and rice I've had. With their sweet tea it was a perfect dinner. Now if they could put on some Tower of Power music I would've given them 7 stars. And our waitress was great. Anywhere I get called honey and darling is my kind of place.

Oxtail was on point! Deep fried deviled eggs were !
Cant leave without trying one of their signature drinks from the bar. Hands down best southern restaurant in sac.

Delicious food, great atmosphere. Went o Fixin's over the weekend and had the chicken n waffles and adult kool-aid. Even though we waited about an hour for a table, the service was great. Sierra was very attentive. I will say the wait was pretty much expected given the popularity of the restaurant. Will definitely be going back.

We went there while in Sacramento. Definitely the best restaurant we encountered while there. I highlight recommend their fried chicken and Mac and cheese. The service was a little subpar, but the atmosphere and food made up for it!

We came from San Diego to celebrate for a night, then raft tomorrow. We had plans for a trendy supper club. But, I wanted to good and I saw the Yelp reviews. I cancelled reservations and we came here. The food was RIDICULOUSLY good. I ate so much, I'm about to bust:)

I ordered the fried deviled eggs which were ok. The chicken & waffles were good. My son loved his Mac & cheese. The hubby loved the oxtails. The cranberry Mimosa was delicious. The adult kool aid tasted way too sugary. Our waitress Kat made our visit worth the wait, she was awesome

The food here was absolutely BOMB.

I wish I could have ate at the restaurant instead of take-out, but with COVID I opted not to. It had a great ambience and vibe. My boyfriend and I ordered the ox-tails, hot chicken sandwich, corn bread, collard greens, Kool-aid, and apple pie with ice cream. I was impressed with how they plated the dessert/ice cream since we ordered our meal to-go. The ice cream came in a small container that kept the ice-cream cold. 

It was pretty busy when we went (dinner time) so the wait was kind of long but understandable. Overall, the meal was delicious and really hit the spot.
I cant wait to go back and try other meals on the menu!

I ABSOLUTELY LOVE THIS PLACE! 

I have been here quite a few times and ordered take-out a few times as well. I haven't snapped a picture each time I've eaten, but I've tried the chicken sandwich, smothered pork chops, catfish, chicken and waffles, Mac and cheese, black eyed peas, and greens. I have not been disappointed in a single thing I've tried. 

I will say if you want to accurately taste the food here you've got to do it dining in, it's an entirely different experience then ordering take-out. The food is far more fresh and the dining experience is so nice because the staff is so friendly and courteous. You cannot leave an accurate review of this place if you've only ordered takeout.

The food was pretty solid - We had the Chicken and waffles And the oxtails. However, I've never experienced such poor service before. The server Christen, not only was acting foul and rude she had a snobby attitude. she is literally the worst bartender I have ever encountered! For the money that we are spending at this restaurant it is super disappointing to not even get a decent drink. She took forever to get us our drinks and when they came out they were freaking gross. I didn't even finish mine and got a beer instead. If, we decide to go back, we will no doubt request a different bartender, but likely will not be returning here. I will pass the message along to all my friends and family about the horrible experience I had at this restaurant and make suggestions to others. Fixins, as an upcoming restaurant needs to make sure they are putting focus on service quality (as well) b/c Christen has ruined this soul food restaurant experience for me.
We waited for over an hour to sit outside but it was so worth it.  The fried catfish was delish and the chicken was phenomenal.  We loved all the sides as well.  I can't wait to go back!

Food was Excellent‼ I had the shrimp & grits Mac& cheese My daughter had the fried chicken & waffles and candied yams  It was worth the wait‼I will definitely come back to try other food and side dishes‼
It's Family Friendly‼ Food portions was sufficient‼

Went there 1st time in  March of this year recommended by a friend. Friendly service, great menu and the food was do good!
Plan to go back .

All I can say is awesome! The service was incredible, and we had a party of 19 at the last minute. They sat us in their back room, and we had our drinks and appetizers in less than 20 minutes. 

The food was well seasoned and authentic, down home cooking. From the appetizers to desserts, the food was great. Besides the greens and brown gravy having a little kick, there were no complaints. We will definitely return.

Delish. So excited for this place. Super friendly service, Nicki was our fantastic waitress.
We ordered shrimp and grits, hot chicken sandwich, charred okra and the deep fried deviled eggs. EVERYTHING was above expectations.
The decor is lovely the staff was having fun but still very attentive. Good to see a thriving family oriented restaurant. We will definitely be back. Much love Fixins.
Great food! Great customer service from our waiter. The staff working at the front weren't the friendliest.
The best Soul Food experience I have ever had besides Grandma's.  The food is wonderfully seasoned and cooked to perfection.
The food was delicious and the atmosphere was great. Looking forward to going back for dinner.
I'm a very picky eater, now a days it seems like most places grab things out of the freezer. Not this place everything was fresh and different. Great ambiance- service pretty good and clean- thanks

One of our favorite Sacramento restaurants. Try the oxtails, fried chicken, mac n cheese and the biscuits are to.die.for (especially with the grape butter.) We've never had a bad meal here and service for eating-in is great. But if you do pick-up just be sure to check your order before you leave, we've had items missing more often than not. Annoying but not enough to keep us from coming back.

What can I say. I went to Fixins and got me a fix of some good ole soul food. You will not be disappointed. We arrived around 530 it was a little wait. However it was well worth it. Service was on point. Drinks were very tasty. The Koolaid and lemonade took me back to my childhood days. The food was simply amazing. The red beans and rice melted in my mouth like butter. The catfish was cooked to perfection. Shrimp and grits taste so good it had us humming at the table. The atmosphere was great and fit perfectly with the theme of the restaurant. Kevin came out to greet his guest. Making sure everyone was good. If you haven't been to Fixins you need to. Your missing out... Hats off to you Kevin Johnson you did your thing.
Really love their fish, but their cheesy grits are really just grits with a layer of cheese on it.

Omg This Joint is Soooo Bomb , 1st Things 1st I Originally Wanted to try The Mimosa House But Thank God I Was Steered In This Direction From The Food Gods , There Was No Wait .. The Waiters Are Awesome The Food Is Well Seasoned & The Music Was A Vibe The Unicorn Kool-Aid Was Perfect I Mean Everything Was Im Bringing My Whole Family Back .!!!!!!

Service was pretty good. We sat at the bar. Chicken is ok, don't like the peanut oil though and glad I'm not allergic because they didn't disclose that. Mac is good, yams are good. Oxtails have a coo flavor but they could've been more tender, as well as trimmed better of excess fat. I'd go back again.

Everybody...‍

When I tell you, that this will be the best chicken you will ever eat...Y'all!!  

THIS IS THE BEST CHICKEN YOU WILL EVER EAT!

First of all, they brine it, perhaps in the seasoned tears of angels from south heaven - not west or east, certainly not north heaven, but somewhere in the Deep South of heaven. 

And then they have the nerve to put it in an omelette...ok, this was the best bite of 2019. I don't even remember what the hell else was on my plate. 

When you're trying to figure out if you order the menu to go how to get it past airport security you know it's good. 

When you're planning your next trip back just to eat here with hotel accommodations in the vicinity, you know it's good. 

It's so good ‍

Ok so this place exceeded expectation! The only reason it didn't get 5 stars is because the kids chicken strip was pretty spicy for children. The oxtails were the biscuit was made from scratch and so effing delicious with a light honey glaze on top. The chicken was seasoned well and crunchy. Sides were yams, greens, Mac n cheese and black eyed peas. Everything hit the spot. I'm definitely coming back.

My husband and I have frequented Fixins Soul Kitchen a few times now at different times and the meals have always been delicious. Well seasoned, great portions and pleasing to the eyes, with the exception of the collards. But I'm a southern girl and my taste buds are specific when it comes to Southern cooking.

The Service Associates and Greeters at Fixins are friendly, knowledgeable and patient. Keep up the good work and welcome to the community.
I really enjoyed everything I ordered from Fixins. The sweet tea, fried chicken, Mac and cheese, grits (with cheese), and the biscuit were all extremely good. I left with a very happy and full tummy.

The food is so good! I grew up eating Southern food and you just can't find it around here...until now! I had the fried chicken with mac n cheese and cheese grits. The chicken was tasty, crispy, and not greasy (and huge pieces). The mac n cheese tasted just like the best homemade I've had. And the grits with pimiento cheese? The BOMB! Definitely coming back. Also very beautifully designed and super clean and modern (but homey at the same time). I also liked that Kevin Johnson came around to greet everyone. Great experience all around.
First time dinning at Fixins Soul Kitchen, the staff is very friendly and the food was  outstanding.

Fixins did an excellent job of getting our order out. That said, everything tasted good...chicken, fish and coleslaw, potato salad. The grits needed work. I paid an extra dollar for cheesey grits. I was given over cooked grits with what I can only describe as canned cheese. Not cool. Canned food isn't soul food!
Fried Chicken Mason Jars drinks, Red Beans and Rice smothered Ox Tail Fried Deviled Eggs Fried Catfish, all delicious
I'll go back just to see Q again! Food was incredible and if you love chicken and waffles and great service definitely stop by!

The very soul of comfort food.  If we lived closer, we would be going back all the time for the oxtails.  Super delicious.  We've been several times and I can tell you, everything is good! Great service too.

We came far for this meal and called ahead of time to make sure we could be seated , the girl who had them two puffs in her head told us yes but when we got there told us no and tried to turn us away. So we Spoke to the manager and got seated ..so going forward , this USED to be my favorite place until last night! I recommend you come way earlier than 8 o'clock because after that they don't give two shits about your food, everybody got a stank attitude and they just want to hurry up and close. Each and every single thing had something wrong with what me, my sister and boyfriend ordered besides the yams. So yeah they are good IF the servers and chefs aren't in a damn rush!

I was in town from Tempe Arizona and I Was given recommendations to eat at this establishment.  So on Sunday morning my wife a took an Uber to this business and arrived two hours before they had opened up.  So we saw that they had a patio area, so we sat there to wait but was told by one of the staff members that we needed to leave the area.  This was an order given by the manager.  She instructed us to go around the corner to another establishment order some coffee and then to come back there which really did not make sense.  The young lady was very rude and nasty. So we sat out front on a concrete wall and waited for the business to open for almost 1.5 hours. Still trying to eat at this establishment.  We should have left the food was nasty and and was served cold.  We still paid for the food and left but later on I ended up getting sick from the breakfast plate eggs and bacon and potatoes.  They put cheese in my eggs and seasoning on the bacon.  Please I hope that this bad experience never happens to anyone!!!! I was sick all night long!!! Then last but least we paid $48.00 for that garbage and to be sick!!!

The food &service is outstanding.  Oxtails are a must, Chicken & waffles are bomb, cat fish bites , fried green tomatoes are amazing and they have the best drinks. I highly recommend the lavender martini. I can't say enough good things- If your in Sac GO you won't be sorry.
Food was ok, side servings are small. Bought a family meal of chicken and it was ok for the price. Very expensive if your on a budget.

I went here yesterday and it was some of the best food i've ever had, everything was cooked to the right amount. I was blown away by the drinks too, so good. Definitely give this place a visit if you're nearby.

First couple nights in Sacramento and based I. Yelp, gave them a try. So here is the deal, they would of got 5 stars but their takeout process is jacked up. Fried chicken needs to be hot right? Take out, you lower your expectations which I did. I placed the order online and it said it would be ready at 6pm. It's about 15 minutes away so I figured id leave around 540 to get there a little early. I get a text at 540 that my order is ready for pick up, 20 minutes before the eta. So I rush down there and wait in line, get back at 625 and everything is cold. Boooo. If the website was better, and they had a better process for people picking up food, it would of been better for the price of the food. Was good but just ok

The food was okay I ordered the smothered chicken and I have to admit I was disappointed with it. Whenever I had smothered chicken growing up it would be the chicken smothered in gravy, the smothered chicken I got here was like they just put the gravy on top of the chicken..... (Disclaimer) remember they do have lots of other food so you should try the place out for yourself.

I have nothing but great things to say.  Fantastic, all the way around!  The collard greens were awesome and the Mac and cheese was the absolute best version of homemade (no Velveeta) that I've ever had at a restaurant.  Yes, you can see the cheese separate a bit, because it's real cheese and not fake cheese sauce!  Great drinks!  I wish I could have tried the banana pudding, but there was no way.  We'll be back!
Overrated and very pricey not a fan of the gumbo some of the food Really salty but I will go again if someone else is paying

Excellent flavor and true authentic soul food! I love this place. Whenever I need my soul food fix, this is the place I order from. Hands down, the best soul food in Sacramento! The fried chicken, catfish, Mac & cheese and collard greens are on point!

It's difficult for Sac to have a good Soul Food spot.  This is good soul food! Husband got shrimp and grits,  I got chicken and waffles with gravy on the side.  Flavors were great,  textures good.  The ambiance of the whole location is really chill.  Family,  but also nice for a date.  I will definitely be back!

What a great place! First time visiting and this place was awesome! The staff were friendly and attentive - made you feel so welcome. The food was outstanding! I had the cat fish with hush puppies - you have to go for yourself and see how amazing it is..my friends  had the fired chicken and there was nothing left on any plate!

I tried to give this place a third chance, but the third time was not a charm. The staff was great and the kool-aid is always my favorite, but the food was not the n point for it to be a soul food place. I don't know if there is different chef, but the quality of food is not consistent.

Best soul food spot in Sacramento. Honestly, I would say one on the best overall restaurant in town. A great mixture of a lively, new age atmosphere with old school home cooking. Great for all generations; an ideal spot for a family dinner. Superb from the service to the food.
When I tell you this place was PACKED it was but I see why food was amazing omg !!!! Oxtails are amazing !!

What a great new restaurant in the heart of Oak Park. The happy mistake of going to one of the soft openings that not knowing it was a soft opening and was greeted just like family. I believe mostly family was there. My barber had been telling me about this place for months. Of course I tried to fry chicken collard greens mac & cheese and it was on hit. Some of the best fried chicken and greens I've had in a long time besides cooking it myself. I met Kevin his wife and his brother-in-law really down to earth and genuinely cares about customers. I've told all my friends at UCDAVIS medical center. They're all dying to go as well. I've gone back three times already and it's not even the grand opening yet.
Came here a little while ago. They stay busy because the food is delicious and rich. I'm a mac.n.cheese fan and I loved theirs. Will definitely go back when this epidemic is over.

Had Fixins for the first time today and I was met with a very kind, attentive, and amicable waitress named Talia, followed by some of the most amazing and well seasoned food I've ever had. I will definitely be coming back here again, amazing service and amazing food!

I don't know what happened, I had a Curb-Side pick up & I was WAY to excited to finally dig in. Once I did, It seemed to me the flavor was missing. I had my first visit almost a couple months ago & the chicken's been on my mind since. I was kinda disappointed because I had driven from Riverbank to receive my meal & it wasn't what I remembered. 
However the customer service is still amazing, The food I KNOW can be good, but is a bit over-priced. I'm still happy with the restaurant, But I can give it a break now on my end

Great vibe and friendly staff. I've only tried a few items but most were great. I recommend the fried green tomatoes, shrimp and grits, and they have a lan omelet stuffed with greens that's delicious!

Also, I love the artwork, vibe, cleanliness and the quality of the establishment itself. It's a bit loud in there tho... but guess that comes with booming business?

On Wednesday I came for the first time and let me just say it did not disappoint. The minute I walked in I was greeted with a smile by the beautiful young lady Aaliyah she was so nice and bubbly. I then had to wait 45 minutes but boy was it worth it. When I got seated my server Desiree was so nice and welcoming. I will definitely be coming back and telling all my friends about this hidden gem! 10/10 recommend!
The BEST soul food restaurant I have ever been to! We had all of the sides and they were all amazing!

I went in fixins for my first and last time. I ordered take out and Ms.tequila gave herself a 18% tip and told me the machine does it automatically. Now even though she only took my order I chose not to make a scene so she could keep the money. My problem is I was trying to support the business but this kind of service turned me off. So for me the food was so so but I would have given it another chance but not now. That one person lost a lot of customers because she doesn't know who I know. My suggestion is check your receipt.     
P.S.(I love to tip and pay it forward)

Went to Fixins on Wednesday for lunch, didn't really know what to get. The bartender who went by "Q" (who was hilarious by the way) she recommended a great Fried Green tomatoes appetizer ( not something I would typically get) also got a spicy chicken sandwich. She also poured a great drink! I will definitely be back!

It was okay in taste, been to NOLA before so I know how southern food is suppose to taste. Seasoning was bare to minimal and their sweet ice tea was a little too sweet and had no ice... overall an okay experience. Nothing for me to dive in more.

It's been a few months (do to covid) since we have been here. For the most part, we have enjoyed our food. Today, not so much. I ordered the chicken and waffles. My husband ordered the black eyes peas, greens and pork chops. His pork chops were a little dry and not much flavor. His black eyes pass were okay. His greens were a little too vinegary (?). My waffle was soggy. My chicken was over cooked. Not sure if they have a new cook or what but, it'll probably be a while before we go back (if we do).

Great food great service.
Full bar real food...very comfortable. Huge patio..
I'll be back .

One word, DELICIOUS! Everything was good. Have been hearing nothing but good things about this place & we finally decided to give it a try. Came in Monday at about 3:30pm not crowded at all we were seated immediately. Once we ordered our food came within 15 minutes which was excellent since I had a hungry kiddo with me. I had the smothered chicken w/ yams & mac & cheese, my son had chicken tenders w/ fries & mac & cheese then, my mother had the oxtails w/ collard greens. Everything was hot soooo good! My son loved the cornbread & his red kool-aid (which we shared). We also got the peach cobbler & bread pudding to go & I tasted my bread pudding in the car & Im not a fan at all. One thing I wish they did was provide take-out I don't want to eat in all the time we visit.

When craving soul food, this restaurant is at the top of the list. The fried chicken is crunchy, moist, and just overall delicious. All four people at my table agreed that the selection and quality of sides is better than all of the other local soul food restaurants in the downtown area. I just about died over the biscuit and honey butter,  it was so good! The service was fast and the staff is so friendly. I love the aesthetic, and the outdoor patio is super nice. We will definitely be back to try breakfast!

The fried chicken is soaked in brine for 24 hours before it is fried...  this keeps it moist and OMG, it is amazing!

The Kool Aid is made to perfect specifications.  Made me fall back in love with Kool Aid!  Who knew that Kool Aid was so good?  They sell it in 5 different flavors:  red, green, blue, pink and purple.  I highly recommend red.

Great atmosphere and a definite energy in and around this restaurant.  A welcome addition to Sacramento, this has become our favorite go-to spot for delicious comfort food.

I can literally travel 6-7 hours for great chicken and waffles in Long Beach but this place has changed the travel game for me. 1 hr drive with about 30 mins - 1 hr wait that's even better. I'll have to come here with reservation to sit outside one of these days because the line was LONG.......... but, that's just means the food is good right?

I hate to write this because now everyone will know about this little gem of a restaurant and it will be hard for us to get in. But, this place is really good!! Love the chicken, yams, Bloody Mary, kool aide cocktails. Good service great prices.

STRAIGHT TRASH ! I am LITERALLY on hold as Im typing this! I like a fool picked up another 2 go order, one of the entrees I ordered was a 3 piece chicken meal, needless to say they only gave me 2 pieces. Im trying to let them know that I didnt get what I paid for but Im still on hold! After being on hold for about 10 minutes I called from my husbands phone(while my phone was still on hold) they answered, I asked the lady to speak to a manager she asks me WHO'S CALLING!! I said a customer, I just left and didnt get all my food she said oh well THEYRE BUSY do you want to leave a message? I said HUH no thats u acceptable, theres always a problem here and I didnt get what I paid for, she hung up the damn phone! I AM LIVID & will be disputing this charge thru my bank!! UPDATE: after calling about 5 more times they answered and this time I was told again that the managers are busy! I asked doing what since it seems like they should be addressing customer issues!! She said then asked me for my receipt number and phone number and said she would have someone call me back!! I cant make this up if I tried!! I told her I didnt appreciate how I was being treated especially since I just spent over $50 and didnt get what the heck I paid for!!! I dont care how good the food is, they wont get another dime from me!!!

Our overall experience was exceptional.  The atmosphere was welcoming and inviting. The food was delicious and reminded you of a family dinner at grandma's house after church.  Fixins' customer service was top notch. The owner, Kevin Johnson, greeted us upon our arrival and our server Robert went above and beyond to ensure we had the best dining experience possible. We will definitely be back.

The 3 I.E. girls playing hookie from stressful jobs,

Cre, Fitz, & Bishop

Love the atmosphere and food. It's an urban style restaurant that is inclusive of any and everyone. What a great asset to the City of Sacramento and the Oak Park area. 

I've had the fried catfish twice, both times with collard greens but once with red beans and rice and Mac n cheese. 

I've also had the shrimp and grits  

Finally the chicken and waffles. 

Every time I go I have an even better experience. Food is

Already looking forward to my next visit! The fried chicken is perfectly crisp on the outside, juicy and tender on the inside, and has incredible flavor. 
Deep fried deviled eggs - eggcellent
Catfish nuggets - divine
Fried green tomatoes - bomb
Mac 'n cheese - ooey AND gooey
Koolaid pickle - quality

Amazing !!!!! Their Mac and cheese is to die for . Ox tail dish is delicious too ! Everything I got here was great ! It's a bit pricey but hey ! I'll pay the price for some real soul food !!! Friendly staff also , very enjoyable here .

Food was POPPIN. Nice venue. Nice vibe.  Great service with warm and attentive staff.

I had the wings and waffles, and side of greens.  Delicious!  

My husband had the burger and fries, and the adult KoolAid.  He said everything was on-point.  

I'll definitely be back to try the peach cobbler!
The food was awesome. They were very courteous and helpful, my food came faster than they said and the purple koolaid -bomb. So good.

I wanted to give a 3 but the oxtails were so good, it deserves an extra star!

Oxtails - 10 out of 5 
The flavor profile was excellent! There were layers of flavor and it was extremely tender. 

Smothered pork chop - 0 out of 5 
I've never had pork chop so tough and it taste like nothing. It wasn't smothered... the gravy was on the side. The gravy would have been good if it didn't have that strong burnt taste. 

Fried chicken - 1 out of 5
It got a 1 star because it LOOKS like it taste good. Presentation was excellent! It didn't have any seasoning at all. It taste like air. I refuse to believe that the same person made this and the oxtails. 

Mac n cheese - 4 out 5
It was fine. It wasn't the best Mac n cheese ever but it was something I would order again. 

Yams - 5/5
Finally a soul food place that actually has the right color for yams! It should be brownish orange. It taste great! 

Greens - 4 out of 5 
I loved it. It wish it had less vinegar but still good. 

Biscuit - 10 out of 5 
Sooooooo good!!! My children complained about not ordering more. 

To go containers (it is important to note) - 5 out of 5
Not only was it cute but it was practical! Our meat wasn't sweaty once we got home.
Been nothing but good, if I have one complaint! Just one, Is they really need to allow the ox tails to cook longer! Great flavor and sauce but to tough!!

We visited today for breakfast. I must say it's the best breakfast I have had in a restaurant to this day that I can remember. I had grits, pancake and chicken sausage. The food was absolutely amazing like grandma Fixins! I will definitely be returning soon. I will share with others about the great meal I was served. 

Thank you!

Wow, The food is delicious here. We ordered the smothered chicken, fried chicken meal, gumbo and catfish sandwich. Everything was great though the gumbo was a bit bland and didn't have the authentic gumbo flavor I was hoping for. Minus 1 star for the hour long wait just for the food to get ready when we had ordered online saying it'll only take 25 mins. I think it was probably just one of those days so there's hope that I'll give this place another go in the near future.
I came in for a order sat at the bar for 30 minutes. I watched 2 people get there food before me after they came in before me.  When I ask why nobody had a explanation.

Yummy Yum Yum! Such a great addition to Oak Park and the overall Sacramento restaurant scene. The friendly atmosphere is a breath of fresh air and the aesthetics are great! The food is amazing and You can't you can't find a more diverse group of patrons in Sacramento if you tried! The only reason I've given it four stars is because the patio is not yet open. Sorry, I'm a sucker for outdoor dining!

If fried chicken, candied yams, greens and bourbon infused sweet tea is your jam then this is the place for you!

Went here a few weeks ago to meet a friend for Lunch. They are taking all the proper precautions with COVID. Masked servers, distanced seating areas outside. The food here is delicious, i had the fried chicken sandwich and the extra sweet tea and it was very satisfying.

My husband, two daughters and I went to Fixins Soul Kitchen for lunch a few days ago. We LOVED it! The food was delicious! We shared chicken and waffles and also fried chicken with coleslaw and fries. The food was wonderful and the sweet tea too!

author_location: East San Jose, San Jose, CA
text: Food was good. I ordered the 2pc chicken with black eyed peas and coleslaw and enjoyed it.  It was a recommended place to try during my visit in Sacramento and glad I did.

The food here, whether dine-in, take-out, or delivery, is always fresh, well-seasoned, and authentic. I love coming to Fixins. It is a celebration of culture and food. Check them out soon. They will not disappoint.

author_location: East 14th Street Business District, Oakland, CA
text: I was very pleased. All the food was warm and delicious.  The ambiance was very welcoming and the servers were all very polite. All the food on other plates (LOL) looked good too. I couldn't try everything, but I looked at everything. LOL

I finally had lunch this week and it was good. The chicken was tasty and the biscuit with strawberry butter is too die for!!! The service was great also. We got there shortly after they opened, so there was no wait for the service.

My husband and I just did a take-out order for Oxtails for me and smothered pork chops for him. First of all, the portion sizes are small for the prices. Secondly, the oxtails and gravy were way too salty to eat, a disservice to anyone with hypertension. The collard greens were tasted too much like vinegar. The yams didn't resemble southern yams at all, too crunchy and too much nutmeg. My husband's pork chops were far from smothered but edible and the black eyed peas were good. Didn't realize no cornbread comes with the meal, apparently it's $3 extra. This was my first and last time ordering from here and wasn't worth the 12 mile drive to be so disappointed as we don't have any soul food restaurants near Roseville. If they need some help with receipes, all they need to do is ask. In the meantime, I'll cook my own.

Definitely my go to spot for soul food! Husband and girls had chicken n waffles...absolutely delicious. I had chicken with sides of greens n yams....sooo delicious. We also ordered sides of Mac and cheese, potatoes salad...everything was so good, zero complaints. Service was excellent and friendly. The owner was so nice...going around to tables and asking how everything was. Oh, and had to try the banana pudding...delicious! Definitely will be back and totally recommend coming here!

Today I went into Fixins thinking I was going to have a great experience. I guess today nobody was in the mood. I asked Alizae  the waitress for a manager and she was so rude about it. She even was getting smart when we had raw pork chops and raw chicken. Then this new manager came out being even more rude. So I guess they fitting right in with the rude people from Sacramento.. don't trip I'm never coming back. Keep y'all raw chicken, rude employees and cold food. You did taste as good as the Mayoral work we received.

This place is fantastic on so many levels! The chicken and waffles and mac n cheese are bomb and the staff are friendly and helpful! Be sure to go around the corner and check out Underground's books before or after your meal- the whole block is dope.

My family and I went to Fixins and the fried green tomatoes were fresh and hot and seasoned very well. I also had the catfish which was fresh, crispy and seasoned well. The fries were a little salty. My husband had the smothered chicken which was too salty and he said he would come back but wouldn't order that again. The gumbo was perfect as well as the oxtails. The service was fast and efficient. We would definitely go back.
This food was really good.  It was as close as it gets to the home cooked version. From what I was told the food was part of the owners grandmas recipes.

Well, I wanted to like this place...wish I got my whole order...Don't use GrubHub/Yelp to order. When I order thru GH on Yelp, it confirmed that "the restaurant received my order" and gave me a 35-55 minute wait, so I drove slow, made some stops to kill time, only to find out they didn't receive the order when I got there. So I waited, again...no apologies, just "here you go ma'am". I was so tired of waiting that I grabbed the bag and left. Spent $71 on two catfish meals and one side, and paid for Mac n' cheese that I didn't get. Oh well. Won't do that again. The good news is the food (minus the Mac n cheese) was pretty tasty...red beans and rice side was more like half a cup of red beans and maybe a tablespoon of rice to be honest...the one or two bites of that tasted good...but I'll pass on the customer service. Maybe just bad luck today...

This spot is amazing! I went on a Tuesday night and it was pretty packed, we were given a 35-40 minute estimated wait but were seated in at least 25 minutes. I got the catfish, Mac n cheese and sweet potatoes. The fish is a very large piece, perfectly seasoned and breaded. The Mac n cheese was good too. The only thing that I wasn't in love with was the sweet potatoes, but that is only because I prefer a little less cinnamon. I even had some of my boyfriends greens and they were amazing as well (I definitely don't eat everyone's greens)

Our waitress was Jasmine and she was very sweet and checked on us throughout our meal. Our food came out super quick as well. 

10/10 recommend!

The Food is great. Especially when you catch fresh off the stove. P eff ople as re friendly and down to earth. You get every diverse crowd.
It's on my list of a food place to remember.

OMG the food here is delicious!!!! Get the peach cobbler, ox tail, and the hot chicken sandwich! You will not be dissatisfied or disappointed. I love this place. And get the sweet tea with extra ice! So amazing :) I will be returning time and time again. Great customer service too--overall one of my favorite restaurants in Sac!

Food was so good but giving it 4 stars until the sides get bigger. This was the downside I heard before coming here although I did get a nice scoop of max & cheese straight on my plate. If your sides are in the little bowl it's guaranteed not enough. I will definitely be back and just order extra food to compensate for the small sides. This can get pricey quickly though which will limit my visits here.
Amazing food and the service is top tier. Whenever I'm in sac I must go to fixins! Highly recommend!
Love the sweet tea and corn muffins! Chicken and waffles so so... waffles not crispy. Fried chicken average. Like the atmosphere inside the restaurant.

This place!

I've been back several times, just working my way through the menu.  The catfish, not just the best combination of crispy and moist tenderness.  I don't know what their secret is on the chicken, but its got to be tried.  I offer one warning that their 'spicy' may be a challenge for some.  All the sides and appetizers are great.  And if you forget to save room for desert, you should take some home for later!

Best fried Chicken I've ever eaten. First time having Chicken and Waffles sooooo good! Sweet spicy and savory. Staff is great and just loved talking with h Auntie Pearl. Than you for a great meal and a great restaurant experience.
Great fried chicken..lots of flavor.. deviled eggs are a must...overall great food and service would definitely recommend..
I love love good Soul Food and Fixin's is fabulous. Whatever you order is delicious. Be sure to get some homemade Peach Cobbler for dessert.

Babyyyyy lemme tell you!!! I'd been craving some bomb soul food for a minute. Scrolling on yelp and the original restaurant I had chose wasn't open. I came across Fixins and ohhhh myyy gosh. The pictures people posted are good but the food is straight FIRE! I had the 2 wings and waffle with the collard greens and Mac. My husband had the oxtails with the okra. I sampled his oxtails (first time ever having them) and I kid you not, I'm hooked! I've never had soul food that just satisfied my entire soul the way it did today. The service was amazing too. Servers were great and got to learn some of the back history of the restaurant and learned we have one closer to home in LA. So I'm for sure gonna visit that location. The ambiance was pretty dope ! Clean restaurant and the music was a whole vibe as well. (I didn't take any pics cuz I was too hungry & pregnant lol)

I loved the service and the atmosphere. There is a nice patio area. We ordered, fried chicken, catfish nuggets, macaroni and cheese, peach cobbler and greens. Everything was delicious but the peach cobbler and catfish nuggets were my favorite.
Wow, wow!!!! So amazing! I wanted to lick my plate clean! Great service (ask for Cat)! Mac and cheese, fire! Yams, delicious! Chicken, flavorful and crispy! Highly recommend, I'll be back again!!!!!
I would love to see more veggie/vegan soul food options for main dishes! Other than that the food I have tried was amazing!
I enjoyed the oxtails so much that I ordered a plate of fish. I plan to go back for my birthday tomorrow.

We ordered $74 worth of food on 5/25 and was very disappointed with it. Somehow they make th food different every time. Not consistent at all. We don't think our food was made to order. How could it be when we ordered at 5:23 and then get a text message at 5:27 saying the order is ready for pick up??? The chicken was dry and also not tasty, just spicy. No flavor. Also the $13 salad ordered called soul greens came with no arugula, I st a whole bunch of romaine and parmesan cheese. Even though arugula was one of the stated ingredients. We feel we got jljipped. Whoever was preparing g food this day did not care at all what was put out there. It was a lot better f money to spend for half assed food. The waffles were dry and they did not even give butter or any syrup for the fixings. I dont know if this is how they treat their takeout customers but it needs to change!!
Is there anything on the menu that is'nt delicious ? And with the incredible service you recieve to go along with there food, it is easly my number one  choice to to eat out at.

I visited the restaurant for the first time a few days ago. I ordered the fried chicken with the candied yams, Mac and cheese, and cornbread. I tried the side dishes first and they were amazing. All flavorful and fresh off the stove. The chicken looked amazing and super crispy. The excitement and anticipation was overwhelming. However after all if that built up excitement i was disappointed. The chicken was crispy and hot, but there was no flavor at all. I expected more from a soul food restaurant that is known for their fried chicken.  The last thing I want to taste is bland fried chicken. It was juicy, tender, and crispy.  I just wish it was seasoned. Not the experience I expected, but the sides and the service was good.

Just had dinner here and it was fantastic!! I had the New Orleans Sweet Tea, which was refreshing and delightful, and we shared the deep-fried deviled eggs. I ordered the fried catfish and hushpuppies (I know it sounds crazy, but even the tartar sauce was excellent!), with cheesy grits and okra as my sides. The atmosphere is fun and the service was tip notch -- very friendly and helpful. I can't wait to go back!!
Every single thing I got was soo good and I'm picky lol 10/10 would definitely recommend

Ordered online for a 6:22 pickup - arrived at 6:22 and was told wait another 25mins. Came back at 6:50 and was told to wait another 15-20 to be safe - eventually cancelled my order. Terrible service - KJ should be ashamed.
