So I excited to find this new thru Yelp the reviews were all good and the photos of the food looked even better my son and I made for breakfast and the it looked nice and we were seated quickly ordered waffle and chicken after the waiter said that's what there known for so that's what we ordered we got coffee and it was cold we're like ok np had the food come out and it looked good but you guessed it  it came out cold so who ever rated this spot highly must of got paid or a family member owner I wouldn't come back.
The best soul food spot! We waited an hour but it was well worth the wait. The best fried chicken since moving from North Carolina! If you are craving soul food this is the place. Thank you!

My new favorite soul food restaurant in town. Everything was outstanding! The food, the service, the ambience...great, great, great. Upon arrival, we were greeted immediately as I waited in line to add my name to the waitlist. I was told it would be a 45min-1hour wait, which was good considering the huge crowd outside. We arrived smack in the middle of the "after-church rush hour" on a Sunday afternoon. Speaking of that, I LOVED the fact that the restaurant played gospel music inside as we dined....the good kinda gospel too. To our surprise, we were actually seated within 25-30 minutes. The staff were really good with checking in with customers and making sure that we knew the status of our meals before they arrived to the table. To drink, I ordered the "Up in Smoke." It was tasty, but I do wish that there was less ice, and much more beverage in my glass. As for the food, everything came out pipping hot, and appeared as though a bunch of love & care went into preparing each plate. I truly appreciate a nice presentation when I'm eating. I like that their fried appetizers were each plated with something fresh that you could alternate bites of in between to balance things out and cleanse our palette. We ordered fried deviled eggs, fried green tomatoes, oxtails w/ rice, mac n cheese, fried catfish, charred okra, red beans and rice, and a gigantic cornbread muffin w/ maple cayenne butter. I thoroughly enjoyed everything I tried, but those deviled egg?!!...LAWD they were amazing. We can't wait to come back and try more from their menu!
My son found this place and we tried it because of the interesting menu-AMAZIngGreat portions and tasty soul food-will def be back

I've been to fixins numerous times and every time I come the waiters tell me something completely different about the menu. Either the menu isn't consistent or they don't know the menu. The first time I came they said the the greens had no meat so I ordered them. Then the next time I came they told me the greens do have meat but I could get the red beans and rice. I'm here now and now the server is telling me the red beans and rice has chicken stock -__- I'm jus so confused and wish they could have some consistency with their menu. The food is good but I guess you don't really know what you're getting and that worries me. I also heard they have a vegan menu but have yet to see it. Really hoping this place can get it together so people can actually enjoy their experience and want to come back knowing what they're eating

Was told several times that we will be able to call in orders for takeout after 4pm on the 28th. I called yesterday to place a order for my Mother who is homebound and you still can't place a order for takeout. So I will take it that no convalescent person is good enough to patronize this establishment.

I got food today , I ordered alot. Once I got home I seen one of the fish cut in half so instead of me paying for 2 pieces one if the employees took half.be careful there. We pay for our money worth. I will never go back
Great area, delicious food and very friendly staff. This will be a frequent stop when I come to town to visit family.

Texan here. This food is legit. I have not had any other around here I would call legit. South? Nope. Sandra Dees? Nope. Urban Roots? Tasty, but no. Anyway every single thing I've had here, including cocktails are BOMB! Great service, super friendly and just plain good, delicious food. So so yummy and the real deal!

The food was average...nothing to rave about but the service needs to get better; The hostess was like 'a deer with the headlights on' when I asked her about the wait time and the bartender asked for our order 3 times!
Amazing food! Friendly staff. I love going here cause I know the food will always be good!
Delicious food for a very reasonable price. Their service was great. I would definitely come here again. Their food def hit the soul

Cool spot. I live near in oak park and was able to walk over for a late bite. The hostess was very kind. My server, JC, suggested the deviled eggs as an appetizer and they were great. Friendly, warm atmosphere. Good prices too.

If you are looking for legit soul food with collard greens, corn bread, mac and cheese, catfish, chicken and waffles - this place is it! I've been dreaming of a Roscoes to open up here in NoCal but absolutely not this place is 100x better. The waffles are soft, thin, and some crisp and glaze it with syrup and it is perfect. Let's talk about their fried chicken. This is probably one of the best and I mean best fried chicken in the planet. 
I was even thinking this place should get some air time on the food network or something. 
They must marinate the chicken for hours on hours because the chicken is infused with flavor. The chicken is so crispy with each bite, my my goodness! 
It's amazing to see Kevin Johnson really engage with his customers and make sure his customers are taken care  and served right. You can also tell his staff enjoy working there. We've always had great service even during a packed Sunday brunch. 
We ordered togo recently during the stay at home order to get our fix! 
Can't wait to dine in again.
They have my order to door dash on accident.. Would not give me any discount for waiting but did give me a free peach cobbler. They did remake my order. Service was ok.
This place.......Sac's ONLY real soul food joint!!!!!!! That peach cobbler the shrimp and grits

So luckily my tinder date cancelled (because I started my period ) because it gave me the opportunity to come get a chicken sandwich. I've been wanting to try this before it opened. I was already in a bad mood so I was ready for negativity. The chicken sandwich was seriously incredible. I know this is gross but I literally moaned after every bite. I added a lot of the house hot sauce. I'll be dreaming about this until I can come back. Fucking bravo!

We ordered online. Super great service during COVID. Thank you Nicki! 
The food was super delicious as well. The burgers were delicious and the oxtail was so great. We want to go back asap.

Five stars for the combination of food and service provided at lunch. I ordered the two piece, dark meat chicken meal with greens and potato salad. The chicken had a great crispy exterior and juicy center. Greens were flavorful and not overly acidic. Potato salad was good too. I enjoyed my beer from Oak Park Brewing as well. Service was excellent and the food came out quickly. I wasn't in a rush for lunch, but I could see this being helpful if I was ordering food during a workday. Looking forward to my next visit soon

Had southern fried chicken - superb!  Sides were red beans and rice, cold slaw, potato salad and sweet potato.  We shared banana pudding for desert.  Everything was outstanding.  All staff were polite, attentive and competent.
This has to be one of the best restaurants in the Sacramento area.

I gave 3 stars for several reasons.. But let me first say that fish, mac & cheese and Ice tea was sooo good!! Oh and Service was good to! How ever the greens was hard as hell.. They need to be cooked longer, much longer! My 1 number one problem is for $18 you don't get hardly nothing! You get 1 piece of fish and then the sides come in these little dishes & to add insult to injustice (lol) the little dishes aren't even filled up! COME ON NOW! for 20 bucks you should at least get a good portion. Get rid of those little dishes and give people some food! Another thing TAKE OUT! That's where your going to see your money!! Kevin you should jusy hire me!

It is so hard to find great soul food especially when it is held to an higher standard since my family is from New Orleans. But Fixins Soul Kitchen has raised the bar for me. It felt like eating home cooking from my granny, aunts and moms! The food was superb!

This place is amazing. Great service and great food. Everything I have tried I have really enjoyed. The mac and cheese is probably my favorite "fixins" offered. The grits are sooooo good, with or without cheese. I've also had the yams, greens, and red beans and rice which I also enjoyed. The catfish is really good and flavorful. The waffles are amazing. The fried chicken is good and is seasoned well. I've been 3 times now and am itching to get back to try the other menu offerings.

The food is good, the service can definitely be better in store and over the phone. The fact that we cannot order for pickup is ridiculous its an inconvenience for people in a hurry or on the way to work etc. That should be an option for customers especially since this location is new. Bad attitudes from some staff members.
Come here often. Solid and consistent quality. Could use a bit less salt overall. Charred Okra collar greens potato salad

I cannot day enough about how amazing Fixins was to eat at!! Nikki G was our server, she was amazing! The food was freaking out of this world! I got the catfish platter, it was seriously perfect. The fish was cooked perfectly, the Mac and cheese was delicious, and the collard greens were amazing. Every single COVID precaution was followed, inside and out of the restaurant. Would 100% recommend this place to anyone. Portland, OR would be a great place to open another location!

Loved the smothered pork chops. I was a little skeptical about the pickled onion at first since I've never tried them before. Glad I tried them. Very good with the pork chops. I had greens and yams as my sides and they were good as well. Will definitely hit this spot up again when in Sacramento. Even the gear is nice. I purchased a hat that cost more than my meal lol. Had to do outdoor dining but didn't mind, it was set up nice. I can't wait to enjoy indoor dining with friends.

Called at 844am to try and reserve a table for 25 people. Hostess on the phone Cathy was very unfriendly, gave an automatic "no" answer with an awful uninterested tone. I tried speaking with manager Brian , who did not even introduce himself and he was just as useless. The wait time when I called was zero and he predicted that the wait time at noon would be an hour to two for 25 ppl. When I asked , but isnt that why I am calling ahead, he said they dont take reservations and it would be difficult to seat 25 ppl. Yelp waitlist is still "broken". Very unfortunate for the business owners to lose business because your people refuse to accommodate and try to be creative.  Most places appreciates a call ahead when it involves a big group.  But not this place.

I happened to be there on the grand opening night.  They were very busy and for that reason, some of my comments may be directly rated to this fact.

I was seated at one of the tall tables which enabled me to speak with others enjoying their dinner.  However, the sound level in the restaurant needs some attention.  It is extremely noisy and not conducive to carrying on a conversation.  My first recommendation is to turn off or lower the speakers that blast music.  

My waiter was very busy but good.  I had the fried green tomatoes as an appetizer and the main dish of fried chicken with red beans and rice, greens and a side order of mac and cheese.

The fried green tomatoes were fried to perfection and there was an ample amount to share.  However, the coating was bland and needs some salt or other spices.  The sauce was good but a very small amount was provided.

The fried chicken was outstanding.  It is the best in Sacramento!  The chicken was moist, not greasy and had a wonderful, tasty crust that was not too thick.  Excellent.

The red beans and rice could have used a little more beans and a little less rice.  The beans were somewhat bland and sticky.  There was a lack of depth to the beans.

The greens were cooked well and tasty.  They had a sweetness to them rather than the bitter taste that is sometimes found in greens.  The only comment I would make is that they lacked the "smoky" element that is found in greens from either the hamhock or smoked turkey.  I wondered if these were meatless greens?

The real disappointment was the mac and cheese, which was served in a little dutch oven.  The top of the mac and cheese had a flavorful baked cheese crust.  But that was essentially the end of the cheese.  The macaroni deeper in the dish was dry, lacked cheese and had no flavor other than the macaroni.  This dish needs some work! 

All the food had good presentation and the staff was committed to making this a good dining experience.  First night jitters...likely.  With some tweaking of the current dishes and an improvement in the mac and cheese, this could become a chain of restaurants like KJ said that evening.  

I will be coming back!

We went to the soft opening, and while there were a few issues that were minor, the restaurant is way overdue for Sacramento. The food was fabulous. We will DEFINITELY go back because we intend to have everything on the menu. I give Fixins a "2 Thumbs Up

Has that authentic soul food taste you look for, you feel like you need a nap after eating here. Literally never had anything here that was bad. Everything tastes amazing. I'm from the south (Atl and VA) so I know my way around this style of food and boy do they nail it. Great chicken, grits, grilled okra to die for, deviled eggs bomb dot.com

Attended one of the soft opening events and was so impressed! The fried chicken was juicy, flavorful and the perfect pair for the waffles. The ox tail was out of this world- fall off the bone tender. The biscuits were also excellent. Can't wait for the grand opening!

Everything has been so good.  My fav is the smothered chicken - if you are hungry and don't want to skip on quality THIS is your plate.  Then order the red velvet cake and you will be in heaven.  
Don't get me started on the excellent sweat tea or koolaid (I think they have a kid making it because it's so much koolaid purity there's no way an adult made it)

am so dang upset!!!! with this place am going too start off  we doordashed oir dinner saturday night we got the ox tails  with one side of greens an smother pork chops dinnee with 2 sides one yams an greens the we got the ruth fixin witch pick 3 sidesan one peach cobbler $85 later food comes my husband an i couldn't wait too taste our food was thinking a soul food place in our area the p was going too be off the chain ..... didn't realize it was about too close by the time our doordash got too use so we get our food out the bag an i was like wtf my porch chops burnt the sides was damm near empty . tired calling them sunday couldn't get a person on the phone so i emailed them no response  so that was $85 down the drain, an they know damm well most of the old timer of the p are not going too pay that high ass price on soul food so they set up for the new people moving in too the p  ! only 1 star because it won't let me post without giving the one star .

Super good!!! We drive 1 hr from Reno Nv get some fixins! All of our experiences have been good for the exception of one time where we had to wait maybe 30 minutes to buy one of they're hats (i think the hosts forgot lol) but it was super crazy so its okay. We will definitely be going back regardless

Today, is my mom's 79th birthday. It is our intention to celebrate every birthday going forward; the angels spared her from a head on collision back in April. We are big fans of Kevin Johnson and really wanted to support his new venture.
If you're expecting any kind of customer service, that's not a priority, at all. Fixin's does not take reservations, so we left our name and telephone number with the host. We were told it would be 15 mins. 20 mins past we checked-in, 30 mins, 45 mins... After an hour, the host had not had our name down, she knew who we were. So instead of seating immediately we would have to wait another 15 mins. The hosts was completely incompetent and shouldn't have anything to do with customer service.
Order to go, that's there number one priority! We left

My husband ,daughter and I came here on a rainy Saturday around 2pm. It wasn't busy at all. We wanted a booth so we waited 5min for them to clean one off. Service was great and so was ambience. My daughter got the Mac n cheese and drumstick which she crushed and it was good. We also got her a pink kool aid which was great also. My husband and myself got the chicken dinners which comes with 2 sides. I got red  beans n rice and collard greens and hubby got Mac n cheese and candied yams. The collard greens were too crunchy I like mine really soft and the red beans n rice lacked some seasoning. The mac n cheese and game were great. And the CHICKEN omg so good i love the crispy skin it's so good and the butter biscuit is really good also... the only reason they only  got 4 stars is. We ordered 2 bar drinks which didn't come until  we were half way through our meals, also the drinks were still warm like it didn't have enough time to get cold with the ice...but they were good just warm .AND the waitress forgot the cookie that came with the kids meal which we had to remind her but it was cool.the cookie was real good though. Overall we will definitely be back. Just prob won't be ordering bar drinks again.

Delicious!!! I can't complain about anything. The service was great. The fried chicken was seasoned and cooked perfect.  The greens were seasoned perfect, the Mac and cheese had the perfect combination of cheeses, the gravy was flavorful with the right amount of balance, the yams were just the right combination of butter , sweet, salt, and cinnamon. The margarita had a good balance. The biscuit with the grape butter (never had grape butter) is delicious.  The space is very nice and comfortable. This establishment is well done.

I really wanted to support this restaurant. It's good for the community and it drives people to see other businesses in the neighborhood. The concept of this restaurant is simple: it centers around fried chicken, bar and a cute al fresco dining. We've been to this place twice and it was always busy. No complaints there. That's good for business. The second time we came here was just plain disappointing. They were busy as usual. Our waiter was nice, he got us waters and took our order right after. And that was the last time we saw him until he came back 35 minutes later with the check and to ask if we wanted dessert. The problem was we never got our food to begin with. Not once did he come back to check in with us. Maybe it was our fault for giving them the benefit of the doubt. We gave them a bunch of excuses: Oh they must be short staffed. Oh they have a private event outside. We'll just wait patiently. 

I remember the chicken being good the first time that's why we came back. But should anyone be subjected to this kind of service?
Great fried chicken! The look-aids (yes, they make adult versions as well) are delicious. Try the Mac and cheese, you'll thank me later.

First the ambiance and decor are modern but homey. Loved the decor inside.  The portions, food quality, and service here are all on-point. The catfish, catfish nuggets, and chicken wings are great. I had the smothered chicken that was cooked perfectly.

I had attempted to place an online order for pick up and the payment wouldn't take for some reason so unfortunately I had to go to the restaurant and order in person. Aubree took my order and helped ensure it was complete in a timely manner so I didn't have to wait so long. The time waiting was pleasurable. Was even offered something to drink while I waited. Once order was complete I added on and Julian and aubree made sure it was not an issue and promptly rushed to complete the additional order. Their customer service was beyond exceptional even during a slight rush and the food was amazing as well.
Oxtails & peach sangria was 10/10 , came at a pretty good time because there was no wait.

Was in town for a school event and stopped here for lunch. It did not disappoint. I had the chicken and waffles with a side of mac and cheese (all for about $15). Great food and even better service! If I lived closer I'd probably be a regular here!

Great food, I especially like the catfish. I also like the greens an potato salad. I haven't tried it myself but I know that people really enjoy having the kool aide. Oh also really like the fried deviled eggs.

The absolute BEST soul food in California, hands down!! My favorites are the shrimp and grits, the cat fish and the chicken and waffles, but I like and have tasted just about everything on the menu, and love it! 

KJ is the owner and he usually comes around to all the tables to say hello and thanks you for coming. He is such a great guy. Mrs. Johnson, KJs Mother is pretty wonderful too! The Chefs, and all the wait staff are the most friendly, accommodating people ever! They all have top notch customer service skills. THE BEST!

They do follow COVID regulations. There's a small patio area if you don't mind waiting (wait time usually an hour or two). The atmosphere and experience is so nice and the staff is great! Definitely recommend!!

My experience with Fixins was perfect. The wait was a little long, but on a Sunday after church, I expected it would be. The staff was friendly. KJ came out and greeted everyone. The staff brought out water to those waiting to be seated. Once we were seated, we were grated by or server, Onesimo. He was a doll!! He was ON IT. Even if something we ordered was taking a little long (it was busy) he kept us up to date with what was going on. He checked on us often, but wasn't over the top. The food...ahh the food... I had the shrimp and grits and a waffle... Well two... To drink I had the lavender lemon drop. I also had some of the sweet tea (grown up style). Everything was delicious. There was so much flavor. The grits were creamy, the gravy was amazing and the shrimp was cooked perfectly.  My friends had the catfish, both also had the collard greens, then one beans and rice, then yams.  I didn't try them, but all of our plates were completely empty once we were done.

If I could have given 3.5 stars I would have. 3 stars for ambiance...another one of those wide open cool looking mod-industrial spaces that are unfortunately deafening to the point of having to shout across the table to converse because of all the hard surfaces. Not my favorite thing. I should mention, for reference, we  were there on a Monday at 2 within first 6 weeks of grand opening. 
However, 4 stars (my first visit) for the food fried chicken very delicious...Arrived hot, fully cooked (have had under done at other places ) and well seasoned. Red beans and rice yummy, tenderand nicely seasoned but leaving room for additions of hot sauce or whatever for the diner. Greens had too much vinegar for me but that is strictly personal preference...I did eat them all. And then for all important biscuits...DELICIOUS! They were not too large, fluffy and hot. Served with two types of season butter but none needed for me. Great on their own.
My companions also had fried chicken but other sides that we gave solid thumbs up too were grits and potato salad. 
 I look forward to another visit so I can try other menu items but may not dine in unless it is a not too busy time.
Do love seeing a new great place in the Oak Park area. Thanks former Mayor Kevin Johnson!!!

I decided to meet my husband in Sac for dinner and we decided on Fixins and we're both very happy we did! When we got to the restaurant at around 7 on a Thursday night it was packed. Despite this we were seated in about 15-20 minutes. Once seated our waitress came to our table right away with water. For our meal we decided to share an order of the chicken and waffles with a side of Mac and cheese as well as a side of grits with cheese. Our entire meal was truly fantastic. The chicken was perfectly fried and juicy, the waffle was delicious especially with the cinnamon butter. The Mac and cheese might have been some of the best Mac and cheese I've ever had and the grits were delicious as well. I might have felt like I needed to have a salad for every meal after eating here, but it was totally worth it. I can't wait to go back again and try other items on their menu, though it will be tempting to just get the same thing over again! If you like southern style dining then you'll love Fixins!

It was a long wait, but it was so worth it I can't even knock off a star. Biscuits. Delicious. Collards and turkey necks. Delicious. Mac and cheese. Delicious. And oh my word the chicken. Juicy crispy tasty. I left stuffed and happy and took home leftovers.

Food is good, but it can be a little to Rich or Salty at times.  The last time I was there it was crazy guetto. They had perfanity music playing very loud, it did nothing for the resturants atmosphere. if u take out, or like really rich food, This place is for you!

I was recommended to Fixings from a good friend and it did not disappoint. The service was great, our server Alanna (sorry if I misspelled the name) was the best,  the beverages were on point and the food was delicious and filling. The outside area is set up really nicely and the music added the perfect touch to the experience.
This place never disappoints. Just had the catfish and some fried chicken.....perfection!  Chloe was our server and knew exactly what to suggest. Bottom line,,,,,"I'll be back".
The best fried chicken in Sacramento.  Locally owned and operated.  Highly recommend.  The food is good and the service is great.

Great food, amazing people awesome experience.
Ordered the 2 piece chicken dinner I think it is awesome that they ask you which pieces you would like I had a breast and a thigh.  Chicken was crisp and juicy.  We ordered a appetizer of wings those were great, I'm not an egg person but we ordered the deep fried deviled eggs and everyone enjoyed them.  The Red velvet cake is amazing.  
I will be back.

My new favorite spot.  The food is delicious.  The restaurant is very clean and spacious.  Staff warm and friendly.  I had oxtails on Saturday and today waffles & fried chicken, fried green tomatoes & peach cobbler.  Yummmmmmyyyy.  Excellent atmosphere.

Just, WOW! If you have not given Fixins Soul Kitchen a try, you're missing out on some of the best home cooking in Sacramento. My roommate and I gave their takeout a try... it did not disappoint! 
We went for the family meal to try out all of their staples... 8 pieces of chicken, macaroni and cheese, candied yams and 4 biscuits with blueberry butter and crystals hot sauce. We picked up the take out around 4:30 PM to bring home, staff were very friendly, pulled the entire order to go over it with me before they processed payment and it came out to $50 including tip. Ended up reheating lightly in the oven around 6:30 PM for dinner time and it tasted like it had just been prepared. 
Chicken was perfectly breaded and the crunch was what dreams are made of. Macaroni and cheese was ooey gooey cheesey goodness. Candied yams taste exactly like CHRISTMAS, if you need some instant nostalgia go for this delicious side. 
I legit feel bad for people that have not tried this spot yet! Do your self a favor and initiate some self care and let Fixins soothe all of your troubles... one bite at a time.

So happy to finally sit down at a restaurant. The food is absolutely amazing!! I had the fried chicken with Mac n cheese, collard greens, and a biscuit. One of my friends had the so spicy chicken sandwich and another, the fried catfish which I was luckily enough to try. Those were also both so good. The service was great! Very attentive staff. The owner Kevin Johnson came by to check on us and everyone else who was seated. That was pretty awesome! Also, I got a cocktail that was only $6. Very affordable. I can't wait to come back.

I've been twice now. Once on a Saturday and then again this Friday night. My first experience was that the food was great but the waiter seemed overwhelmed.  Tonight the food was not as good   but was okay however the waitress was not at all attentive. I had to keep asking her for things that she maybe should have known to give like napkins with finger foods and a glass of water. It's still better then a lot of restaurants in its category though.

What a fantastic new restaurant! Everything about our evening was amazing. All of the staff were so friendly and fun and our server Nate was top notch! The atmosphere of Fixins is welcoming and oh yeah...the food. There were five of us in our party and we intentionally ordered different items so we could sample a bit of everything! Not one dish disappointed...hot chicken sandwich, chicken and waffles, fried chicken, catfish, fried green tomatoes...and all of the Fixins: collard greens, Mac and cheese, grits, yams. It was all delicious! And finally, make sure to try the fun cocktails (several involving one of five of their kool aid flavors!) I'll definitely be back here again soon. Way to go, Kevin and Brian!

I really like what Kev has done here with this food. He put Sacramento on the map again. His food is like the gourmet of soul food.  He goes the extra steps in trying to make sure his food delivers.  The Oxtails are savory and delicious!  His Mac and cheese good. The chicken is on point .

I really didn't know what to expect in terms of the food outside of it being soul food....The service was absolutely fantastic and the food was nothing short of delicious! The atmosphere is lively and it was just a good experience altogether! Soul food restaurant's usually don't live up to their name! I ordered the ox tails and shrimp and grits! Omg literally the best I've ever had! And that is coming from a person who considers himself a food connoisseur! I had to wait for an hour to get Seated but it was well worth the wait! Hands-down this is the best soul food in town! I will definitely be returning!
Food was excellent. The vibe in the restaurant was amazing. Definitely worth the wait.
Yummy yummy food! I like me some fried chicken and I am partial to another place in Sacramento so I was very pleased with my meal. I will definitely be back .

"Fixins, you have to try Fixins!" I feel is all my husband and I kept hearing as we are a huge lover of good soul food. My soul I feel is comprised of fried chicken and Mac n cheese. Once the city got clearance to start having patrons visit restaurants again while following the new precautions my husband and I visited Fixins first for brunch. This was our first time and let me tell you I was not disappointed. Once we showed up they provided us with disposable menus. I noticed how they had markers on the floor where you stand when you're picking up take out. Also, the music was off the hoook! I literally sang the whole time which I was so happy about because I wanted a "vibe" while eating brunch I mean who doesn't?!? I ordered the chicken + waffles and my husband ordered the smothered pork chops w/ Mac n cheese, cheesy grits, and a side of gravy. Also, we ordered some fries for an appetizer and I got a red kool-aid. That first sip brought so many feels as I haven't had kool-aid since I was a kid. (I even ordered one to go!)  When our meal came out I noticed that they had brought me chicken wings instead of a breast. I let my waiter know and within seconds this heavenly chicken breast came out. The chicken was soooo freakin bomb! The perfect crunch, the brine, and all the love. As you can imagine everything was amaziiinnnnng. The only thing we weren't too thrilled about was the cheesy grits. However, we can't wait to go back. Another cool thing was Kevin Johnson was actually there and he stopped by our table while my husband and I were playing dominoes. If you're looking for a great soul food place be sure to stop at Fixins!

WARNING- prices may vary.
No doubt of it.  The food is delicious and generous.  We had been 4 times and wanted to share the experience with others, so we ordered online so we could share  the food with friends in our house.  Granted it was on a Friday night.  The takeout menu asks for 35-40 minutes to pickup.  We even received a text message confirming the order was ready in 30 minutes.  However, It took 81 minutes!  AND....,the prices "jumped" 25%, from $40 to $50 for a family meal, from $18 to $21 for shrimp n grits.  The other items on our order were also increased between the online menu and the price charged!  Again, the food IS delicious, but......just saying.

We will likely keep coming back, but .....cautiously.  Maybe it was a Friday night thing.  Maybe it was a one time thing.  Our dinner party was a success because we had lots of pre-dinner snacks and drinks.  Did I mention, the food is delicious?
Great service great food!! Black owned and operated!! Great for families on a date or just hungry by yourself!!

Love the ambiance n da hood.  My party's food was just ok!  We didn't appreciate extra salt tossed in the bacon & sugar in the greens (wt...)!  You know a sista is running from stroke n diabetes.  I gotta 5 star you cause I will be back!!!

Every soul food spot in Sacramento has been a disappointment, except for this one. Thank you for stepping up on food quality. 
5 stars for that fried chicken even though it was slightly too salty. The texture was perfect and juicy. 
Customer service at the bar could have been better. It felt as if we were bothering her if we asked for something but it was busy so whatever. 
I would suggest installing sound absorbers to soak up the echoes but other than that food was tasty. I'm coming back for that fried chicken.
Amazing ox tails. Who's grandma is hiding the recipes...one of my fav local restaurants.
Awesome good customer great. Manager Brian is very attentive. Owner Kevin Johnson seems to speak to each table. The food was hot and yummy. I  will definitely be back.

Delicious! I do not play about my soul food and neither do they! My go to is the catfish! Sheesh! Always crisssspy and fresh! I make bomb mac and cheese so i need the real deal if im eating it anywhere else and they do it to perfection! Potato salad is the closest I get to my grandma's and she's the G.O.A.T. Chicken&waffles will not disappoint! Greens tenda! And to top it of the bar is making great drinks including spiked kool aid! Great clean atmosphere! Service is always exceptional and thats KEY!

I started coming here last year and have loved it ever since. The chicken and waffles is my favorite meal, and my partner who is vegetarian normally gets the Mrs. Ruth's Plate so they can have vegan options as sides. With a great environment, amazing service, good music, and awesome food, fixins is a go to in my household
can only say good things about this place. food is legit southern soul food. been here twice. once dine in and once take home. was happy both times. man o man is the food good

I have been wanting to visit this spot for a while now, and I'm glad I finally had the chance, because it was so amazing! First, the vibe of this spot is real cool. Nothing fake or corny, just a nice place, good ambiance, some ultra hi-def tvs at the bar, and a nice patio. First thing I see in the menu let me know we were at the right place. Deep fried deviled eggs. 2 words for ya, Hell Yeah! I took the liberty of ordering that bad boy right away a long with a couple of waters. Rolling through the menu we came up to our first problem.  We wanted everything. How do you decide, when you want ALL the things? So me and home girl decided to split a 2 piece chicken and waffles, and then each get a main dish. So, I go with the Oxtails and rice, i also get a side of potato salad, and cheesy grits. Homegirl got the catfish, with a side of okra and mac and cheese.  We finish ordering and out comes the deviled eggs. Eggcellent timing!The batter on the egg was a Light crisp and the little salad in the middle was tasty too. Once the rest of the food came out we were in heaven! The oxtails were an amazing size and quality, and they were cooked to perfection. Soooooo good!!! The chicken was juicy, tasty, tender and the breading was crisp without being overly cut your mouth crisp. The cheesy  grits were so creamy and fantastic I can't even. The mac and cheese, amazing real cheesy goodness! The catfish had this wonderful breading! And the okra... lemme just say, I have never liked okra, the texture the taste has never been for me until I found out here at fixins just how delicious okra could be. Do yourself a favor and head on over. It may be your first time, but you won't want it to be your last time.
Went here for the first time today. I had oxtails with cheesy grits. Hubby had smothered pork chops with collard greens. They were both so good. Will definitely return here.

Love this place! Big portions and really delicious chicken and sides. Their mac 'n cheese was made with a really unique cheese with a kick to it. It's cheesy without being too rich--really great savory dish. Their fried chicken was so delicious!!!

Leave your diet at the door; this place feeds your soul. Tonight we celebrated my daughters birthday and she chose Fixens for her bday celebration.Let me start off with first impressions. The restaurant itself is modern. tastefully decorated with wonderful art , a gorgeous outdoor patio, and seating that lends itself to conversation with other diners next you. You are greeted by , in my experience, two friendly hosts who seem genuinely happy to see you. I meet my daughter at the bar where she is happily engaged  in conversation with the other patrons around her and the bartenders, Asia and Dee. We had such a great time at the bar we decided to eat there instead of getting a table. I ordered the chicken and waffles, my daughter, the fried chicken and sides. Oh... my.... God. People! Let me tell you about this! First my chicken and waffles was served with some kind of grape jelly infused butter that was to die for. The syrup was served warm.. not microwave warm, warm like it was taken from the stove, warm. The waffle was light, and delicious.
But that fried chicken... that chicken was in-cred-ible. Fried to perfection, it was moist, flavorful and delicious. My daughter had the Mac and Cheese and the red beans and rice as her sides. The Mac and cheese was baked, of course , and you could taste the sharp cheddar cheese bakes around the elbow macaroni . The red beans and rice was as good as I have ever had. The beans were flavorful with just enough heat to give them the extra flavor. The biscuit was light and fluffy and I want to eat a basket of them on a Sunday morning. Have I mentioned the corn bread with the jalapeño maple butter? No? Do I even need to tell you how delicious it was? How about you just try it for yourself?  You can thank me later. Just when my daughter and I thought we couldn't eat another bite, the sweet gals from behind the bar sent some peach cobbler to go. Well we sat right there and promptly ripped the lid off to try it. Ok guys- It was still piping hot from the oven and it was better than my moms ( sorry mom).  A beautiful blend of flaky pie crust, buttery,cinnamony peaches all warm and delicious. So much better than birthday cake.
Fixens is something special. It's a wonderful gathering place where good people enjoy great food. If you are lucky enough to have Asia and Dee as your servers, then I promise you, you are in for a great dining experience.
I'm already planning my next visit.

The food was good! The atmosphere was modern with the brick walls. I sat at the bar so my wait time was not long. The Mac and cheese was bomb but it seems like the food is prepped in advance. I'm definitely going back for more fixins.

I don't really like fish but I love their catfish  also notable were their greens, fried chicken, and pimento-cheese dip . Didn't really enjoy their take on gumbo (gravy-like with not too much sustenance). Friendly, helpful service. Popular place, can be a wait, get there before you're already hungry.

I have been here twice and it had been worth the wait time each time! I would have given a 5 but the service was a little inconsistent. On our first visit we had an amazing server, second time or server was not so great. In fact the server from our first visit ended up checking on us and helping us get our servers attention. I wish I would have taken down her name she is awesome!
Food was good I had the fried chicken with greens and yams and my lady had fried fish both good plates will try shrimp and grits next and ox tails !!!
I had smothered chicken ,collard greens and cheeses grits. I wanted to lick the plate. Best food in Sacramento. Kudos to KJ for the great service and contribution to the renewal to Oak Park.

We found Fixins through Yelp and were so excited that we did.  The food is really good, the fried chicken has a nice crunch and love the involvement of Kool Aid.  Also, the dill ranch is the best ranch I've ever had.

i ordered the $19 fish plate comes with two sides 3 hush puppies and one piece of fish. seriously? a $20 meal and you cant afford to throw in one more piece of fish? i can get the same shit feom long johns for way cheaper. disrespectful. please just throw in 2 pieces of fish instead of one id ur gonna charge $20. if you cant afford it then maybe just say it or omit the hush puppies. the fish is good and for the price we deserve two pieces not just one. for that even tho it was tasty i give one star because i value my hard earned money i can make two pieces of fried catfish at home for less.

This is an adorable addition to Sacramento's ever growing food scene.  This place was everything everyone promised it would be.  The ambiance was lovely!  And what the service lacked, the food definitely made up for because it was AMAZING!  We were a party of 12, so we tried a little of everything and there were no complaints at all.  Everything was great!  We would definitely come back!  Perhaps, not on a Saturday, as it was a bit busy and our wait time was excessive.  But all things considered, for a brand new business, in the first few weeks of opening, they're killing it!  I think this will be one of the hottest spots in town in no time at all if they stay consistent in the kitchen, because hands down, the food was great!

We loved it and even though we had to wait in car line .. the workers .. including our former Mayor and NBA star Kevin Johnson ( who was running orders to cars and working like it was NBA Final game ) the wait was ez and worth it

My husband and I had never been here before, so when we were seated and not waited on or acknowledged for 30 minutes, we tried to stay positive. 
After seeing people who were seated after us eating, we asked a passing server if we could be waited on. 
By that time, at least six employees including a manager had walked by our table multiple times. We had no waters and our menus still in front of us, so it was clear we hadn't been helped. 
The food was good when we finally got it, but our experience was overshadowed by what I would *politely* describe as a weird experience overall.
(I messaged the above to the restaurant when we got home, and NEVER received a response! BAWK! just opened--great food & service.)

You will likely have a bit of a wait, but it's worth it!  My boyfriend and I have been here several times now and each time has been consistently great. The food is delicious! The oxtail is tender and flavorful, the fried chicken is bomb and the macaroni and cheese is almost better than my bf's! The staff is warm, friendly and very attentive. 
A great addition to the neighborhood!

Came on a whim after early Sunday morning mass. My daughter and I were greeted by Kevin Johnson and thanked us for coming in. Hostess was pleasant, sat us down immediately. The first waitress Aliyah, same name as my daughter was extremely nice! The breakfast selection was great... my husband and I ordered chicken and waffles and my girls had the pancake sandwich. We ordered the deviled eggs! I loved the deviled eggs... it was GOOD as well as the chicken and waffles! We just went to a similar place in Long Beach.. hands down this place was great! Great service, great people! Customers were friendly too, saying hi and smiling! Cute trendy place, loved the subway tile in the bathroom, haha! We will come again with our friends for dinner!
Food was amazing wait was quick for how packed it was. Loved that they had music to drown out my 2 yr old. Will most definitely be going back

Great atmosphere. Great food. I got the oxtails that comes with rice and a side (I choose collard greens) so delicious. My mom got the fried catfish with the creamed corn and red beans &rice. So flaky and well seasoned. My hubby got the chicken and waffles which he loved with red beans & rice and Max N cheese. We didn't enjoy the Mac. It was a little dry and under seasoned but everything else was A+. Can't wait to go back and try more options

We stopped in Sacramento for the afternoon and needed lunch. Thank you Yelpers for directing us here! We got the restaurant's history from Auntie Pearl-- she's a treasure! The shrimp and grits were fantastic; I only half jokingly asked for the recipe. The collard greens were a little bland, but still tasty. My husband is still talking about the candied yams three days later.

This was my first time here. The staff was friendly, the place was clean. Unfortunately my chicken was raw. The waiter came and apologized, and I think he was the manager came and apologized. They cooked new chicken for us. By the time the chicken came out we were done with our meal. A little disappointing. I think they should have comped our meal. Maybe we will have to try it again.
Good and authentic soul food. Service is good. I would definitely go back for more. A Must try!
Love the chicken sandwich and Biscuits and gravy. Not sold on the cool aid pickles yet.

This restaurant is the best I've had in all of Sac & Placer counties, no joke! While we were waiting, the sweetest woman, Auntie Pearl, who I assume is the owner, came to where we were sitting outside and thanked us for coming. She told us it was a special day for them - today is their 2 year anniversary! They survived 2020, and from everything I could tell, they not only survived, but are thriving! I had the shrimp & grits & red beans & rice, my bf had the oxtails & fried chicken w/ mac & cheese and my daughter had fried chicken & mac & cheese. Let me assure you, this will be the best mac & cheese you've ever had!! Every single thing we had was absolutely heavenly! The flavors were perfectly balanced with the perfect amount of spice! You can taste the love in their food, truly! In addition to amazing food, the service was phenomenal! Auntie Pearl came by to say hi and check on us a couple more times, and our server, whose name escapes me (I'm so sorry!) was very attentive and so sweet! And finally, the entire vibe was so welcoming and chill, everyone there was smiling & having a great time, customers & staff alike. One thing I will say, only come here if you're bringing good vibes bc Auntie Pearl and her entire staff deserve nothing less! I can't wait to go back!

Such a great place to go in Sacramento. Everything was delicious and the service was great. I ordered the Fried Chicken with Mac and Cheese, and I was not disappointed. The vibes in the location were great also with fun art to look at and a happy buzzing staff. Their whole menu was thoughtful and provided a unique location for folks in the Sacramento area to have true soul food.

Well I gave it an 3 star because they still have some work to do!!! We waited for 30 minutes which was fine..our waiter was nice..but when it came for my food to come ( I had the smothered chicken with gray) I received it with no rice, got the yams and Mac and cheese.. didn't know I had to order the rice separate... ok anytime you fix anything smothered with gravy it has to have rice with it or mashed potatoes!!!! And the yams is not candid and the Mac and cheese is just noodles with cheese!!! I'm from the South and this wasn't Soul Food!! They have to put some seasoning to the food!!! The yams needs more sugar to them!!! My cousins chicken was pink!!! Red beans and rice had no seasoning the biscuits was like an brick!!! I can go on and on!!! They needs some work!!! The only thing that was good was the drinks!!!!
My first time there and the atmosphere was very inviting. The food so tasteful.. I think of the taste constantly and can't wait to visit again
Great Food, Awesome Atmosphere, Nice Staff, Good Drinks, Comfortable and Relaxing place with  Friends,  Family or Date Night

We went right a rush time, very crowded. We were forgot about for a few then the service picked up. We ordered the deviled eggs....( the best thing we had ). Everything else we ordered was good as well but nothing rememberable that i would want to order again. I will definitely visit again and try something different with each visit. I appreciate this establishment and the location.

Currently one the my top soul food spots !! My boyfriend and I came in and were seated right away. We really enjoyed the energy of the our server, JC. She took really good care of us. When we saw the menu we wanted to try EVERYTHING, but being that it was just us two we had to limit our choices. Tip: bring a bigger group of people to share all the dishes! I had to try the red kool-aid, and just as I remember as a kid- good pure sugar!! What else did you expect? The fried green tomatoes were out of this world! Probably his favorite dish. The batter was perfectly crisp and very flavorful. Now on the to the main dishes! We tried the fried catfish which comes with two side dishes of your choice. We tried the collard greens: a bit tangy with a kick:) and the grits! Wow those grits were amazing especially after adding the housemade jelly butter!! Second dish: two piece chicken and waffle. AMZING! The waffle alone was great, it almost reminded me of a churro. And the chicken. The CHICKEN!! It was the juiciest best fried chicken ever!!! Must try! What I was most impressed with was the housemade Louisiana hot sauce!!! I swear I wanted to take that bottle home. But they will be selling it in the near future. Last but not least, make sure to save room for dessert! We had the peach cobbler- it was wonderful!! I wish it had two scoops of ice cream though:) We will definitely be coming back soon!!!!

I love this place and I love the food ! No complaints there . But tonight the service me and my family received ruin my love for the place . We were "helped" by a server named Christen S .... As soon as she came and presented herself and started to take our order we noticed the sarcasm and rudeness in her tone and responses . She rushed us to order , very rude and rarely checked up on us . She took super long to bring us what we needed and her vibe was just terrible. On top of that she messed up on some of the food brought to our table . If it wasn't for the great food and drinks I would definitely give this place 0 stars ... service makes a huge difference on the experience of a place . If you come eat here make sure she's not your server .
Went with coworkers- we all ordered something different- smiles all around!!! We all can't wait to go back! Plus wait staff on point!!!
Beat place I've ever been! The only bad part is the wait but man I have been here a few times and it has always been great!
Exceptional food.  Got the smothered chicken, Mac and cheese and okra with bacon.  Everything was absolutely superb!
Came here on a Sunday afternoon, the service was great and the fried fish sandwich was awesome. Will definitely be back very soon.

I from So Cal where we have a lot of Soul food restaurants and this place was definitely one of the BEST. I have found my place in NorCal for southern food. Their Oxtails were absolutely delicious. Between 3 adults with different orders and sampling all- we all agreed this is our new spot Loved the whole decor and vibe. Their bread pudding is also delicious !!

Fun hip modern place in the Sacramento area. Kind of tucked away off of Martin Luther King Dr. Plenty of street parking. Sweet tea is super sweet probably why they serve Kool-Aid at this place! We had to ask a couple of times to get our Arnold Palmer's with unsweetened tea not sure they really understood given the southern flare! lol We had the catfish and smothered chicken. Both were good, multiple fixings on the sides that we tried and shared... mac & cheese was good. Yams were good but sweet black-eyed peas absolutely not greens decent. We made reservations ahead of time as that's what the website recommended but there was plenty of seating when we got there both indoor and outdoor. There is a time limit on your table, and we did feel kind of rushed to get out of there to clear the table even though there were not people waiting to be sat, and there were other empty tables. Decent experience, we would likely return.

Had the pleasure of finally trying this restaurant out recently and let me tell you from the service to the food it's 5 stars! We had the chicken, okra, potato salad, red beans rice and biscuits. Everything was so delicious especially the okra. So happy we tried it at the recommendation of our server! We will def be back cant wait to try some of the other yummy food on this menu!

Everything was GREAT! & so was the HOSPITALITY! Met Chef Boots, the winner from the show Chopped! He was funny, cool, and a real down to earth kinda guy! My family will definitely be back after we had the CATFISH, OXTAILS, SHRIMP & GRITS, FRIED DEVILED EGGS, MAC N CHEESE, CORNBREAD, GREENS, BANANA PUDDING, & last but not least the PEACH COBBLER!!!  Thank you Brittany (Manager) for the amazing service and even when you sat next me and started chopping it up made us feel like family! KEEP THE QUALITY PLEASE!
first time eating here today and I was FLOORED by how amazing the food was. the staff was super friendly too. I'm definitely going to recommend this place to everyone!
Good food great atmosphere great service i am single so i go there almost every night to get a home cooked meal
Finger licking good! You know the place is good if you have a hard time stopping eating.

I need to come here more often so that I feel the need to branch out beyond the chicken and waffles. I have tasted other dishes from friend's plates so I can tell you first hand that the greens, yams, oxtails and Mac n Cheese are on point. You won't be disappointed. "Family style" is the way to go because they have a lot of good food to choose from. Where else can you get bomb chicken and waffles for $10 bucks?

The food was good a little expensive nothing spectacular. Our server was really nice. She did seem to forget about us a couple times. The grits was good. I think my neice got the Cajun shrimp and grits. The chicken tenders are good. Mac and cheese and greens were bomb. Catfish was OK. Culd have had more flavor. They accidentally gave us a thigh instead of a chicken tender and they exchanged it with no fuss. Great customer service  by management with this issue.

sooooooooooooooooo good!! go for the chicken and waffles! stay for the biscuits and gravy, oxtail, SWEET TEA AND KOOLAID!! 

...they even had a secret vegan menu

Sac needed a soulful location, that catered to modern life our town is evolving to, with a great atmosphere, menu, and staff. I've yet to experience a meal I didn't like, or someone in their crew with a bad attitude. Definitely check this place out, and definitely get a piece of their 24 marinated chicken.

I was very disappointed with my take out. the crust on the fish was delicious but the fish on the Inside was not cooked. ugh... the oxtails were tuff/dry with about a tsp of gravy. the fried chicken was cooked too hard. the greens were not seasoned at all. the mack n cheese was not well seasoned.  the atmosphere is beautiful.  the staff are very professional and sweet. the customers were all very nicely dressed and it was very busy. I was very. proud/excited to see and support a  business owned by people of color so i ordered alot of food.  I will go back  tho and try my luck with the shrimp n grits.  my family was so disappointed that we tossed the meal and cooked our own oxtails and catfish.  the cornbread and beans n rice were tasty. I hope I just came on a day when the cooks were just not on their best game.  I. always try to support our businesses but honestly I wasted alot of money on the above items.  I'll still give them 4 starts just because I support my people that have their own businesses. but....I will definitely not b ordering.  the fried. chicken. the oxtails. the catfish. mac n cheese. greens ever again.  I'll definitely go back again when I'm in Sacramento and get a small order of shrimp n grits.  I'm sure its good.
We had a great experience this evening.  I've tried Fried chicken all over Sacramento and this by far is my favorite.  Service was fantastic! The restaurant has a great vibe too.
Amazing food, been here twice and will definitely be back..worth every penny. I'm getting a sense of consistency and I love it
The food here is phenomenal. Everyone is so friendly. It feels home-like. Love it!. I have been there several times and have never been disappointed . It's a regular for me now.

Staff could not be any more welcoming. This place was warm and wonderful on the inside. Food was excellent, as well. I wish I would've ordered the Kool-aid bc once I saw it on another table- it was like a rainbow of colors and I was jealous ; )

I ordered the Oxtail to go with a side of Collard Greens paid $30 and the portion was for a child and they would still be hungry afterwards disappointed 2 small portions of oxtail and small 2oz container of collard greens. I would hope this is not the same portion giving for dine in would not recommend this place way overpriced!!!

Can't wait to go back. I  tried the chicken and waffles, deep fried  deviled eggs, and the mac and cheese. Soooooooo good would give it a 10 star if I could. Loved everything drinks are large and fantastic.

Love, love, love this place! The restaurant is very clean and all of the staff is very friendly and respectful. The food is sooooo delicious it reminds me of my great grandmothers cooking. Also, the drinks are delicious as well. The lavender lemon drop is my favorite! If you're ever in the Sacramento area and have a love for soul food like I do, fixins soul kitchen is definitely the best restaurant to eat at!
Great food. Really friendly staff. An overall awesome place! Red Kool aid!! I can't stop thinking about this place!

This place is amazing and worth the wait for a table if you come on a Sunday afternoon. I am by no means an authority on southern comfort food, but it is my favorite and Fixins has been, hands down, the best and most authentic "soul food" restaurant I've tried in California. The staff is incredibly friendly and it is a hoot to sit at the bar with a big jar of sweet tea and chat about fave desserts with other customers. I got a piece of red velvet cake to go, and my slice was almost the size of a half a cake. You will not walk put of here hungry!
Best soul food around town!! The potato salad, Mac&cheese and red beans and rice are the best thing in the menu!! Lol and the peach cobbler is to die for

Don't go unless you have 3hr to kill sitting prior to eating . I waited nearly 2 hours to get seated and then they seated people before me and moved us back on the list. When I disputed, why people that got there after me were seated first? They told me that's how things are done.  I was nervous because it was 20 minutes before closing time and was afraid that they would not seat me before the restaurant was closed although I had been there for almost 2 hours.  I am so angry at this place for wasting my time and I will never come here again.

The food is amazing don't get me wrong, the chicken is probably the best I have had, however some items they cut corners on. For example ordered the fried green tomatoes, for 9 dollars you get 4 thin sliced red tomatoes not even green tomatoes.. which is the whole point of the dish! The biggest thing here they also needs to be addressed is the service, the communication with staff is little to none, I have been here 4 times since opening at different times of the day and service is never on point. For example, waiting for someone to get our order takes 10-15 minutes, by the time you order the food can take double that time.  It really is a bummer because the food is great but the service is rough I won't be coming back, hopefully they start doing take out soon.

Amazing . Warning though, the wait can be SUPER long. Like 2 hours + long. However, the day we came we got sat pretty quickly . This was my first time here and I was very impressed. I ordered the Cherry Bomb cocktail & a lemon drop and both were delicious . Anybody who knows me knows I LOVE chicken and waffles so of course, it was only right that I ordered it here. All I can say is I'm getting hungry again just writing this review. The chicken & waffles at this restaurant are my second favorite that I've had by far. The only place that beats this place for me is Cafeteria 15L's chicken and waffles and I'll tell you why...the only reason why these two places arent tied is because cafeteria 15L has a different butter for the waffles. The butter that cafeteria 15L has is more of a cinnamon flavored butter and the butter that Fixins has is like a raspberry flavored butter. Both are really good but for my taste pallet , I prefer the cinnamon flavor- it just pairs better with the waffles to me. Either way, this place is my second favorite restaurant in Sacramento. Their Mac and cheese was amazing. Their yams are delicious. I have no complaints except for the wait time. Our server Damiano was INCREDIBLE and so , so sweet. Definitely will ask for him next time we come in!
I have been to Fixins a couple times. Every time it exceeds expectations. If you haven't been, go! You won't regret it

Went here for a work meeting. Ambiance was great. The art on the wall is amazing & fits soooo well with the Fixins theme. The food came out super fast. I had the fried chicken omlette w/grits, a side of mac n cheese, and peach cobbler. My friend had smothered chicken (with mac n cheese & greens), deep fried deviled eggs, and banana pudding. We both had red kool aid. Fried deviled egg was different and good. $8 for 2 eggs is a bit much though so I wouldn't order again. The kool-aid was nice and sweet like it should be. I'm definitely giving the side eye for the price though $4 (ya'll know kool-aid is hella cheap). My omlette was good. Chicken inside was flavorfull. I'd order again. The grits were BOMB (I added sugar cause yeah...sweet grits is life). Mac n' Cheese was great. Real cheese n' not that fake stuff. Both desserts left something to be desired. Peach cobbler was just ok (needed vanilla bean ice cream & the banana pudding was not good. I am used to & make mine from scratch. Double broiler pudding and toasted meringue...this was very one note and had whipped cream. I probably wouldn't order the cobbler and definitely not the banana pudding. My friend loved her smothered chicken and greens (this was her 2nd time there). The staff were great- Attentive and friendly. The music was great. Had a great convo with Richard. There's an employee that looks dead on Childish Gambino hahahaha and others walkin around smilin' n singing. Definitely a welcoming and home-like feel. We stayed after they closed at 2 and never felt rushed to leave. I'll be taking the fam tomorrow. We needed this in Sac and I'm happy to see it. Amazing job!

My boyfriend and I ate breakfast here. The cocktails and food was excellent.  Staff was on target with helping and making sure we where good... For being so new- they have it together.  We will come back.

Did not disappoint! The food was delicious and service was great. The collard greens are a must with anything you order! We joined the wait list to sit outside and even though it was hot there was plenty of shade to keep you comfortable. We will be back for sure!

Fixins was recommended to me and I wanted to try it. I am from the South and it met all my expectations and beyond. Chicken and waffles were delicious. Best chicken since my mom's. Tasted my husbands okra, Mac and cheese and grits. Superb. Grits were so creamy and delicious. He is vegetarian and he had plenty of choices. Staff was friendly, helpful and gracious. Will return to get the catfish. Heard it was delicious.

I went here last week and it was such a great atmosphere! The place was packed and the kitchen was busy! The hostess was very sweet and helpful. The bartenders were also really nice and tentative. As for the food...OMG! I wish I could have eaten everything off the menu. I had the cornbread, fried chicken, red bean/rice, and Mac'n cheese. All of it was amazing!! Super rich food and I was veryyyy full after. I recommend this place any day!

My complaint is not with the food but with the overall management of this place. The food is great however they always seem to behind or late. We ordered food online and were told it would be a 45 minute wait. We went to pick up our food 45 minutes later and were told it's another twenty minutes. We waited the twenty minutes only to be told that it would be another 30 minutes. this is not the first time that this has happened, which tells me that there are management issues that they need to deal with. Waiting an additional hour for food to arrive cold is  unacceptable. They need to do better.
Service is a tad slow , food was pretty good ! Kool aide is PERFECT  would come back !

I thought I had already left a review, but I ate breakfast here about weeks ago. It was the best breakfast I've had in years and I'm extremely picky. I've lived in Sacramento for my whole life over 56-years. I read all the reviews and just had to come. The truth is since I know that over the last few years there has been so much gentrification in this neighborhood I was a bit afraid it would be staffed by people not from this neighborhood. I couldn't have been happier to find that not the case. I will admit since Kevin Johnson did almost nothing good for this City as mayor or to help the community in which he grew up I was disappointed to discover he owns this place. Nevertheless, I will be back because the food is awesome and so is the staff. Oh one more thing, I drank a Bloody Mary with my Sunday Brunch and it was one of the best I've ever had.

The food was really good except for the yams, potato salad and fried green tomatoes. No flavoring at all on the yams, the fried green tomatoes were to salty and the potato salad the potatoes were to big, but other then that everything else was delicious. The ox tails are the best. I will go back to try other things. Service was excellent.
Visited from Reno, NV. OMG!! This place Is amazing. The food is delicious, the service was excellent, and the ambiance was great! Totally will stop here again.
Our food and cocktails were good, it's just too pricey for me. I didn't know that creep Kevin Johnson owned it.
Horrible food. Ordered for delivery and I only received one order and one side. Greasy. No refund offered. Don't waste your time or $ on this place

Went there with the family for pickup, after reading their review in Sacbee. Had their oxtail, which was delicious however their chicken was average and lukewarm., they even missed putting sauce in the bag. The worst part was that they had said that the food would be ready for pickup in 25-40 mins yet it took 75 mins and the person who brought the food didn't seem like really didn't care and also wasn't too familiar with the menu items. We had kids with us and having to wait that long for food was not worth it. Maybe it was a busy day, but then they should not tell customers the wrong time for pickup.

Not only is the food AMAZING, but the service I received from *Brian* was totally "next level"!! This guy goes the extra distance for his customers -I'm pretty sure he'll give foot rubs if that's what you ordered! And he's easy on the eyes too.. what more could you possibly want??!? He totally deserves a huge raise!

The BEST Mac and Cheese (as well as homemade hot sauce) -- ever. Ordered the greens, corn bread, green beans, fried chicken and Mac and cheese. Fabulous service. The chicken and the Mac and Cheese are a MUST. Can't wait to go back!

If you love Soul Food than you are definitely going to love this place.   I had the 3 piece fried chicken dinner with Mac and cheese and potato salad for my sides.   The fried chicken was perfect.  Sides were great but the biscuit and the butter they give you are to die for.   I could literally just eat the butter they give you.   I highly recommend this spot.   I can't wait to go back.  Oh yah and the prices are good for the amount of food you get.
Been here a couple of times and each time is better than the last. Food is great and the service is even better!!!  Ask for Denisha she was the best!

Food is amazing great friendly staff clean nice building everything i ordered was amazing will become a regular here, by far the best soul food in Sacramento exactly what the city needed! hopefully they add a happy house and offer bottomless mimosa for sunday brunch
Vibe was amazing server was amazing food was good sweet potatoes could've been slightly better but everything else was on point

You can't go wrong here. Every item I've had here was top notch right down to the breakfast coffee. Really clean nice restaurant with excellent staff. Soul food, southern food, BBQ, whatever label fits it's just really really good.

The food is absolutely bomb! 

The customer service is awesome.  

I can't to bring more family and friends so they can enjoy the same experience.

Exactly what Oak Park needs! Got to go to their soft opening and the food was DIVINE!! Catfish, fried deviled eggs, candies yams, juicy fried chicken, collard greens, even the Kool-Aid was amazing!!  the portions were HUGE and the flavors were complex and unique! The servers and atmosphere was cool and relaxing! Definitely my new favorite restaurant!

I have been coming to Fixins since Covid early 2020. For à soulfood place I thought they were good, prices were ok for the soulfood market, the sides could have been larger but ok. Saturday 7/24 We ordered online for the food to be ready when we arrived (30 minute drive from Elk Grove to Sacramento). Our order ended being $77 and some change even $80 with tip. Once we got there the order was not ready and had to wait an additional 15 minutes, still not complaining. Unfortunately I did not check my meal before we left, and what do you know they forgot my Catfish for my CATFISH PLATE! I called and told the server and she quickly gave me to the manager and explained what happened. He told me he would be crediting me the fish ONLY because I got my sides. Wait what?! I asked Ricky what am I going to do with sides and no entree? Ricky proceeds to ask me "well you are going to eat the sides aren't you?"  I just about hit the floor. So I asked Ricky what ever happened to awesome customer service and why would he not credit me my $19+tax for the simple fact I DROVE out of the way and it was not my fault. Ricky said if I had told him I didn't get any of my meal he would have gave me all that  I paid(LIE) but since I got sides he will only give me the fish difference. This went on for about 10 minutes. He was kind enough to give me the owner's name of Kevin Johnson and a phone number (which by the way, calls RIGHT BACK TO THE STORE) ‍so I could leave a message for Mr. Kevin Johnson to call me back. Well I never got a voicemail to leave my complaint and ended up going to the Instagram site requesting a call....never got that call either. Am I done with Fixins???? Probably not, but Mr. Ricky sure has put a sour taste in my mouth!
Great game I'd love the chicken and biscuits with gravy! Great service and great menu! I give it a thumbs up

The food at Fixins was mind blowing-- absolutely delicious and flavorful. On top of the wonderful food, my server Des was incredibly informative and went above and beyond when it came to taking care of a larger party of 9. She was cooperative and took care of all our needs. She made the dining experience lively, more than enjoyable, and delightful. What a great person.

Me and my husband are on the search of the areas best chicken sandwich and this is one of his top contenders. The reason they get 4 is because they forgot the fried chicken on my fried chicken omelet. But even without it, it was delicious. The chicken was moist, tender and crispy.  I like when the chicken has a little more fried goodness. And this was on point.  Service was great. The hostess kept on apologizing for our 5 minute wait.  And honestly the wait never bothers us. So 5 minutes was no big deal. 
If you have an aversion to peppers and onions dont get the creamed corn. My husband does and I dont. So I slathered that on my omelet. The collards were tender and succulent. Had a great ham hock flavor and sweetness that I love and crave with collards. 
And with messing up an order they were extremely accommodating.  We will return!!!
This is a perfect stop for us after picking up people from the airport. We will be back and cant wait to try more items!!

Good food and service, excellent drinks, and fun atmosphere . My Bloody Mary was the best one I had in a long long time. Delicious! My hubby liked his Old Fashioned. I give the chicken and waffle a B+ ( I prefer savory vs sweet) and A to the catfish. OMG A+ for the Mac n cheese and greens! We will definitely be back! Thank you for a great first experience. Keep up the good work. Your attention to details ( like warming the syrup) is paying off.

Went to Fixins for the first time! I ordered the fried catfish with greens and red beans and rice and my wife ordered the ox tails. The cat fish was good, the greens were delicious and red beans and rice were good. The Ox tail my wife had OMG! Sooo freakin good! The restaurant looks nice and a lot of friendly workers! We highly recommend this place!

author_location: Stock Ranch Residential, Citrus Heights, CA
text: Took my boyfriend here for a date since we've both been wanting to try it. The energy and atmosphere of the restaurant itself makes me want to go back. The music playlist was on point, the service was amazing, and the food was delicious. We ordered the fried deviled eggs for an app, and I wish I could've had more of it because it was just so good. My boyfriend ordered the shrimp and grits and I ordered the smothered chicken. Both meals were cooked perfectly, and my chicken was nice and crispy even though it was smothered with gravy. The flavors were great. We ended with the banana pudding which was delicious and not too overpowering. We would definitely come back again and try other menu items. This is a great restaurant and they're doing things right.

Good food! Service is fast for takeout. I will try again when I'm in the area. I never went inside I ordered from the takeout area outside. I will ask that they put lids on tight for everything to prevent spillage in future. Thanks!

Took the family to Fixins after the Kings game on a Sunday night. The restaurant was packed and we had a 30 minute wait. It was DEFINITELY worth the wait! We ordered the fried catfish for an appetizer and it was spot on. Full of flavor and cooked to a golden brown. I had three pieces of fried chicken with coleslaw, fries and it came with a biscuit. Can't say enough about the amazing flavor of everything and the generous portion sizes. We ordered a 3 piece side of cornbread and it was amazing as well. My wife went with the chicken and waffles. Let's just say she can't wait to go back again. The chicken and waffles were some of the best she has had. If you are looking for some great food at a reasonable price for the quality and portion size,head on down to Fixins you won't be disappointed.

I waited 1 hour for my order just to get the wrong order. (Young black guy in the front mistake). I wanted the 3 piece chicken with the waffles and got the 3 piece only instead. I addressed it to the two young people working in the front and the said I still had to wait 30 to 40 minutes to get waffles ASIDE from the one hour I had already waited. They also forgot my drinks and had to wait 10 more minutes just for the same you g guy to go inside and get the drinks.. just really slow service and Honestly it just ruined the entire experience.

Ordered some chicken tenders tonight, which usually is plenty for my wife and I, but it was a bit of a letdown. They seemed to be super busy, probably because people are supporting black run businesses, as well as being popular, but no excuse for the order we got. 
First, the online order system and email told me 30 min, but it was almost an hour till it was ready. Then I get the food home, and instead of being in a large takeout container with 5 or 6 good size tenders, there's a small box with 4 small tenders and some fries. No pickle. None of the sauces I requested. Very disappointing. I'll probably go back, especially when dine in opens back up, but this experience was a swing and, perhaps not a miss, but definitely not out of the infield!

First time eating here. I ordered online. The system was very straight forward and easy to use. The food was even done 30 mins earlier than it said. Food was amazing. I loved the butter with the cornbread. So good! Will definitely be eating here again

This has got to be hands down the best fried chicken I've ever had. Soo juicy so crispy so fresh so tender good lawd. The mac & cheese is sooo cheesy make me wanna slap yo mama. I never want to leave I want all my meals here. Even the biscuits are homemade & fresh and soft not dry at all. Mimosa are on point too
Sooo good best sweet tea , collard greens and Mac and cheese since I've been to my home town Augusta Georgia
First time here. I'm from Norway so love trying new foods. Never had soul food before. I had the oxtails with grits and fried catfish and cornbread. So yummy! Definitely coming here again.

First time here. Amazing food. The service was a bit slow at the start, but holy crap, once we got their attention service was ridiculously awesome. The food was delicious as well. I'll be coming here again.

I'm not a negative Nancy so I'll start with the positives, they do have good customer service and the restaurant aesthetics are amazing great vibe but I've been here twice to get the catfish meal and I should have made my own at home. Catfish is super crispy burnt and mac n cheese was dry not cheesy enough while the biscuits were cold and burnt as well. The yams were good yet nothing to pay $16 for. A whole in the wall place is definitely going to be way more with your bucks

Finally got a chance to check out this place and it was better than what I expected. Had the 2 piece (breast and leg) Chicken and Waffle. Chicken breast wasn't dry. Had the Mac and Cheese as well and loved it as it was made exactly how I like it.
