Customer service was exceptional; hostess and waitress were attentive and made sure to check in (not in that constant pushy manner). Restaurant has a full bar, and the inside decor and layout is nice. Definitely a great addition to Oak Park. Would I come here again? Yes.

I am a little late posting my review but thought better late than never. I went to the soft opening & the food was very good, especially the fish & hush puppies. This will stay at the top my list of places to eat. I will definitely tell others about this place.
The oxtail, collard green and Mac n cheese are out of this world! This place is amazing! Service was amazing too!
Really good fried chicken and great cheesy grits. These are the things to get at fixings. Always go dark meat. White meat should not be used for fried chicken. Tis blasphemy.

We love Fixins! We have been here more times than I care to admit since last summer and have been ordering take out during shelter in place. All of the food has been delicious. I would say our favorites are chicken and waffles, gumbo and a fried chicken meal with Mac n cheese. I don't think you can go wrong!

We didn't read any reviews but saw the pictures and saw there was almost 2k so we decided to try it while in sac. Man we walked out super satisfied. We arrived at 7:25pm Saturday and sat in their outdoor seating 10 minutes later. The hostess was very professional and friendly. Des our waitress was prompt, professional and phriendly. Haha she came by said hi and told us she'll come back with water. We ordered sidecar and Stockton Boulevardier. Sidecar was good about my partner said the Stockton had too much vermouth. For entrees we ordered oxtail with okra and yams. Catfish with greens and black eyed peas. Catfish had the right seasoning and texture (thin battered). Oxtail was tendered and fell off the bone. With a little bit of hot sauce everything was delicious. We also ordered the biscuits and came with brown butter which was amazing. My least favorite was the corn fritters that came with the catch too hard and dry. Looking forward to coming back here next time we're in sac. Keep up the amazing job being safe and clean as we saw the staffs were during and after covid. Great establishment!!!

Very good!!! I heard about this place from a friend, and I was not disappointed. I ordered the shrimp and grits and it was awesome!!! My hub ordered the catfish and loved it as well. The restaurant has a very nice decor and the staff was super nice. I will definitely come back to visit, and more menu items.

This is good Southern food for California. For me being a Southern boy this is very average. The atmosphere was great, the staff was great and the food was a little pricey but not to bad considering it is California. I would recommend you visit.

Wonderful food,great atmosphere we will definitely return. The wait was 45 min ..not that long at all the hostess seem to be telling people that to possibly deter people to not want to wait. The wait Way maybe 20-25min.

Best food in Sacramento right now! We got catfish, collard greens and okra and then Chicken and Waffles. Both were amazing. But the okra was my favorite thing. The Koolaid was super fun and good too! Service was good, I thought we waited a little long for our drinks, but they were busy. We didn't have a wait to get seated either. We will be frequent customers here. SO GOOD

Been here twice,and omg I'm hooked,Kevin Johnson can take all my coins! I've had the chicken/fixins,shrimp n grits and fried deviled eggs and all dishes are bomb!!even the koolaid flavors and sweetened ice tea are delicious! Let's talk about the yams and fried deviled eggs...man....I am in love with this place...only complaint i have is the parking situation other than that,its got my vote!

This was our first time inside the restaurant post COVID.  The food was excellent (fried catfish, chicken, coleslaw).  We ate at the bar given the crowd on a Sunday afternoon.  We appreciated the hard working and efficient Isselle.  We will be back!

We got for fried chicken and waffles, mac n cheese, and buttermilk biscuits. They were very good and the chicken was moist. We were 4th on the waiting list and was told that it would take 20-30mins. Then was told it was gonna be a longer wait for some reason and that we should sit at the bar instead.

This is one of my first pandemic meals out, but that's not why I find this place awesome. It's the sweet spicy tender collard greens with neck meat, mac and cheese with big soft elbow noodles, and most of all juicy, crispy, crusty chicken.  I'm looking forward to working my way through the menu.  The staff is stylish and attentive, and lunch on the outdoor patio is living the good life.

First time here And it was amazing. Came on a Sunday for brunch and it was an hour wait but definitely worth it. They don't offer unlimited mimosas which was a drag but everything other than they was great.

I went on a Saturday afternoon after waiting upwards of an hour, I was very underwhelmed. I've been craving fried catfish for almost 2 months. I ordered it here and wasn't impressed, it was full of batter, the fish was encased inside batter, the fish was wet and the batter inside was soggy, collards tasted like there was vinegar in it, red beans and rice was good, close second to Popeyes. The sweet tea was EXCELLENT and sweet! My cousin had hot wings and they were ok. She loved the French Fries. Our Waiter was not very attentive, his was Damiono or something to that effect, but was very attentive to the people at the table on both sides of us. Kevin Johnson was there, he made his rounds by the tables of customers who were dining, but waved at a distance to the people who were waiting for tables inside the restaurant. I guess dining guests are higher on the totem pole than the ones waiting. 
Bottom line: I won't be back, I really was seriously disappointed and it's very overhyped. I hate I wasted my $23.

So this is my second visit the first one amazing which is why i made it a point to stop on my way home to napa from tahoe however this time i'm sad to say i am disappointed i ordered the smothered pork chops the came out dry with gravy on side which was fine if the gravy wasn't so burnt it left an awful after taste my rice was ruined due to the burnt gravy the mac and cheese was decent the kool aid red was amazing my guy got the smothered chicken again came out dry but at least the chicken had flavor but his gravy was also burnt not sure i will be going back

Giving the benefit of a doubt and saying it was an off day for the kitchen staff... I didn't receive what I ordered and sent it back, the table next to us had their order wrong and they sent their food back, and the table next to them received a wrong order as well. All of us, three separate tables.. it was baffling! Here is an elaboration of my first time here:

An interesting first experience at this restaurant. It took a substantial amount of time for us to receive our food. In fact one thing that was concerning was when a table close to us received their food before us even though that party sat down and ordered quite some time after we had ordered. 

My girlfriend ordered the catfish with collard greens and yams. It was all delicious! Great flavor and seasonings all around. I ordered the two piece chicken and waffle but when they brought my food out it was a three piece wing chicken and waffle. It took a while for me to get the waiters attention and I pointed out that I ordered the two piece plate and not the chicken wing and he apologized, recognizing that the kitchen did make a mistake. Eventually a different gentleman came out with my plate and he asked me if I ordered  the chicken and waffles and I responded with a yes but was still suspicious because the plate was one wing and one thigh on a waffle. I asked him if it was the two piece this time (since it was one wing and one thigh, I anticipated two thighs) and he responded, "isn't it?" as if he wasn't entirely sure. I was too hungry to wait any longer so I took the plate. The chicken was good. The seasoning of the skin was fantastic although the meat was a little dry. 

Unfortunately my girlfriend and I both are experiencing bad stomach aches after eating the food, but perhaps because it is soul food so it was far from a light lunch.

I do anticipate on coming back some time. I'm not in Oak Park very often but if I am it's possible I'll come back in. It was awesome to see unique food options, especially Kool-Aid as a beverage. I really want to try their oxtail and regret not getting it today.

So this was my first time here . I ordered the chicken and waffles (2 wings) waffle was good very sweet and the butter was very sweet  . Chicken was crispy and good but very sweet as well. I think overall the dish was wayyyy too sweet . The butter that was on my waffle I didn't particularly care for . It wasn't bad but it wasn't good . I think they should make the chicken spicy rather than sweet because overall the diSh was just way too sweet some spice would have balanced out the sweetness. I even used their hot sauce and it wasn't hot . I'd rather have had Tabasco. The  Mac and cheese was good , greens were good but again they were very sweet no spice at all. My mom ordered the catfish it was pretty mushy it was crisp the batter kind of fell off of the fish . Black eyed peas in my opinion needed salt. So overall I gIve it a 3. I'll try it again and get something different

I love me some great soul food. This place was just three stars for me and it has nothing to do with the 1.5 hour wait on a Sunday. Here is what they need to do to make it 5 stars:

1. Clean the plates before they are served; grease marks aren't attractive
2. Make sure the sides are hot green beans and Mac and cheese weren't warm
3. Please ensure plates are complete when you bring them out (forgot my biscuit)
4. Fried chicken tooooooo greasy and too hot. Let it rest get the excess grease off
5. Put lemons in your lemonade. Tastes like sugar water with no hint of lemons
6.  Owner came by all the tables except for ours to ask about experience

This place has great potential however I'm going to wait a few months and try this place again.
My visit was great! Its my 2nd time here and I enjoy the food, music and service was good.
Everything was delicious! The staff was very friendly and food was served fast. I loved the environment of the place, it was very relaxing

Thank you Lord. Found someone outside the South that knows how to make grits. Creamy smooth grits. They also did something weird with a biscuit. Looked like a roll and a bit iffy, til I took a bite. I could sit down with a pan and be content. Had the fried chicken dinner. It was cooked just right. Made me think of home. Did I mention the cook grits rIght?  Thanks for a taste of home. Y'all do it right!

Completely disappointed with EVERYTHING, except for Ness the server, he was great. I need to have a pleasant dining experience and it was too far from pleasant. Never received our appetizer, smothered chicken WAS NOT and that cobbler was a DEFINITE NO! Not to mention the choice of music...I would have rather a quiet patio. Prayerfully all this will be fixed when the dining room is reopened. Bye for now, won't be FIXIN anytime soon.

This place is really beautiful inside. I have never been to a soul food restaurant that had this level of design. It's very nice to see and experience black success. I came for breakfast around 10:30 on a Thursday. I was seated very quickly, and I had a very nice waiter. I ordered the blue plate special, and it was good, but pretty basic. The grits were the creamiest grits I've ever tasted. The bacon seemed extra salty, but it was good. The fried deviled eggs were good too. Overall it was a good experience and I would recommend it.

Amazing food and amazing service! When the owner goes table to table to check in on all his guests and the waitresses accomodate every request with a big smile...who could ask for more! This level of customer service is rare this day in age.

And the food! Mac n cheese is the best I've had in Sacramento. The collard greens and okra were also phenomenal. The fiancé had the fried chicken and was impressed. 

We will definitely be back! Thanks for making us feel like we're part of the family!

I went to Fixins last night and had the most amazing service . Since the pandemic customer service has gone out the window but not at Fixins . Everyone was so polite and accommodating especially our waiter Rashan he was extremely nice ,had amazing suggestions and checked on our table of four constantly . It's rare to find a server that has the ability to not only remember to check on the table but remembers everyone's drinks . We had one vegetarian at the table and even she was in awe of how delicious the food was ( they even have vegan greens) We ordered the fried deviled eggs for the table and the catfish and they were delicious . The catfish was so fresh !! I had the oxtails rice and gravy and greens and it was delicious . My wife and our other friend had the fried chicken Mac and cheese and greens and they both said they have never had a chicken breast that was so juicy . We had a couple Hennessy side cars the lavender martini all were perfect and the koolaid was delicious . We also ordered a slice of red velvet and peach cobbler . The red velvet was beyond amazing the peach cobbler was just ok . But overall it was an amazing experience it will definitely be our new spot . And we will definitely be looking for Rashan .
We were really looking forward to trying this place cuz comfort food is a favorite.  But found it very disappointing... lack of flavor in just about everything we ordered.
I've been here multiple times now, and each time it gets better and better. I've tried almost everything on the menu, you can tell it's all made with love

Service-- 5 stars 
Location/ambience- 5 stars
Food- 5 stars 

Came here for work happy hour. We got a ton of things and everyone agreed that each and every dish was delicious, which is rare in restaurants. 

Deviled eggs appetizer-- get. This. 
Wings--good, wet sauce 
Catfish nuggets--everyone raved about these 
Fried chicken-- excellent
Potato salad-- great!
Mac and cheese-- great flavor, not greasy 
Banana pudding-- amazing! 
Peach cobbler-- ridiculous
Gumbo-- okay, tasted a little burnt
The food was really good. The greens and Mac and  Cheese are on point. The place was really busy on a Monday afternoon. They provided good service. And yes I will come again 4sure!
I love the Caesar Salad! Great customer service! It has a full bar....and once you figure out there's a parking lot around the corner, parking is no problem

Service was polite and timely...thankfully they have open seating at the bar which meant I didn't have to wait...ordered the catfish combo...fish was PERFECTLY cooked, red beans and rice although not spicy enough for my taste still good nonetheless...Mac and cheese really cheesy (maybe a bit more seasoning in it would set it off... but I will be back.  So happy to see a new, black owned business with a DIVERSE staff.. with stable hours! Cannot stand when business hours are hit or miss with some of these new spots.  Bye bye Sandra Dezzzz!

I don't write reviews often but I had to come here to say how AMAZING this place is. We came here for the first time and dined outside. Our server Des was awesome and brewed us a fresh pot of coffee. We got the Fried Deviled Eggs and they were incredible. I ordered the chicken and waffles that came with grape infused butter, it all so delicious I didn't even need syrup! I also got the cornbread with their maple canjun butter and it was delicious. My fiancé got the fried catfish with mac and cheese and potato salad and he loved it. To top it off, Auntie Pearl come by our table twice just to welcome us to the restaurant and thank us for coming in. She made us feel like family and we can't wait to come back!
Food was awesome. From the apps to dessert and obviously the fried chicken. Drinks were fun and great variety of beers, including local. LOVE the decor, great job Sacramento!

My friend and I went for lunch arriving at approx 1:15pm. The restaurant was full, but patrons were finishing up and leaving. We were offered a table in the front of the place, but opted to wait a short time for a booth. After approximately 10mins we were seated. The ambiance was pleasant albeit a bit loud (even after it cleared out significantly), clean (bathrooms were stellar), and reminiscent of a loft motif. The servers were pleasant, friendly and attentive.

We ordered the 3 piece chicken and waffles; which was delicious! The chicken was perfectly seasoned and cooked. The waffles were a bit soggy, but nice hints of cinnamon. The grape butter was a nice touch as well. We also ordered shrimp and grits. I was disappointed, as the sauce in the dish was a thick, non moving gravy! I was very surprised, because the pic's of the shrimp and grits on Yelp was the reason I ordered the dish. I guess depending on the chef on duty, correlates to the quality of the sauce. If you look at all the Yelp pic's, there is a lot of variation in sauce thickness. Nevertheless, the flavor was good although it was a bit difficult to eat. We also ordered the buttermilk pie and the bread pudding. My friend really liked the pie. However the bread pudding was wallowing in what tasted like Smuckers caramel sauce, and was way too sweet to even eat! I think the other part of my disappointment in the bread pudding, was I though it would be more traditional (like my grandmother and mother make - bourbon soaked raisins, mixed with some form of sweet bread, buttery and rich vanilla). This bread pudding was dark brown and very pudding like. 

I want to return and try other dishes, and to give the shrimp and grits another chance.

The best shrimps and grits I ever I had and I don't even eat grits but it was recommended and I'm glad I tried it...  I Also had a Catfish and grits just as good. It's not on the menu but if you ask the waiter for grits with cheese and gravy and a side piece of cat fish fillet ($8 a piece)you can get it made yourself. Or just order fried catfish dinner you get to sides  and add a side of gravy ($2)  I think it's cheaper this way

We got the fried chicken, fried green tomatoes, and shrimp and grits. Everything was 100!! So good. We can't wait to go back and try the other dishes. We didn't feel gross after either. They use peanut oil to fry their food. Good quality and delicious food!

We ordered the smothered pork chops, fried chicken and the hot chicken sandwich. Greens and black eyed peas. Everything tasted like my Granny was in the kitchen. I would give this place 10 stars if I could. Everything was cooked and seasoned perfectly . I am a new loyal customer.

I thought I should weigh in on the seasoning.  I wasn't going to comment on the smothered chicken and oxtails.  I enjoyed both but I put on quite a bit of hot sauce.  I could taste the roux (kind of flour taste).   My hairstylist, who encouraged me to go, said even though she enjoyed the food she felt it could have been more seasoned.  She had the fried fish. 
 But the textures are good.   I wouldn't hesitate to eat here again.  

Not putting to be negative, but I would like to see this restaurant succeed.
The food the service and the drink were absolutely amazing! I traveled from Concord, Ca to Sacramento to try this restaurant out! I highly recommend it!
Great food! It was my first time and the fried chicken, waffles, catfish, and fixins were all amazing. Didn't disappoint in the slightest!

Great food , great atmosphere and a wonderful bar. The staff is friendly, knowledgeable and provide great service. The food speaks for itself but, the charred okra ......thank you for a wonderful gastronomic experience. Nothing like down home southern  comfort food. I've had the pleasure of experiencing the Mac m cheese, black eyed peas and greens on a take out basis and decided I needed to experience the restaurant itself. Glad I did. We will be back! As a bonus they don't take reservations but, the check in ahead feature is the way to go especially, if you have a large group as we did. Thanks again

What the Hell happened to this place? Before the pandemic hit me and my friends would come here at least 2 or 3 times a week. The chicken was juicy and flavorful, the fixins were on point, but now it seems like they have a new kitchen staff. My chicken today was disgusting and overcooked. Fries were soggy and the cornbread was terrible. Bring back the original kitchen staff QUICK.

Atmosphere was warm and cozy. The food was delicious. The staff was attentive and I'd definitely recommend to my friends, family and peers. The only downfall is parking can be a bit tricky, but still worth it.

A great addition to the Broadway section of Oak Park. The food was good and came out fast. The service was excellent. The place gets very busy so going during off-peak times has proven a winning strategy to limit wait times.

Let me tell you something, the catfish is on fire. I have never eaten cat fish so delicious in my life. It was hot, well seasoned and fresh! I ordered the Blue Plate Breakfast plate which included a lot of goodies hit of course I added a side of cheese grits. I almost died. Thank you to the owner, waiters, and staff for creating such a cool space for locals to hang.
Best Soul Food! Amazing ambiance! So proud and happy to see a great Black Owned Classy Establishment!
Good vibes good food good service.  This soul food is really good friendly staff good quality food.  Would come back here again when i come back to Sacramento

Such a cute environment. The owners came out and made sure our we were enjoying our food and even gave me peach cobbler on the house. I got the 2 pc fried chicken with candied yams and greens. Not to mention their strawberry lemonade cocktail which was super good as well. Service was excellent, food came fast. Definitely recommend, and will for sure be back.

We all ordered 1 of the 3 the chicken and waffle(s) options on the breakfast menu. The restaurant has a neat, clean, open, and cool environment.  Fortunately, the place wasn't crowded yet, and our drinks and food all arrived within 15 minutes.
My first impression of my fried chicken leg, and waffles...delicious!  The fried chicken has the perfect seasoning, light crunch, and crispiness.  
If toothpaste is too spicy for you, then it may be too spicy.  The waffle was thin, the edges crispy, and the cinnamon definitely comes through. The grape jelly butter on the waffles was also good, but I still added syrup onto my waffles. Everyone thought the food and service was good.    Nothing really negative, but we had to reach over to the next tables to get our utensils, and fight off a pesky fly or two.  I was freshly showered, so I'm assuming they were also mesmerized by the aromas from our chicken and waffles.  On the next trip back, I'll hopefully bump my rating to a 5*.
Wow is the only word that comes to mind  the service started and ended great Jaycee was amazing. Then came the food amazing everything was super tasty.

Great place
Been wanting to go, and finally took myself on a little date
I work around the corner, and I often hear about Fixins.

So I lucked out, and went during a quiet time. It was very inviting inside. The bathroom was very clean and I appreciate any bathroom with a full length mirror lol
The service and customer service were very much in tact. 
I love how thought out, and classed up things are. 
If you get greens, they don't get the freedom to run all over the plate for example; they're contained! 
The music is tasteful and played at a good level. 
I completely love that the napkins are readily available on the table to you, and the portions are good sizes with good prices. And the paper straws  
The cubes in the adult kool-aid were a dope idea; no watered down drink while you classily sip.
It was a nice little hiding place that could also be a great group hang out too.

Tried it for the second time today.  And yes it was good the second time around.  3 piece chicken with collard greens, red beans and rice. The chicken is set in a brine for 24 hours. The chicken was juicy.  5 of us at a table and not one complaint.   Staff is friendly and welcoming.  I'll be back after I burn off the last two times here.

Best soul food!!! The food is amazing tried everything as a large party omg amazing. The space is so creative with a great atmosphere, clean restroom, great music, seating and more. Pick anything on the menu hats off to the chef!!

Boy howdy. Where do I begin? Finding authentic soul food can be tricky in Sacramento if you don't know where to begin, but you're best off starting with Fixins, because you really won't need to go anywhere else. The collared greens and grits are to DIE for. Their fried chicken will straight up knock your socks off. They're on DoorDash, too, so you can get that southern soul delivered right to your doorstep. This business is owned by members of Sacramento's vibrant Black community as well, so you can feel good about supporting our Black brothers and sisters with your dollar during these turbulent times during which it's important that when our money talks it says Black Lives Matter. Don't forget the peach cobbler.

2 item Fried Chicken lunch with okra and bacon bits, and cheesy grits. This is my second time eating at this restaurant. The fried chicken thighs are so flavors me and tasty.  Let it cool down for a bit before you eat it, the chicken comes out hot! Enjoy the sides while the meat cools down, the okra with bacon bits side is a must.  I tried the Mac n cheese on the last visit, which is good, but almost too much food.  Prices are just right, old school provided great service at the bar counter. Looking forward to trying their breakfast/brunch
the food was SOOO good i got it to go so it was kinda cold when i got home but that's on me so like it was so amazing

author_location: Valley Hi / North Laguna, Elk Grove, CA
text: This is the best spot to eat great food and enjoy a nice cocktail to go with your meal. I  like the Chicken and Waffles, Oxtails over Rice, Shrimp and Grits and fried Catfish! If you like good candied yams and greens then Fixin's is definitely your spot! Make time to dine outside or take to go. Either way you're bound to become a regular!
the food is sooo good it will make you hurt yourself, and I Love Love the diversity of staff and their service

Got the shrimp and grits. The gravy sauce makes you want to lick the plate. No matter how hard you try, you can't stop eating the peach cobbler. The service was great. Our waiter, Ol' School, was a crack up and made you feel like family. Make sure you visit Fixins.

Went here a couple of months ago to try it out. The female worker greeted us nicely and gave us a menu, but we're told to go outside and look at the menu so that other customers can order. Said ok and went outside. The people in front of us didn't know what they wanted either, but were allowed to stay inside. They took over 10 min to order. We finally got to order and she told us that i would receive a text when the food was ready. I received a text and went to grab my food then was told by other customers that there was a line to pick up the food. Had to wait 20 min to pick up the food. Thought it was a stupid i idea to have to wait in line with the online orders when it good was ready. Thought the good was going to be great the way the worker was talking about what I ordered, and it was meh. Probably never coming here again.
Early Saturday afternoon we had a party of 10.All the food came out hot! Not warm y'all hot hot I was so impressed The drinks were bomb. Yams and greens taste like good home cookin .

The food was absolutely amazing. The location is a little on the cramped side. If you want a drink while you wait good luck. Waited 20 min at the bar and was never acknowledged. Ended up getting our table and ordered drink from the server. By the time they came we forgot that we had placed the order. Aside from that it was a great experience.
Waited 35 to 40 minutes and when I got my food I found hair on my soggie bun. I was so upset I didn't even bother to go back.

Very warm and welcoming environment. Staff was great, music was great, kool-aid was amazing. I ordered chicken with yams and macaroni and cheese and the only thing that stopped me from eating my entire plate was being full but it was really good. My boyfriend said his chicken and waffle was the best he's ever had (keep in mind we've had a lot of chicken and waffles in our life). My only critique is picking up the wait time for food to get to the table. We were really hungry and it took a bit too long for the food to get to us BUT it was fresh so I understand.

My first time here. We drove an hour from #Stockton and had to wait about two hours before we got seated and had our food but the staff #Chelsea were so accommodating and I was with my big sis, Sharon Ross the time didn't matter. The food was worth the wait. It was absolutely delicious (cornbread better than my ........ momma

We just got to experience this amazing restaurant.  We got there and of course there was a wait but only 45 minutes.  We absolutely enjoyed everything about this restaurant.  We're not sure but I know they have someone's Mom in the kitchen cooking.  I would highly recommend it. Plus bless his heart the owner was serving people and very engaging with his customers.  Go and enjoy this great restaurant

Chicken & waffle were to die for!!! Hands down some of the best soul food I have had in Sacramento, service was a bit slow but I'm sure it was because it was packed. Will be definitely coming back again to try their gumbo

Happened to be passing Sac and saw great reviews on their chicken sandwich and had to stop off to give it a try. Absolutely delicious! We also ordered the oxtail and that was flavorful. We went during peak dinner time so had to wait an hour for our food (take out) but worth the wait. Will eat here again if in the area.

Best fried chicken I have ever had. Soft, tender and brined on the inside and crispy but not rock hard on the outside. I don't even really like fried chicken and I am planning to go back for more. Friendly staff. A source of pride for the neighborhood for sure.

Best breakfast ever! Can't get enough. I've scheduled three meetings here in the past three weeks just so I can have their coffee and breakfast lol. Sorry Old Soul...my new coffee meet ups will all be happening at Fixin's from now on. Beautiful restaurant, great atmosphere, amazing food, friendly staff, super clean restrooms, and great music always playing.

Really???? Did you really come to Sacramento????
We are full on blessed. Service: Brittany (Bar) you're the bomb.
Food. So so satisfied. Best fried chicken I've ever had. Fried green tomatoes 5 star. Grits. What the what!!! 
Not to mention the vibe. Everything is 100 proper here with a beautiful eclectic mix of people.
We absolutely love this place. 
I'm proud they chose to come to Oak Park. It's a beautiful addition to the area.
Amazing! Great inspirations great ambiance. Soul lickin' good! Try the catfish or fried chicken but definitely with a side of Mac and cheese. Amazing new restaurant!

My sister and I went to lunch yesterday and I have to say the food was excellent.  We had the fried chicken and the sides are so good!  The chicken was so tasty and moist.  Fixins serves strawberry butter with their biscuits and that was excellent too.  For dessert we had peach cobbler and rum raisin bread pudding.  I highly recommend.  Thank you Mayor Johnson!

Update: I returned for another meal that was just as delicious as the first. Also, the red velvet cake is legitimate!  I am a self-proclaimed connoisseur of red velvet cake and this was the best I've ever tasted. 

I just visited this gem this morning after hearing rave reviews and it did not disappoint. The decor was crisp, clean, and comfy. I was able to sample the chicken and waffles- delish; the catfish- yum; Mac n cheese- on point; collard greens- keep them coming; and okra-yes! I loved the mason jars, miniature skillets and other southern touches. The service was swift and friendly--literally the best service I've received at any restaurant in years. I hope that they keep up the excellence in all areas. They will definitely become a staple for me.

Had the catfish for lunch it was so tasty had to come back and try their breakfast. Biscuits and gravy are the best I have ever tried. The deep fried deviled eggs are the bomb! Glad we finally got a good restaurant in Sac!

The food here is good, and so are the drinks. The experience was fun with good atmosphere. I wasn't able to join the waitlist online, and they wouldn't add me to it over the phone. However, when I arrived, everyone was very pleasant and accommodating. I'd definitely come back.
Slowest bartenders ever. I'm watching them straight skip me over and over and they seem to not know how to operate their card readers in a timely fashion.

I'm eating my leftovers from yesterday's Sunday dinner & it's so good that it reminded me to do this review. I had sweet potatoes, macaroni & cheese with oxtails,  my granddaughter had chicken and waffles & everything taste so delicious! This is a place where the service is just as good as the food. Excellent service! I love this place ! Kevin Johnson was there & he was so friendly & down to earth; felt like a family environment, felt like I was with my kinfolks.

After reviewing the pictures, and reading some literature about this restaurant I have to say, I will be going ASAP. My grandparents, from Tennessee have raise me in a certain way to enjoy good home cooked meals, this place looks exactly the way my grandparents used to cook. I am very excited about this restaurant.

Was not expecting a secret vegan menu, so that in and of itself made me so much happier. Not to mention, the food was so bomb, I had to order seconds. Highly recommend and definitely returning. Service was great, ambiance great, prices were fair, food was incredible. I am pleased.
Everything I had was beyond delicious!!! The best peach cobbler EVER!!!!! The wait staff was efficient and attentive. I definitely give this place two thumbs up!!
Slap yo' mama! Had fried chicken and catfish, fixins' tasted equally great.  Was busy but didn't have to wait long, got in before quoted 45 minutes. Wait staff friendly and attentive.
Food is off the hook great!!! The service is exceptional and I come here weekly. Go and get your grub on!

This place is so fire! The chicken and waffles is to die for. Sweet cinnamon waffle with pink butter and syrup, the chicken was so tender and juicy! Also had the catfish nuggets with the spicy dipping sauce. BOMB!!! Will definitely be back to try the shrimp and grits.
This my favorite soul food restaurant around.  Food was awesome,  service was great and even met the owner. It was a fabulous visit.

So when we visited LoLo's in Las Vegas in October we ran into Kevin Johnson, he told us he was going to open a restaurant in Oak Park. Fast forward to now we finally were able to visit FIXINS in Oak Park, by far this is probably the best thing to happen in P since Mozzy. The hospitality from Esa and being waited on by Nikki was amazing. The appetizers were delicious all of them we tried everything. All staff was amazing which most times doesnt happen when it's a party of 16 and gratituty is included in the bill. Btw my wife loved the oak park born and buttered shirts. MOST DEFINITELY WILL BE COMING BACK
We went early on a Friday night and had about a 10 minute wait. The food was fantastic! Will definitely go back.

Beautiful atmosphere, delicious food & an amazing time this place is getting busy so be ready to wait for some delicious soulfood .mayor Kevin Johnson is out there with a big smile and the food doesn't disappoint a lot of young people work there so they do the best they can !!! They are doing their very best to keep up with the high demand of food . The kool aid is fantastic & the gumbo is spectacular you get what YOU PAY FOR & THATS QUALITY . The chefs in here are cooking something serious you won't regret eating here worth every penny

I've been waiting so long for a bomb soul food spot in Sac. We have some but none that taste like this. The customer service was great, and the menu had lots to choose from. The koolaid taste straight out the south and the oxtails were bomb. I went two days in a row and everything I ate was .
Im from Long Beach and ran into this place by accident best soul food in Sacramento will definitely come back when I'm in town
Crazy busy but worth the wait for take-out.  Yummy friend chicken and super tasty mac and cheese.  Friendly staff!!  Looking forward to going again for dine in service!
I had the pleasure of dining here, and the food was absolutely amazing! Next time I'm going back for drinks.

Anticipated my visit to Fixins for
Over 2 weeks, who wouldn't after 
Reading all those great reviews.
We were greeted by the owner who
Was passing through. That was nice.
I love fried green tomatoes, so for
Starters I ordered them for 3 of us
To share.  We were served 5 small
Slices @  a cost of $9.00.  Ouch...they were ok.
I also love a nice crispy piece of
Fried catfish.  Mine was not that
Crispy and breading fell off each
Time I cut off a bite.
Charred okra doesn't  compare to
Fried okra.
Peach  cobbler was so sweet  and
Needed more  crust.
All in all I tried to accept this meal
And enjoy it because I had spent a 
Lot of time researching all and I 
Mean all 10 or more soul food
Restaurants in the  area and after 
All that I guess my  choice was not 
The  best. Mad at myself.

GOODNESS!!! My first visit to Fixins with my family to celebrate my sisters birthday was great! Walking in the door we felt welcome! I knew I was home when I looked on the menu and saw Kool-Aid...OMG! It reminded me of Sunday dinner at my grandmas house. Food is DELICIOUS! There were nine of us dining, so we tasted a lot of the menu...YOU WON'T BE DISAPPOINTED! I can't wait to get back to Fixins!!!

I just had their 2 piece chicken and waffles and it was delicious: some of the best fried chicken I've ever had! And the compound butter was a great addition. The bourbon and sweet tea cocktail was also amazing; a great balance of flavors, with a hint of lemon and honey, and not too sweet.

The staff were really friendly and professional. I loved how easy it was to order online and the pickup process was super smooth.

Holy cow!  Best meal I have had in long time!  Busy spot for good reason. Good service. Loud but still able to have a conversation. The fried chicken and Mac-n-cheese are the best I've EVER had!  Can't wait to go back.

Chicken was delicious with crispy skin and soft tender meat. Sides we got were collard greens, Mac and cheese and coleslaw which all were rich and tasty. The collard greens were spicy with bacon and really tasty. Atmosphere was also great and modern. Good service as well.
Biggest negative was the peach cobbler that was a swampy mess with no crust and incredibly sweet. DON'T GET THE PEACH COBBLER!! We saw someone with a buttermilk pie which looked delicious though but didn't try it. Overall would come back again but was really disappointed with that dessert.

Really really good... I drive far just to have some. I wills give them 5 stars but not being able to order to go was a little upsetting. Other than that food is great, atmosphere and staff were awesome!!
This is my second time coming. My moms 1st. We will be back!! Food was absolutely amazing.  Customer service on point!

This place is great! They set me up at the counter by my request and I had the smothered chicken. The gravy was great, it wasn't insanely heavy, and the meat was perfectly cooked. I had also never had the tomato cooked green beans I got as my second app, and it exceeded expectations. Then the Mac and cheese was tasty and not boring!

My boyfriend and I were so excited to try this place , we love soul food! We walked in and nobody was around to seat us, the bartender had to let us know someone would be right out. The host that came out wasn't welcoming and was chewing on a toothpick. We chose to be seated outdoors and sat for a few minutes to look over the menu, we never even got water and were overlooked numerous times. Workers even came out to talk to the other tables who were eating but not once approached us. And it was not busy. The vibe was very unwelcoming, like we were invisible. Very unprofessional. The bartender was kind tho and apologized as we left. We felt outcasted and like our business was not wanted or needed. There were 3 hosts standing by the door who saw we were waiting but maybe its not there job to notify a non-existent waiter or waitress. All in all, after a long wait we left hungry and disappointed

The food was good , but I love a place that has good service and sad to say fixins didn't provide that! The only person that was a pleasure to interact with was a waiter named Gabe, he was really nice. The other waitresses seemed angry and were heca aggressive and gave me and my family/friends dirty looks and were rude. I asked one waitress if I could have a separate tab from the rest of my party  ( Since it was my first time at the restaurant I didn't know you couldn't split the tab until later on ) , she looked at me like I said something dirty to her and said " NO" with an attitude and walked away. Later on i asked for a water from another waitress who seemed annoyed to be serving the table and she just looked at me and then left and never came back with my water, I asked the same waitress who had previously told me " no " and walked away if I could have a water and she brought me a DIRTY glass with either food or something frozen in the cup with little red particles floating around in it. When it came down to pay the same rude waitress from before tried to act all nice and everything which seemed like she just wanted to make sure she got a tip. It was definitely one way to Mess up a graduation lunch plus she double charged us twice and we had to fix it which was extremely frustrating. My " tip" for the waitresses that were rude  is DONT treat customers rudely and don't give them dirty dishes .  Hopefully the company gets better waitresses soon!

This was by far the best experience I've ever had with customer service. They were all amazing and prompt to get or bring anything that you asked for. They made sure you felt welcome and small talked with you. They have AMAZING food. EVERYTHING was delicious and I highly recommend this place to anyone that wants some amazing chicken and waffles. Definitely coming back!

First dine-in restaurant after lifting of Covid-19 lockdown. Was not disappointed at all! Had to try this place after reading all the great reviews. Was not disappointed at all! Ordered the Smothered Pork Chops with Red Beans/Rice and Collared Greens. Wow, that gravy! I'll be returning to order this selection again. Two things that prevented this rating from being 5 stars: long wait for food to arrive and the lemonade. 
Another reviewer had mentioned that the lemonade was too sugary and not lemony enough. I concur. I was not impressed by their lemonade. But I'll definitely be back for the food. Added bonus: got to see Kevin Johnson directing his staff and saying hello to me and all the customers :)

When your Online ordering is down Customers should be able to call in their order pay over the phone so you don't take a lost and pick it up when ready instead of being asked to come and wait in 110 degree heat.

Food was delicious!! Staff was great especially Brittany the hostess . I had the fried chicken omelette with grits. Grits were cooked to perfection , probably the best textured grits I've ever had.. the food came out super quick and it was a packed house. We waited about 45 mins, well worth the wait .. sad part is I was visiting from LA.. KJ we need you to take this to Long Beach , or LOS Angeles Ca ASAP!!

I came in for brunch with my guy and Fixins Soul Kitchen has by far exceeded our expectations! The food was delicious and we absolutely enjoyed the service! Jena, our server went above and beyond for us and we couldn't have appreciated the service she delivered more! Thank you so much for going out of your way for us we will definitely be coming back!

The food here is delicious and reasonably priced. Staff were attentive, personable and down to earth. Their Koolaid was even almost as good as my mother's. The owner came around and checked on everyone to make sure they were satisfied and comfortable as well. I'll definitely be back.

After an all day event we were so hungry and good ol handy dandy Yelp came through!!  After seeing all the great reviews and how highly rated this place was we thought we would give it a try. Boy are we glad we did, we found a gem and will for sure be back!!! We also discovered after the fact that the head chef was in fact a Food Network Chopped champion (a bay area native) we were that much more thrilled to know we had supported this man and his great dishes. I can't wait to go back and try the oxtails, shrimp and grits and much more!!
My first experience with Fixins was in Los Angeles. I was so impressed with the food that I was eager to sample the menu in Sacramento. I found the quality of food to be superior in both locations.

The service here was great. The chicken and waffles were pretty good along with the cheese grits. I tried the fried devils eggs and those were also very good. I would definitely come back to this place and recommend it.

Had the biscuits and gravy the sausage in the gravy tasted a strong flavor Italian sausage great on pizza not good and gravy and biscuits the service was great and the food came fast a lot of people having fun I just don't know sbout the food
Their chicken is amazing and not to mention the kool-aid pickles?! I thought it was a spicy pickle because of how red it was but it definitely surprised me and it's oddly good. I like it!

Heard so many good things about this place! Unfortunately, when I went in the evening time they were all out of the vegan options I was so ready to try. Customer service was great and so were the drinks! I am always willing to try again. :)

I absolutely love this place I always order the smothered chicken over rice and the waffles are really good so is the macaroni and cheese and greens...Sometimes I'll sit in order door Dash and most times the food is always on point
OMG. The Best. Food. Ever. If you're looking for authentic Soul food, look no more! Parking is a little tricky, but it's definitely worth it. We will definitely be back.
Delicious chicken and waffles, friendly service, appealing environment, diverse crowd. No complaints!

We drove an hour to try this restaurant, and it did not disappoint. We tried the shrimp and grits, waffles and chicken, and chicken with Mac and cheese and coleslaw. Everything was tasty.  The only thing I would change is I would get an additional chicken with the waffles and chicken order. Also "Auntie Pearl" made a point to greet all the customers and thanked us for dining at the  restaurant which was such a nice gesture. She seems like a really nice lady. We will definitely be back!

Went there last night and was impressed. Food was amazing. I got the smothered fried chicken. The gravy was awesome. They have unique items as well like kool aid dipped pickles ( weird I know but they were tasty ) and they even have an assortment of kool aid flavors as drink options. Place was clean and staff was awesome. I'll definitely be going back

Amazing food!!! The service was amazing and the wait time was minimal. I'm from Mississippi so I love the opportunity to try out soul food restaurants. This place definitely did not disappoint. I don't know who's auntie was in the back holding it down but I'm glad i was able to enjoy the fruits of her labor. My Mac n cheese was creamy and well seasoned, fried fish was perfectly crispy, greens were tender, and potato salad was hittin. I will be back!

The atmosphere and ambiance was great and the waitress served with great professionalism. As for the food, I was disappointed with the small portions that was served, I ordered the Catfish meal. When the plate came with only 1 Catfish it blew my mind! For the price I would think that I'd get at least 2 pcs. If you go to a establishment and order a catfish lunch you're most likely to get at least 3pcs. Generous portions goes a long way and brings customers back. My  girl ordered the Oxtails, they could have been a little more tender and the rice wasn't fully cooked. I hate to complain because Fixins is a beautiful place. Please accept the constructive criticism as a way to improve a great establishment.
Amee was an excellent server. The food was delicious as well as the locally owned brew. Will definitely come again next time and I'm in town.
Food was delicious, can't wait for my next visit. Mac n cheese was amazing.  The chicken and waffles was also so good.  A must try.

Food is amazing but expect to wait an hour to an hour and a half on weekends! Service is SO SO the waiters are definite entry level. Oxtails are soooooo good and prices are amazing! Also adult koo-Laid is amazing

I hand an order on 4/25/20 place online at 6:30pm I I ordered a thigh and oxtail dinner and a lemonade said be ready at 7pm was there at 7pm a guy asked for my name ok then at 7:10pm a girl came out asked for my name said my order will be out shortly at 730pm they came with someone else order at 8pm I called said I'm still waiting for my order she forgot the lemonade I got home and my order was messed up 1 oxtail little rice more grease got a breast not a thigh

So fun to find some great Southern food in the area. I mean GREAT food! The atmosphere was wonderful, including a lovely patio. Excellent customer service with friendly wait staff. This is my new "destination" restaurant, coming 40 miles from the Sierra foothills.
Just great Food and Service!!! 5 Star Service for sure. Everything I had was delicious and price was what I would expect for the portion. The Ox Tail is outstanding!!!
So excited that they are open right now. Food is amazing. Best chicken and waffle I've had. The deviled egg is a must have.

I arrived at 2:30 put my name on the list got seated about 3:45-4 and didn't leave until about 6 pm...we were very patient considering it's a new place ..everyone is still training (literally training people at your table right in front of you) the bartenders were very rude ..of course our bill was messed up and the manager had to fix it again the place is new so we weren't complaining ...it was also very busy ..they were holding tables because the kitchen was backed up...it was nice to see Kevin Johnson on the floor working and not just ordering people around...the food was very good I'll go back once it dies down ..they ran out of to go containers..I also watched them put someone's food in front of someone let them touch it then realized it was the wrong order and just took it to the right table without making them a new one since it had been touched smh

We sat at the Out Door patio. The Food was very good I had the 3-piece Fried Chicken with Mac and Cheese, Red beans and Rice and Some Grape Kool-Aid. It was served nice and hot. The staff was friendly...the reason for 3 Stars was the Flies, they were everywhere ! The Staff needs to address that, we were swatting at flies the whole time we were there ! Please get rid of the Flies, Staff and Food was Great !
The food!  The staff were excellent and personable.  The location has plenty of parking in the area. Breakfast, lunch, or dinner, it is a great place to "eat drink and be merry."
The food, atmosphere, music and service were all great!  We'll be back I want to try everything, well almost everything lol.

I give this new restaurant a 4.5 stars. We went on a Sunday night traveling from Stockton. 7pm we arrived and got on the waitlist. They don't take phone reservations. We waiting about a hour and a half to be seated, no problem I had already heard there always packed and we had a party of 13. Don't go there starving and we didn't but I must say it was worth the wait. All staff was very friendly & polite the atmosphere was great & everything we ordered tasted really good.

Do NOT let the photos fool you! I just spent over $100 on 3 entrees and 4 sides along w/ some cornbread. I definitely do not recommend wasting money on this food. The cornbread was extremely dry and  hard like a rock. It was dark brown almost burnt  around the edges and outside of the muffin. My daughter and I were craving potato salad so we ordered two sides of potato salad and it tasted like it had a lot of white pepper or something similar that left a nasty taste in my mouth. The mac n cheese was basically noodles and cheese no flavor very bland. I offered it to my seven year old and she refused to eat it after taking a bite. My daughter and husband ordered chicken and waffles.  They ordered the chicken wings and their chicken was worse than KFC. It tasted like it was sitting in cooking oil for a while. The waffle was very thin and I've had better. My entrée was the oxtails over white rice and it had no seasoning it's like they cooked the oxtails and they sprinkled the drippings over the rice. I am just upset that it was a big waste of my money. I really thought they would have some type of flavor based off the hype but their food is not seasoned it's very bland. I also ordered the peach cobbler being that it is my favorite dessert, I must say that was the nastiest peach cobbler I have ever tasted. I'm just being completely honest.

My wife and I love Fixins Souls Kitchen. We have taken the family out here twice and were not disappointed. The staff is friendly and the food is awesome. I highly recommend this place for family, dates, or just looking to get some awesome food.

This is a must go to establishment. I loved the food. I ordered the 3 wings, waffles and a side of eggs with cheese. I was disappointed with the eggs was overcooked and they just plopped cheese on top, which didn't even melt....
I was Also disappointed they didn't offer a sample of the chicken gumbo.
I don't know about anyone else but I'm orginally from the midwest but roots from the south (Alabama) so not everyone can make decent gumbo. 
I really didn't want to order it and leave to come home and it be disgusting like my experience from TORI'S place. Nice people but too much heat.
Kevin Johnson you have the makings for great success with your establishment.  I know you can't please everyone but offering a spoon on something, in my opinion would help to sell more plates.
It was a pleasure meeting you today. My aunt was a little nervous to ask for a picture with you. She is here visiting from DETROIT. 

Best wishes, 
Renee

Literally the most unprofessional place ever. Ee waited 20 minutes after being seated and they didnt even give us water. I would never recommend this place to anyone. Worst local place ever. What a disgrace to the community.
This place was just plain smacking!!! Loved the food, decor, and service.  The kool aid was pretty cool.

After hearing all the GREAT reviews about this place, I finally decided to give it a go. The food was way over priced for small portions and extremely salty. The shrimp and grits were super salty and greasy, I couldn't even finish eating it. Mac and cheese had grease left all over the container and was dry. And I've had better chicken from Popeyes. Definitely will not be returning

My first time here, my daughter and son-in-law brought me here for my birthday lunch.  And it amazing.  Auntie Pearl came over and introduced herself and she is so sweet.  Definitely will return and tell family and friends.
We came in to an empty wednesday afternoon and still had to wait an unnecessary amount of time. When the food finally came it had too much sauce to eat it.

I would give it 0 stars unfortunately. I'm from the south and just moved to Sacramento and everyone has been tell me and my husband to come here. The food is very bland and I really don't understand how it has so many great reviews. This is not true soul food. I would love to try a actual good place with good food.

All I can say is all the praise is deserved and well earned.  The ox tails are amazingly delicious.  We haven't had a chance to try the take-away service, but am sure it maintains the same high standards.

Thank you.

Really enjoyed our visit to Fixins! We loved the fried green tomatoes, chicken and waffles, and mac n cheese. For dessert, the bread pudding was amazing, especially the sauce. Service was super friendly, and the decor/ambience was warm and cozy. Can't wait to go back for brunch next time!

The BEST soul food in Sacramento!!!! Literally every dish I had was amazing. I loved the service. Great atmosphere and beautiful art on the walls. Kevin Johnson was moving about being attentive to all the customers and staff. I had the 2 piece chicken meal with greens, mac and cheese, and candied yams. The white meat was seasoned perfectly and fried to perfection. No hot sauce was necessary giving LA's Roscoe's Chicken and Waffles a run for their money. The greens were full of favor no salt, vinegar, hot sauce or anything else needed. The mac and cheese was definitely made from scratch and a perfectly crispy top. Candied yams were. My bestie had the Catfish and she loved it. Everything was. I'm proud of this restaurant and what it brings to the community and represents. Great job Kevin Kohnson and Thank you

We had lunch at Fixins yesterday around 1:30. It was packed. The wait was 45 minutes, which they informed me it would be. I was ok with that. We just walked around, got a cup of coffee at Old Soul which is next door. There is a nursery near by and bookstore you can visit while you wait, because they text you when your table is ready. Which I like instead of that Hockey puck looking thing. I had the Oxtails over rice with black eyed peas, which were delicious. Me, eating and cooking soul food all of my life I'm 59, you have to know what you are doing when cooking Oxtails otherwise they can be rubbery. Theirs were falling off the bone tender, and perfect seasoning. I highly recommend this place. The service was great and everyone was very nice, and the customers were having a great time too. We also had the fried chicken wings which were delicious and tender. I've never had chicken that crispy, loved it.

Wow! The food is fantastic and fresh (fried chicken, oxtails Mac and cheese, GRITS, etc..) but I really want to talk about the ambiance. It's a great atmosphere but whoever devised that play list needs to control national radio! Food tastes even better when listening to Prince, MJ, TLC, Destiny's Child, and more 90's hip hop. CANT wait to go back

Food was good but my entire family got bad food poisoning . 0/10 please do not go there . I have went twice both times I've gotten very sick . Not sure if they are serving old food or if it is contaminated . This place needs to get shut down .

I recently made a to-go order at Fixins. I had eaten there before and really enjoyed the oxtails so I decided to go back for more. I was sorely disappointed upon attempting to eat my meal. The oxtails were beyond salty. It was ridiculous. I literally could not enjoy one bite. Also, the quality of meat chosen for the dish was beyond subpar. The pieces were filled with fat and held very little meat. So in the middle of this crisis, I left my house and risked the possibility of getting COVID-19 just to end up with high blood pressure due to one meal at Fixins! I would seriously suggest training your staff to not overseason the food! $19 is far to much to spend on an unedible meal!

Fixins Soul Kitchen is our new favorite soul food restaurant.  I had the shrimp & grits, and they were SHRIMPA-LICIOUS, aka fantastic!  My husband had the better burger and added a fried egg, it was the BOMB!!!  You ask why was it the BOMB???  Well let me just say, the burger was filled with pimento cheese and perfectly seasoned, with the best burger sauce ever!  Instead of fries he had the Mac & Cheese, VERY GOOEY and RI-RICIOUS too.  We also tried the deep fried deviled eggs, wow what a flavor blast served up with a nice salad with a light French dressing & bacon bits!  The food, the drinks and the service were phenomenal!  We'll be back to try the catfish & fried chicken next time.  Thank you Chloe for the excellent customer service.  The added bonus to our visit was being greeted by Kevin Johnson.

Man if you love fried chicken, this is the place! There was no wait for us on a Sunday afternoon, we got seating right away outside. I had the 2 piece chicken with creaser salad, Yams and biscuit with their berry butter and my boyfriend had the waffle and chicken. We were both very satisfied. The great thing I liked about this place is that they give you the option of what piece of the chicken you'd like. Weather its the breast, thigh, leg, etc.. I'd come back for sure.

GIncredible. The menu is available welcomeall day -and I have been looking for good fried chicken since I moved to California years ago. I found it. Chicken is awesome, and exactly what I would expect in the South. If you enjoy fried chicken, make its point to go!!

Absolutely HORRIBLE SERVICE, I will never go back. The first time we came here I enjoyed the experience so much that I came back a second time. BIG MISTAKE, they really need to stop hiring inexperienced waiters & waitresses.

My family and I have dined here many times. The service and atmosphere keep us coming. Although the food is quite tasty it is NEVER served hot. Most times it is barely above lukewarm. I will continue to come and recommend Fixins to friends and family. I am hopeful that one day I will be served a HOT meal!!

So didn't know it was a soft opening but we saw people in there and we wanted soul food. Well! Mr. Johnson sir! Thank you. Thank you for a NICE soul food joint in my hood. Thank you for greens I didn't have to fix up. My mom and daughter had the ox tails,  I had the smothered chicken and my 2 yr. old grandson Tore through them red beans and rice. We were too full for dessert but I will be back for some red velvet cake and lemon bars!!!
This soft opening is amazing, vibe is good, staff is very attentive.  I love this.  Art is the best with Milton 5 10

Amazing food! If you live in sac you must try this place! Great customer service. Came here on a Tuesday around 1:30pm and the place was packed. Had to wait 6-7 mins to get a table but that just means so many people love this place! Great atmosphere and all the employees were friendly and had great service. Felt like eating at Grandma's dining table. Got the chicken with gravy and it's the best I've ever had. Will definitely recommend this place to my friends and family.

This has nothing to do with the food. I just will NEVER patronize another black business again because I'm always end up dissappointed.. How are you going to have a restaurant with no to go orders. So went to this place today asked for to-go she said sorry we don't do to-go orders. This is absolutely ridiculous you are freaking restaurant so you got to sit at restaurant that you don't feel like sitting down because you don't feel all that great and listen to some loud as music and loud as conversation I will never come back to this crap. Their are losing so much money I waled out..
Omg the music is so relaxing the food is top of the line the drinks could be better but that's just my opinion overall a recommend this place of your looking for some good soul food
Fabulous fried chicken! Only reason I couldn't give it a 5 star was because of the lack of parking.
We drove 2 hrs to meet with friends overseas. We all were impressed with the customer service provided, food and atmosphere were amazing! I can't wait to go back when is sitting indoor.

I just moved here from the bay area and heard so much about this place. I have to say that my first time was sooooo yummy, that it has become date night restaurant, special occasion spot, and drink & Apps meet up spot. The staff is super friendly and I have only had the best experiences.  Love this place!!

I must say the food and service here is Really Really good. Was in town for about 4 days and I went for lunch on my first day, and Th en came back and had dinner the second day. 

On Sunday it was PACKED (so I advise you to get there early, because even at the bar we were elbow to elbow). The variety Kool-aid drink options were very catchy. My one and only complaint about this place is they don't have baked chicken options. I'm from the Midwest but the roots of our city is from the south, and when I tell you there is NOTHING like some baked chicken, yams, Mac and cheese, and cornbread....... Man oh man. They have this option but only with fried chicken (which the chicken is fried perfectly and seasoned very good). 

Thanks to everyone here who made my first time to Sac a memorable one. I told everyone in the office "if you haven't had Fixins I suggest you go ASAP)". I'll be coming here again for sure my next trip back to Sacramento. 

St. Louis

Service is slow but our waitress Erin was awesome! She was very helpful and did her best in trying to accommodate us. The food is delicious. We had the chicken and vegetable omelettes, very good. The peach cobbler was very good, just like home.
Amazing . Mouth watering. Great Mac and cheese and the best chicken in sac . Line was a little long but so worth it
The atmosphere was beautiful the waiter and waitresses were pleasant and clean and  accountable. Most of all the food was delicious.

For my first time here it was good. The only thing i didn't like was the chicken and that could just be seasoning wise. Other then that. Delish! I tried the Mac and cheese along with the yams and they were very tasty! Love that there was gospel music playing on a Sunday afternoon and the establishment had a very diverse crowd. I'll be back

Originally gave this place a good review... this last experience I had (a whole two weeks later) was so bad in comparison. This time the waitress was a bit rude, she never came to check in on us after sending the food to the table with a few wrong orders, and I almost didn't get my drink if it wasn't for me pointing out that my drink had been sitting at the bar for a min. Yes, it was a little busy but not as busy as it got when we were about to leave (it was 5:45 when we came in on a Friday) I was told it would be an 11 minute wait for the greens 10 minutes after I ordered which I agreed to wait but when my food came out before the greens I proceeded to eat my food slowly until the greens came out, and then they finally came out... on someone else's plate. The food that did make it to my mouth from the plate was just okay compared to last time. After this experience I'll be back to give y'all another chance only because it's a black owned business and I don't believe in just giving up on our businesses butttt... DO BETTER so that I can FEEL better about spending my hard earned black ass money in this bih. THANKS, management!
Love love love- oxtails, catfish,  chicken all amazing!!  Can't go wrong with the Drinks and sides either.

Got there we were seated it took 35 minutes to receive our food the food I had was good but not the hush puppies any how my friend ordered her food to go they forgot several items plus didn't bring her drink until we was done eating they need to have better customer service.

Great food, drinks and atmosphere. My friends' wings looked fabulous. The black eyed peas and rice are vegan, and were phenomenal. They are crafting up a vegan menu currently so be on the lookout.  A wonderful and welcome addition to Oak Park.
Authentic black soul food! Very flavorful best I've had in Sac hands down. Service was exceptiomal. Kevin was in the house, very humble brotha. I will definitely be revisiting this spot again..

We had a horrible brunch experience. We must've been there for 1.5 hours. Don't come here if you are in a hurry. The service was SO slow, we had to ask the busser to send our server several times. It took forever to get an order in and for our food to arrive. They brought coffee but couldn't refill because something broke or we were told no one could go get the coffee. Ugh ok. There is a coffee shop next door I guess you can maybe borrow some??! And since when do they serve cream and artificially flavored milk in those tiny plastic containers? The food was ok. It came to us cold probably because it sat waiting for our server to deliver it. Maybe just a miss today but don't think I'd return or recommend.
So good! Lots of food for the price! I got the catfish which was great as well my buddy's gravy smoothed chicken. Staff was attentive  Exactly zero complaints and only praise!

This food was like coming home for me. I've been all over Sacramento looking for something this good. Now call me a food snob if you like ... but coming from the bay area and the great state of Texas I have high expectations . We ordered the oxtails catfish greens Mac n cheese kool aid and banana pudding. The portions suit the prices perfectly*. The meat fell off the bones and seasoned like gran was in the kitchen herself. The fish was crispy and the Macaroni and cheese was baked to perfection! My only complaint: 5$ for kool aid*???  I feel like I need to drive down there for a free refill  when this quarantine is over .... me n honey are definitely going to be regulars at this place.

I have dined twice at Fixins, I had the fried chicken and waffles it was very good. My only complaint is the portion size was to small for the price. My guest stated that no one should leave a restaurant still hungry. The decor is great, our food arrived hot our waiter was polite and Friendly.  The dining area was clean as well as the outside   most All very important the bathroom were clean. 
I enjoyed  my dining experience and will return.

Went here for brunch the first weekend it opened. Was seated within 30 minutes and our waiter was friendly. I had fried chicken wings with grits and potatoes and their peach cobbler for dessert. Everything was delicious and I can't wait to go back!

The food was the bomb!  I had the fried chicken with okra and candied yams for my sides. Maybe my mom's fried chicken is a bit better but that is a very high bar and Fixins' chicken is right up there. I can't say enough about the sides - simply fantastic. The biscuit was also fabulous and the surprise was the grape jelly butter. It added just the perfect amount of sweetness. 
My son got the chicken wings and he was equally impressed. He thought it was the best restaurant he had eaten at (in his 11 years of life ;)) 
I only took off 1 star (and it would have been a 1/2 if I could do that) for the noise level - too loud, and the temperature- too cold. 
Go eat here!
The food was ok. Service was a bit slow. Dessert was good. Waited about 30 minutes on a Friday evening/night to be seated.

First off i love the venue and location. The service was excellent very knowledgeable and warm. Now for the food. One word DELICIOUS!! Great flavor and seasoning, what you expect from a quality soul food restaurant. I will definitely go back!!. Blessings.

I couldn't even tell you how the food is because after being seated I wasn't spoken to for 20 minutes. No host, no waters, no silverware... when you want to spend local but get service like this is the reason people stick to chains

The every first time here and I came for breakfast with my friend. The breakfast food was amazing, we are surly planning on coming back for lunch. Chole was our server and she was very helpful and great at her job!

I had a great experience at Fixins Soul Kitchen. I ate there with my family on Saturday 2/8/2020. The wait was a bit long, but it was worth it! The staff was extremely helpful in giving tips about the menu. I live in North Oak Park and I am glad to have a restaurant like this in the neighborhood! Looking forward to continuing o dine here in the future.

This place is downright AWESOME!  Love the fried chicken breakfast omelette!  After two months, waiting for the crowds to clear some, I made it in!   8:45, on a Sunday morning.  Crowds are still falling out the door whenever I go by.  Looking forward to going back!

i give service  five stars but i wish i could say the same about the food.  i ate here december 28, 2021, worst food of my life i was with a party of eight. no one was happy‍i wanted to go because so many ppl spoke greatness about them, either they was drunk or don't know good food‍ the waitress was a gem. i am at  lost  for words about the  food. we waited one hour to be seated. the  food still came out cold. the chicken wangs were terrible the mac n cheese was a mess. oh my god!!! the oxtails, tuff, tasteless. kudos to the fried green tomatoes. nothing to write home about, but they was delicious. but fixins y'all need to fixen that... i had to give yall one star, for the best waitress everrrrrr!   my experience  on a scale to 0 to 10...
I had smothered pork chops that could have been cooked a little longer . But the sides were bomb except the yams , they were terrible . The greens Mac and cheese , rice & beans were great .

Spotted fixings on instagram and made it a must when I was in the Sacramento area . It's such a cool hip trendy spot , the service was excellent, the food was good , would definitely go back to try other things on menu.

I used to love this place. Today I was picking up my order and it took another 45 mins! That means they didn't even make my order until I got there. The main reason why I'm giving such a poor review is the workers were very rude and cared. If you are overwhelmed and frustrated do not take it out on the customer. I'd rather go to South for my food (the fried chicken) in my opinion is much better there anyway!
The coffee, food and service was the best! Great atmosphere and vibe and the staff were very friendly and attentive.
Amazing customer service and ever so delicious food! People think "fried chicken is the same everywhere" -- I beg to differ!!!

the food was amazing I had the catfish and red beans and rice and greens  I also got sac town mango lemonade it was fire! Got seated right away and got service fast ! We came about 7pm! Great time to come on a Sunday! We got our food and eat it 35 min! We definitely coming back again !!! Great music also ! And great prices ! Even the water was good! Key was great and on top of helping us!

Been wanting to try this restaurant out and I finally decided to go today and wow, the food was incredibly good. Best Mac & Cheese I ever had from a soul food restaurant & the catfish was nice and crispy. Definitely will be bringing my family here soon.

Was excited to try out Fixins and to support a new spot in Oak Park. There are some hits and misses here. Four of us arrived around 4:30pm and there was no wait. The decor was fantastic. Loved the energy and large booths. We all ordered drinks, none of which were very good. We all decided we would skip the alcohol next time and save some cash. I ordered the Chicken and Waffles. I am not a huge fried chicken fan but I will say it was the best I have had in Sacramento. The waffle was perfect as well as the syrup, but the cinnamon-ish flavored butter threw me just a bit. I didn't hate it but would prefer a honey butter or just plain butter. By the end of the meal it had grown on me. My wife had the fried chicken with Mac n cheese and greens. The greens were fantastic but the Mac n cheese was cold, bland, and dry. One of my friends ordered the red beans and rice..:also cold but flavor was good. The biscuits were average and again the four of us were put off a bit by the butter flavor. In a nutshell, some good and some not great. We will try again. The service and overall ambiance was nice.

A quick update. Immediately after I posted this I was contacted by the restaurant to clarify issues and they informed me you can order regular butter with the meal. Great customer service! I will be back with friends. They are off to a great start and clearly care about their customers.

This is by far the best fried chicken in Sacramento. All of our guests loved the food. The Fixins were all great. I had the Mac n cheese & grits and cheese, they were killer! My dad loved the creamed corn! Great vibe and usually has a wait. Can't wait to come back.

This place is solid. It's a wonder why this restaurant isn't famous nationwide, from its incredibly attentive and friendly staff to the authentic, freshly made food. The only downside are the lines, but usually get a seat within 15-30 minutes.
Excellent food and the service was out of sight! I had the oxtails, rice& gravy, and greens. The tropical punch Kool aide was off the hook. I will definitely be returning .

We were returning from a trip from Denver to the Bay Area and honey'd  been craving fried chicken the whole trip. Yelp helped, and here we went. COVID-wise, the restaurant took good care of us and all its customers. Nice work! Food-wise, this is some damned good victuals!! Honey got her fried chicken, and I got the chicken and waffles. Honey had sides of collard greens and mac-cheese. Just go, the food is great. Downside for us was the Lavender Lemon Drop - the bar was out of lavender. Rather than serve us a normal (and weak) lemon drop, it would have been less awkward had Sean the server just let us know the nuance ingredient was MIA. No ding to 4 stars, weird things happen during COVID. We gave back the drink, we weren't charged. No harm, no foul. Fixins wasn't rocking the Monday we were there, but it deserves to! Thanks!
Great service. Amazing food. They will blow your socks off with their delicious plates, appetizers, and drinks.

We have had lunch & dinner at Fixins a couple of times & we really enjoyed the food & the friendliness of the staff. 

We enjoyed it so much that we decided that we wanted to bring our guests after our wedding ceremony on January 8, 2020 to partake in some really good soul food. We all left the restaurant satisfied and full.

Thank you Brian Rhee for contacting us on your day off & for talking our calls so late in the night. You were a Big part of making our dinner at Fixins most enjoyable.

Thank you Nicki G. for your fabulous, timely, & super friendly service.  We look forward to seeing you at our next visit.

Thank you to all the staff at Fixins with which ever role you played in making our day as beautiful & enjoyable as it was.

Mr. & Mrs. Sims
Really good! Service was a little slow but I didn't mind much because I know they were busy and our waiter was still super helpful when he was at the table. Fried green tomatoes were yummy

Great food chicken was phenomenal
Great drinks I had NO sweet tea
Very cool patio and dining room that has a great indoor outdoor feel 
Highly recommend it.

Was excited to see what all the hype was about! Everything lacked seasoning and salt which was surprising to say the least. The fried chicken had no seasoning, the breading was more than bland. The meat was moist, but also had no flavor. The catfish had the same breading so also a fail. The hot chicken sandwich was basically a bland chicken sandwich with buffalo sauce. My friend loved the shrimp and grits and macaroni and cheese, but everyone else was really disappointed with their meals. The service was decent, but could never make up for the lackluster food.
