Won't be going back.
Fixings was amazing great customer service music and delicious food Nataya our waiter was very nice and so was the staff!

Is two hours worth the wait? I personally don't think any food is worth that kind of a wait, but that's a philosophical question we needn't go into, and penalizing a restaurant for the wait, due to high demand, is unreasonable so I'll just stick with the quality of their food. The food was great and we all enjoyed our dishes. The fried chicken was the best and if you don't like heavy seasoned chicken then this is the place! The skin was light and crispy and the meat was moist and delicious. We also tried their desserts and my daughter was practically scraping at the bottom of the skillet for more peach cobbler.

Third time this week! Really good so close to my job! I have no complaints about anything! Shrimp and grits, chicken and waffles, oxtails, rice and gravy, greens all were good! Drinks good and please don't forget the peach cobbler ‼smacking

This is the best soul food restaurant Sacramento has ever had, every dish was delicious! This is a slap your grandmother soul food kitchen. Kevin Johnson did Sacramento proud when he opened Soul Kitchen Fixins. The staff is professional and friendly and you'll love the atmosphere. Go check them out! fixinssoulkitchen.com
I've waited a long time for Fixins to open and it was with the wait. So far I've tried the veggie omelet, chicken and waffles, and gumbo. It's all be excellent

Well I finally made it to Fixins Soul Food kitchen on yesterday Saturday around 1 p.m. the buzz of the restaurant was awesome it was busy a lot of people talking great atmosphere! We opted to sit at the bar because it was quite busy. both bartenders at that time were totally awesome the drinks that they were making looked really really good my friend had the sweet tea and I had the gentleman's martini dirty. We ordered the fried green tomatoes as an appetizer I had the catfish with greens and yams and my friend had the fried chicken with collard greens and the mac and cheese. My main complaint was the time it took to get the food. It took 15 to 20 minutes to get the appetizer and over a half hour to get our meals. that was the biggest turn off for me because then I was really critiquing the food. Are greens were not hot my fish was hot and my friends chicken was hot the greens we're okay nothing to write home about maybe a little bit more salt. I had the corn fritters well I thought they were burnt because they were so dark brown but when I bit into it it tasted okay presentation wise thumbs down. I would go back if I just had nowhere else to go and wanted to take someone just to hang out. I rate the cocktails of 5 the meal is a 3 + because of the weight and the warm greens.

Fixins is the bomb, ya'll! Best fried chicken I have ever had in my entire life! Sorry, Grandma. When anyone asks for a place to eat in Sac, I tell them about this place. The food, the service, and the atmosphere is #1. It truly is a 5 star restaurant. I highly, highly recommend you give them a try!
Good good.  Tasty.  Service only ok.  Drink took almost 30 minutes.  Banana pudding 20 minutes to grab it from the fridge.   But the food was tasty
Re. Owner's response: you wrote, "... it defaults to 18%." So it's on me to know that I have to make a choice or suffer the default? Like I said, scam.
Not everyone was welcoming. The only nice person was the older lady bringing our chicken out. So much for "southern" hospitality. Food was good. Big portions.
They take chicken and waffles to the next level! Awesome people great food great place! High recommend specially if you never tried the chicken and waffles!

This is my favorite soul food restaurant in town.  The service is great, the ambiance and food is excellent! The catfish, catfish nuggets, and chicken wings are great, seasoned to perfection! Chicken & waffles are delicious.

First time here and the food was amazing. Best soul food restaurant I've been to. The environment is chill, staff are super polite and friendly and the food is excellent. Literally a circus in my mouth! We will be back for sure!

I heard the food was good but oh man was I surprised.   Shrimp and grits is delicious.  Smothered chicken was fabulous.  All the sides are good.   I love the adult koolaid.   service was great and place was clean.
Good food - but real rough take out process. Expect to wait in line for 10 minutes while a single woman tries to take orders and resolve problems.

The food is delicious but I tried for three days with several phone calls to get a catering menu and a cute price but was unable to do so for an event that was being held. Instead we went in person and we got charged an exorbitant price over $300 for eight people I think they should have better customer service
Ox tails salty yams seemed like they came out of a can I definitely won't be going back just my personal opinion

I've given 3 stars because of the price and and small sides when I ordered to go. I've eaten in person before and the sides were were more reasonable/ normal . The to go contains for the sides holds 2 tablespoons of greens... otherwise the food is fresh and delicious. Again, 3 stars because of price point and portion.

Nia - The Best Soul Food Restaurant in Sacramento, not just good food but good people, good service. Nia is a five star waitress, she is so detail, pleasant, we enjoy her and look for her when we come to Fixin, we will acrually wait for a table she's working. She has become famiky to us. 

Linda H

Fixins is a breathe of fresh air to soul food in Sacramento. Chef Bootz got it totally right! He elevates old school Southern food. The food is AH-Mazing! The staff is friendly. The shrimp and grits were  , the gumbo is orginal "OG" and the chicken sandwich was bomb.com.  The Cherry Drop drink which had cherry kool-aid, vodka and lime was off the charts. We no longer have to travel to the bay area for soul food. Fixins is exactly what Oak Park needed. Highly recommended

Food was very good -- highlights included the Fried Catfish, Fried Chicken, Cornbread (with the lavender-smelling butter; extremely good!), and okra. I had no complaints whatsoever about the food. However, a couple of points for improvement. The online order system told me my order would be ready in 20 minutes (from the time I placed my order). I live about 15 minutes away and I planned on arriving there around 20 minutes from the time I ordered so that I would be able to get my food around the time it was done, so that by the time I got home, it'd still be hot. However, I got a text 5 minutes after I placed the order, saying it was ready. This messed with the timing of our meal and we didn't get to enjoy the food while it was hot/fresh; by the time we got home, it was already lukewarm. Server was empathic but just reiterated the fact that the online system only provides an estimate of when the food is done. Nonetheless, telling me my food would be ready in 20 minutes, then having it ready in 5 minutes, seems to indicate they can coordinate this better. The other thing I noticed was that a few people in the restaurant weren't wearing masks (noticed a patron seated in the waiting area who wasn't wearing his mask; and a couple of people seated in a booth not wearing masks as well). I believe they're only doing takeout for the moment, so I'm assuming those people seated in the booth weren't there to eat food either (since if they were eating food, it'd explain them having their masks off). Sacramento is experiencing an upsurge in covid-19 cases right now and I do appreciate when other restaurants/stores remind their customers to practice safe measures.
Kevin Johnsons soul food restaurant has brought soul food and black cuisine alive again. No place since the days of H&B's has been able to accomplish this until now. You will truly love Fixens.

Wow, Amazing, Creative and owned by a Sacramento Legend but also icon Mr. Kevin Johnson. My Boss, kept speaking about this well established down south inspired little new eatery located in the New Oak Park. Glad we had a business meeting near by or I'd probably pass this shop up seeing how it sits to the side and I'm so judgemental but the appetizers were great and filling then the food came and the portion and sides where very tempting but once you eat it I felt like I was eating my Aunty or my grandmomma's cooking. I didn't want to leave I wanted to order more but we had to get back to the office so instead I tried to savor it and got a togo box. I shall be back!

Fun atmosphere, super friendly hostess and waitress, long wait, good selection on menu. I wanted to like it more, but wasn't crazy about the Smothered Chicken. Gravy was too oily, burnt flavor, and chicken didn't have much meat on it. The greens were yummy though. My Mimosa was mediocre, but Bloody Mary looked good. I'll come back to try something different.

I really enjoyed this place and it's a must try in Sacramento. I got the chicken and waffles and they were very good. The waffles come with some sort of a berry butter and it was delicious. I also got the sweet tea, which was amazing! I love that they use mason jars and the sizes of the jars are huge so you get a lot of it! The place in general is very cute and little things like putting the macaroni and cheese in a little pot (see picture) make this place special. The staff was also very friendly! Would definitely recommend!

The best chicken and Mac and cheese I ever had warmed it up the next day still crispy and very flavorful everything I had was very delicious and bby them candy yams are life the deviled egg omg oh most definitely can't forget about the Adult Kool Aid Amazing it was a a party with my tastebuds the best soul food around

I live in Curtis Park and was delighted to know about Fixins. It's close, but also they serve soul food!  My grandmother cooked like that, so I decided to try it!  Oh, my goodness!  I was so delighted and completely satisfied, I could have danced all night!  I had fried chicken, mac and cheese and green beans.  Loved every single bite to tears!!!  I make pretty good mac and cheese, but theirs is the BEST I have ever tasted!  I love fried green tomatoes.  My birthday is coming up and we are planning to have brunch at Fixins.!  You better believe somewhere on my plate, in between the mac and cheese, etc., there will be fried green tomatoes.....maybe catfish,......oh .YUM!!!!

Fixins has been on my radar for a while but figured Juneteenth weekend was a perfect time to try it since they had a special menu out for the day. We got the 2 sides and adult kool-aid from the Juneteenth menu (wished I tried the red velvet but we were soooo full). I chose chicken and waffles and my husband got the fried chicken sandwich. He was happy with the flavor of the sandwich but felt the meat was a bit dry. I, on the other hand, LOVED my chicken and waffles. I usually get white meat and mine wasn't dry at all. Such huge portions I had to give the other piece of chicken to my husband to finish. The 2 sides we picked were mac and cheese and collard greens, both super good. The adult kool-aid tasted just like kool-aid, which is perfect for me cuz I don't want my drinks too strong, but I could definitely FEEL the alcohol near the end...but don't get mad if you end up pounding one yourself and can't feel a thing, I'm a lightweight LOL. We will definitely be back for more.
Food was sooo good. The only ding was the presence of flies throughout the restaurant. At one point there was a swarm of baby flies while we were waiting and a constant bother of a fly at our table.

Great food nice atmosphere,  But $4 dollars for kool aid is a bit of a stretch and no To go orders is terrible idea especially when the restaurant is always full.
I tried a few things on the menu and I think their chicken and waffles are the best in the West, now don't forget about the greens and cornbread it's off the chain and everyone of their deserts are to die for I also had an lavender martini  I keep bringing friends and family back.

I would say it's the best soul food spot in Northern California.  Everything was perfect. Sweet tea was amazing. This truly is soul food at its finest.  Whoever cooking did they thang.  Even the bathrooms are clean. The only thing I wish they did have was some recliner chairs so you can lay back after eating. Lol. Would definitely come back.

Amazing place  great food music and staff  mac and cheese was heavenly.   Burger was on point and seasoned well  doesn't just taste like another food place. It's like going to grams for a home cooked meal   My boyfriend had the fried chicken and was amazing and delicious. We ordered food to go even though we are stuffed.  It's that good

This place is really good, the price is worth it cause the food is bomb, the staff are really nice, and friendly, I really really loved this place their customer service is top notch.  You should definitely go here, you won't regret it

My wife and myself went for the first time and was extremely impressed with the experience overall. Although we didn't get a chance meet and greet Kevin Johnson who was visibly present in the restaurant. The cohesiveness of hospitality felt from every staff member was undeniably reflective of his person. The atmosphere was spirited with community and ministry coupled together. The food was full of good southern quality marinated in authentic seasonings. I was so impressed I tipped 40% to the waitress and still felt as if I didn't tip enough. Very impressed!

This place was absolutely outstanding. I went here a couple weeks ago and it was very busy and we had to park a couple blocks away to get in! We had about a 30 minute wait, but it was worth it all. We got in and I ordered the basic fried drumstick, we were served with a gorgeous presentation, and it was delicious. The mac and cheese was to die for. They had a great selection and, over all, I would for sure come back here again.

My family and I went on a Friday night! I thought it was going to be busy because it's always busy! Wait time wasn't long at 15-20 mins! The greeters at the front was super nice. Let talk about the waitress! She was super nice, efficient, checked on us! Her name was Netaya (I'm not sure If I'm spelling her name correct)! She was OUTSTANDING! The food was soooo damn good, like I was full as a tick barely could walk out because of how full was. Good service, good vibes, great food! Y'all keep up the good work!
Great food! I wish I had more pictures to share but all I took was a photo of the fried green tomatoes.
We are thrilled to have fixins in the neighborhood. From the decor / family style environment to the super friendly service and the grubbing food we are pleased with every aspect.

5 stars before the Corona. With this lockdown, the menu is shortened. It does not have that on their website. The woman said I was looking at the old menu, but in reality the business had the full menu on their website and did not have the shortened menu. My biggest complaint was were the drinks. I did not order them because I saw people walking away with 12-16oz cups. I asked how big the mason jars are that they usually have for dine in, and they are more than 24oz. They charge the same $4 for each drink, even though the to-go cup is half the size of the mason jar. They should have the to-go cups as $2 or $2.50. It is definitely not worth $4. That cup is the size of a small at Carl's Jr. and McDonald's. Those drinks are less than $2. That is bad business, especially because some people are forced to do take-out orders due to the COVID-19 restrictions. It's not about my wallet, it's about charging the correct price in the first place. During this lockdown, this restaurant is CVS, because even Safeway has discounts.

I've heard so much about this place && been wanting to go since they opened && yesterday my wonderful husband invited me to dinner && this is the place we went, wonderful atmosphere, the staff was amazing && on point, the food was incredible hands down no doubt a bit pricey but well worth it. I would definitely recommend this place all the way to everyone going on a first date or any occasion because if the date went bad the food was always good.

What an amazing experience, Fixins Soul Food was all around the best. The wait time was less than 30 minutes, the service was excellent and the food was amazing. The true definition of a soul food restaurant. Great job Kevin Johnson for opening up this great establishment.

In honor of National Clergy Appreciation month, a group of members took my husband and me to Fixins today after church. When we arrived, we were told the wait was an hour and 15 minutes. I think we waited about 20 minutes or so. The food was great and the portions were way past generous. What prompted me to leave a comment today was the service we received. Our server Ed was super polite and very attentive. He went out of his way to make our dining experience a pleasant one. But I also wanted to give a shout out to Esa. I believe she is a hostess. I'd like to thank her for everything from assisting our elder member to storing our cake AND cutting and serving it and packing/bagging up a boatload of take home boxes. When she was done serving the cake, she thanked my husband for all he does in the community.... so nice. Ed and Esa made an already beautiful day even better. 
#teamfixins
Food was excellent. Seating and service was slow at 1pm. I will definitely go back again, just at a different time.

Went on opening day, the place was packed! I was seated relatively quickly considering the crowd, and my server was prompt and ready to take my order. I ordered the three piece chicken and waffles combo, if I recall correctly it was something like 17 dollars. It arrived surprisingly fast, still hot, and tased even better with the strawberry butter! 

Great food, the only detraction was the noise... the interior is all hard surfaces so the noise inside is really loud. But all things considered you've gotta give them a shot.

After hearing mixed reviews, my cousin and I decided to give it a try. I had the fried catfish with greens & Mac & Cheese it's was absolutely yummy!! Greens were so good ...cousin had oxtails and yams, another win!! Food was hot & fresh and service was prompt and friendly!

I'm a vegan, BUT i absolutely love this place. They have one vegan dish that's not on the menu just ask for the "tofu dish" it's so amazing i love this vegan dish  The staff is so nice and welcoming 10/10 recommend this place, such a fun atmosphere!

My family and i love this place. Not only the food and drinks but the great service and people. Everyone is laughing and having an amazing time, eat great food like shrimp and grits etc.. Thank you for this beautiful space amd great food in Oak park..

I ordered the chicken sandwich, and it was the best one I have had in a while. The fried chicken was THICK but still so moist and meaty. The lettuce was crisp and fresh. The honey mustard sauce was just right (sometimes I'm not a fan). And the kool aid pickle was a fun new treat! They also put regular pickle slices in the actual sandwich, which I appreciated. I also appreciated that they say on their online menu that if they are out of stock on certain foods that they will substitute with others. It's nice that they communicate that ahead of time. When I went in there to pick up my order the owner was right there, doing the books, and greeting people as they walked in. They are also being very careful to keep everything COVID-safe. Adding this place to my regulars!

AMAZING!!!!! Everything about this place is great! Parking is not hard to find, the environment and music is great, and the service is hospitable! The fried deviled were so good we had to order 2 servings. Highly recommend this place and a big shout out to D and Brian for being amazing waiters at the bar!!! Will definitely continue coming! Next time we'll try the breakfast.

Just placed and ate a large order for 5 of us at work. Everyone raved about their food. Fried chicken breading was crisp and had fantastic seasoning. I didn't order the greens but the guys who did said they were some of the best they ever had. Same with the Red beans and rice. Absolutely will be back.

Stopped in to Fixins for dinner this evening and everything was amazing. The wait was shorter than promised, service was excellent, the food was so good and of course the company (my husband) made everything just right. Our server, Damiano was very knowledgeable about the menus--made some great recommendations: ox tails w/rice & gravy,  chicken and waffles-- so good-- just the right amount of cinnamon and butter!! Not just soul food, but real food. My husband said it taste like it came straight out of mom's  kitchen!! Well done KJ & crew!!!

We waited for 35 minutes before ever being acknowledged by our server. The fried chicken was good but the sides were awful. The greens were really tough and the slaw was just cabbage with vinegar and pepper. It was around $75 for two people to eat.
Service was great. Food was excellent and worth money value. I was very satisfied with overall service. Score was A 10

Excellent food, service and atmosphere!  Started with the fried green tomatoes and charred okra...delicious!  Red beans and rice could use a little more seasoning and some sausage, gumbo was good...next time we'll try the deep fried deviled eggs.  The table next to us ordered them and raved how good they were.

i'm genuinely perplexed on the concept of how this restaurant got such high ratings. even though there was about 8 employees walking in front of us without even acknowledging our presence it took about 7-10 minutes to be seated. i would understand if it was busy but there was two couples already seated and eating. as we got seated it took a minute for our waiter to even ask for drinks. but i would say i loved my waitress energy (i forgot her name) . as she took our order she turned around and we immediately got our plates of food. even though it looked good it made me and my partners stomachs very upset. i think the idea of our food being under a heat lamp like it was already premade didn't sit with me right. all in all i would not advise this place and probably would never recommend nor ever come back.
Food is phenomenal , staff is very friendly , played great music , great atmosphere easy 5 star

This place is great! They have fantastic food and a wonderful ambiance. I went here for breakfast and had fried chicken, cornbread, fried okra, and collard greens.  Everything was delicious and I devoured it. I would highly recommend this place.

This is our second time here. First time was for breakfast and this time for brunch. Both of our visits have been A-1. The food is Great and so was their customer service. Listen I just came back from Georgia and this sweet tea here is competing with the south. I like fixin's better. With anything that is good there was a waiting list to be seated, it was well worth it. Great Sunday after church sitting we shall be a regular. Both time's Mr. Johnson took the time to great us which he didn't have to do but it is a lasting impression for me. I've said it time and time again what is lacking in many businesses is good customer service. If you treat your customers well and make them feel like a million bucks guess what? You just might make a million bucks. Great job to the staff at Fixin's. It's such a pleasant atmosphere

Min Gary Smith. SPMBC

The food and the establishment are a welcomed and needed addition to Oak Park. The unique menu selections are delicious and served fresh and hot. The only critique is that there aren't more choices. The wait staff is congenial and upbeat as is the atmosphere at Fixins. They'll surely become a neighborhood favorite.
The food, service and ambiance is wonderful. The wait can be long but it's worth it. So happy to have a soul food restaurant in the South Area of Sacramento.

I Love The fish, green tomatoes  & potatoes salad, The Staff is so friendly and thoughtful I really like Nikki G.she  accommodated me to the fullest... Didn't care for chicken it was pink when I Bit into it
Very tasty fried chicken, biscuit and their delicious butter. We ordered side of collard greens. It turned out to be a good choice. Ordered online and pickup process easy.

I had the opportunity of eating there once. I had only one concern which was that the dish I ordered was heavy on the sodium. When I brought it to the attention of the Waitress he mentioned it to the Cook and I was served a new order with no sodium. Thank you for being considerate, I will come back again and try something else, perhaps the Breakfast dish.
Good job Fixins. 
Thanks Brother Kevin for stopping by our table and chatting with us. That was player.

I didn't want to leave this review but the manager Brian embarrassed my guest and I and extremely mistreated us at our most recent visit. I was required to get my own silverware, correct multiple issues in food and drink orders, grab my own hot sauce, boxes, to go bag and check. Then had our waitress stand over me and take the receipt out of my hand before I had laid all the cash out. When I expressed this dissatisfaction with the manager, he called me a liar, said the waitress said they served me, reiterated that our server was one of the best servers and offer me $4.15 after I was required to come up with my own solution to appease the situation. When I stressed that the $4 did even cover the Mac and cheese he said " fine I will get you another dollar" walked off aggressively and threw a dollar on the table. I was celebrating my graduation here and this was the worst experience I have ever had. Amazing food, absolutely terrible service and handling of issues and I will not eat here ever again. There is absolutely no reason ever why the customer should be called a liar. He made me so angry and felt extremely helpless like this business just took over $150 from us, called us liars and embarrassed after a nice meal of serving myself and my guest. If you watch the cameras you will see a light skin black woman in brown reaching on the drink island where servers grab drinks to steal silverware because our server would not come back to us after food runners brought us our food. 

Any black people sensitive to mistreatment by the Asian community DONT dine here until they have clearly addressed this manager. He rolled his eyes, huffed and puffed at us, threw money on our table, repeatedly said servers were in disagreement with us. I wasn't aware that servers, who weren't serving us or honestly ANY servers in general to say that a customer is lying and that actually be presented back to the customer as a valid reasoning for why they will not rectify the issue in a meaningful way. The manager disrespects black customers, disregards legitimate issues and will have you leaving feeling violated af.  I will continue to reach out until this service issue is addressed properly. Aunt pearl would never have allowed me to leave so unhappy, especially as I had already informed her of my unhappiness with our server before she went home for the evening.
food is amazing. the vibe is on point, the staff is really cool! ready to go back already!

My experience was horrible. I've eaten here before and had excellent customer service. I came all the way from Atlanta and it was my friends birthday weekend. We spent $87 ordered online on 2 orders of oxtails shrimp and grits catfish and sides. The oxtail has very little rice and the shrimp and grits were extremely watery (which isn't normal) I called and the hostess and manager Brian R. offered to compensate the error then THE MANAGER BRIAN called and snapped rudely about what I didn't tell him and because I didn't accept what he wanted to do, he said he would refund my food only after I brought the food back (which he agreed was made poorly and not up to standard) I drove from north Sacramento TWICE to get horrible service and the manager also said he didn't HAVE TO OFFER ME ANYTHING. He then proceeded to take the partially eaten food back into the restaurant and into the kitchen! (It is Covid19 era) The manager made the experience horrible and his food was not correct so he should went out of his way to fix his mistake instead of being rude and inconsiderate! I also had to back inside to receive confirmation on receipt. Truly disappointed because I was looking forward to the food and I've given great reviews to my peers about this restaurant and I will never refer anyone else there. Horrible time to provide bad customer service
Wow! Excellent food, service, and atmosphere. Even great for our five year old, picky eater.

We have eating here twice.  Excellent food.  Chicken and waffles with biscuits and gravy are perfect.  We look forward to eating here every Sunday morning.  Excellent service, highly recommended...  unique atmosphere that you will only find in Oak Park which fits perfect.  The most diverse crowd in any restaurant, the entire experience is wonderful



Phil D
Absolutely loved the food here!! Good service, quality food & even got to see Kevin Johnson as we walked in. We will definitely be back!!
Nice time. The waiters was nice. The food was delicious and the bar tender really know how to make drinks

I've ate at this place once!!! Just once!!! And I've had the worst experience out of any restaurant I've been to, the manager is sooooo disrespectful and the employees are so nice but I just see a giant dark cloud hovering above these employees it's just so sad... If I can see a underlying work issue as a customer there MUST be something wrong with this business. The food is okay and the service was really good, management was the worst though...
Slow service and rude staff! With all the competition out there you'd expect friendly  knowledgable staff.

Very good food, excellent atmosphere. The servers were attentive, lively and checked on us often. I ordered the oxtails & friend ordered the fried chicken . Only thing I wasn't wild about was the peach cobbler. I'll definitely be back to work through the menu .  Ohhh, also tried the fried deviled eggs  sooooo good!
Tried for the first time and it was good! The food was tasty, the prices are reasonable, and the service was fantastic.

Lovely and welcoming environment. I especially enjoyed the selection of Gospel music being played on Sunday. Its the perfect place to go for a Sunday meal after church. My favorite appetizer was the deep fried deviled eggs and I appreciate the new and improved mac n cheese side fixin, very cheesy and delicious!

What I was most impressed by was the attentiveness of the staff. An employee by the name of Louis overheard me trying to flag down my server and he kindly offered to assist me with water and first aid accomodations for my pounding headache. This made my dining experience more comfortable and enjoyable as I was contemplating leaving or taking my food to go. 

Phenomenal work guys. The menu and staff and are fabulous. Keep up the great work. I will definitely be back soon and very soon!

I've only eaten here a few times but I've really enjoyed the food.  The fried chicken is very tender and the cole slaw and black eyed peas are both great (these are my go-to sides).  Also, they make great mixed drinks!  And the service is really excellent -- host at the front the last time I picked up gave me a tip on the best way to order online that I really appreciated.  Will be back soon!
Oh man I don't even know where to begin. Maybe the best fried chicken I've ever had. Collard greens were everything I'd hoped for. Cannot wait to return

Fresh food, seasoned well, good size portions and even when they are busy the service the food came out timely and they have never messed up my order!   If you haven't already go check them out and don't forget the apple and almond butter!

Welcome to the community! I brought my daughter there for her birthday and she enjoyed it. The food was great and we will eat there again! One thing she ordered banana pudding to go and the portion was so small she eat it in two spoonfuls.Lol
Otherwise, its a Good Soul Food restaurant!

I have twice now to order food from Fixins and give my business to a Black Owned business rather than a chain. After going through the menu and getting my order ready on two separate days, I was informed they were no longer taking to go orders. So if you are looking for customer service, this is not the place. Apparently, they have too much business to care. I am in the high risk group, so my trips out of my house are very few and far between. To make the trip down here only to be turned away - shame on you Fixins!

Just left this place and must say NOT DISAPPOINTED.  Tried the Chicken and waffles, had green yams black eyed peas red beans and rice. Got the ittus one thing I will say for the food to be that good they might need to raise the bar on desert gave 4 a star rating based on that  and will be going back believe that.

Just went to the popular soul food restaurant Fixins in Oak Park in Sacramento. My busser Lou Green was great, very personable and friendly. His customer service was awesome and he definitely should be a server. The food was outstanding.

This is legit southern food.  Just about everything I've had here is delicious.  I grew up in Georgia , and here in California, most southern/soul food restaurants miss the mark.  If I want something authentic, I have to make it myself- but not any more!  I could not be happier that this place opened up!
Excellent quality food, I got their gumbo  and every  bite was edible, so often I find gristle etc  in food,  none here.

I am originally from the SF bay area, and have been living in Sacramento since 2010.  One of the most disheartening things to find out was that there were no bonafide soul food restaurants in Sacramento.  I mean, downhome southern food -- like Big Moma used to prepare.  Sandra Dee's should have been categorized as Creole -- big difference. It was just southern foods prepared HOT.  South is good, but it's been 'elevated' so you don't have that 'Moma in the kitchen cookin' ' flavor.  But this... this is soul food done right.  Not elevated (because it doesn't need to be) nor altered.  Decent serving sizes, plated well, and slap yo' Moma flavors.  I wanted to cry, it was so good.  Nice bartender (had a great Mimosa!!), professional and pleasant hostess and waitstaff... they checked ALL the boxes with this one!  The artwork selected on the walls, the open brick... the old school R&B playing in the background, and TV streaming for those who need their sports fix.. oh - and the automated text system that tells you where you are in the waiting queue.. EVERYTHING was err y thing!!  The Chef is the shyt!!
Make the trip, folks.  You won't regret it.

Southern comfort food is my favorite food on the planet, and Fixins was a pleasant surprise of how AMAZING it was. The wait can be very long, but you can get service at the bar! Definitely in my top 3 favorite restaurants in Sacramento.
Fried Chicken is Bonafide! 1st authentic Southern offering since moving to Norcal. Will stop again anytime near Sacramento.

Came here once before but only for takeout and it was already great. Came back with my cousin last night because was visiting and everything was phenomenal! From the service, to the food, to the beer. S/o Oak Park Brewery! We waited a little over an hour for our table, but Des made sure if it to seat us no matter what. She's the best! The wait didn't feel too long and after getting the food ugh it was so worth the wait! Everything is delicious. Definitely gonna come back and try the oxtail next!
Love this place! The food is great haven't had an bad dish yet. A must visit spot if you love soul food
The food and service was amazing. We loved the collard greens and Mac & cheese. I had the smothered chicken that was cooked perfectly. Definitely a new favorite.

We werehere for the first time tonight. From the moment we walked in, the vibe was relaxed and welcoming. The host was super friendly and helpful (we had our baby with us and she quickly grabbed a high chair and made sure he was comfortable). Our server, Prince, was friendly and attentive. The food was delicious! I had the fried chicken, greens, and Mac and cheese. The chicken was perfectly seasoned and so juicy. Overall, we had a great first experience at Fixins and will definitely be coming back!

UPDATE:
We went back already...still delicious, staff is so great. This will definitely be a regular spot for us.
Love the home base my family goes all the time we needed this spot,thank for bringi g this food to oak park
Always great food and service! Love the fried chicken and fish! Will be back next trip to West Sac!

Environment is really good. Food was excellent. Tasty fried chicken and catfish. Sides were good as well. The mac and cheese is for real. I hope this place stays in the Oak Park corridor for years to come!!!!

I had the hot chicken, which was ok, but not what I would call hot chicken. Would love to see them reconsider this sandwich. Nashville hot chicken is typically juicy, fried and basted with lard and cayenne, served with sliced pickles on white bread. Would be such a simple fix to swap the bun for white bread. I felt like I was eating a dressed up McChicken, not a Sacramento take on a traditional southern dish.

I was more than disappointed by the food at Fixins.  For then high price the portions were meager, boring and the only spice/flavor was salt.  The gumbo had no meat, sausage, chicken, or shrimp. It was more of a thin soup than a stew.  The oxtail had no meat; but, only lumps of fat.  $40.00 for two main dishes that barely fed one person.  Save your money.  Go elsewhere.

FIXIN"S is excellent!  The only bad thing is no To Go orders, I suppose you could order then feel unwell and have to leave? I guess they are far too busy to take on to go orders at this juncture, which is a good problem to have, my food was excellent, not a complaint and I am extremely picky.

the audacity of them to not offer a refund because of the food being salty and nasty!
they are rude on the phone and with service!!!!!
im so livid that i spent my money here and wasted time also waiting for this trash. they didnt want to except that the food was trash and i wanted my money back like except it and move on. salty nasty gross food yuk:-(
Best place to eat and there food is very tasty. I wish they could open other location all across including in elkgrove. What's not to love about this place. Also is very clean too.

I love their energy, the spot is beautiful, with beautiful people and a beautiful surrounding area. If you are looking for some awesome, mouth watering food with a big nice cold beverage, you gotta go here. I've never had such amazing tasting chicken and waffles, and lemonade !!  Wow!! This place is wonderful, please support this amazing business(-:

Best Soul Food I have had in a long time and in restaurant!!! The atmosphere is great and all the right music, had me back about 20 years.  My husband is from NC and I will tell you it felt like we were eating at his Aunts house.  Nothing like some Mac n Cheese that tastes just like home.  

I wish we had a place like this in Oregon. We currently live in Medford and could definitely benefit from Fixins in our community.  There is no soul food restaurants close to us at all.  I believe your restaurant would thrive in our community.
Love Love Love the food !!! Me , My Mom, and daughter went to eat here . Food was amazing and fresh! We ordered the Mac and cheese , greens, and fried fish. I will def be back nice atmosphere to.

I feel like this place is just hyped up. The chicken wasn't great. It had no flavor and was dry. Really expensive for ok chicken. The mac n cheese also lacked flavor. I did, however, enjoy the collard greens. We also received our food cold... the only thing I liked was the gumbo, which is why I gave three stars. Don't think I would come here again.

I went there on Friday for my mother's birthday and we had a hour wait which is to be expected. It took over a hour to get our food. We was seeing people coming after us and leaving before us. The waiter kept coming to us saying our food was coming. We was really ready to leave but we stayed . The food was horrible. I mean terrible. I had some tough smothered pork chops with some gravy that was too hot like they sprinkled too much pepper. The greens was tasteless and hot as well. The fried chicken was bland. We had a group of 8 people and only 2 people enjoyed their food which was oxtails and fish. I only gave them 1 star so I could post this review. Oh the kool aid was the best thing.
Should of taken pic but was to busy eating in car as not from this area but had to try on trip to UC Davis. Had Shrimp and grits... can't wait to go try again...
Best soul food I've had no where else can top it. Best biscuits and service. Don't get me started on the Mac n cheese!!!!

Hands down the best fried chicken I think I've ever had. So crispy on the outside and so juicy in the inside, they definitely know what they're doing here. Thick cut fries and their coleslaw is to die for. I'll definitely be coming back!
great service, Food was not the same from my first visit you could tell it ws a different cook.

Ordered two chicken dinners with sides "to go". Chicken was delicious, cole slaw and Mac and cheese- yum.   Realized after we got home that additional side we ordered (pickles) was missing. Disappointed.  Of course, too late to go back at that point.   I'd definitely go back for the food- but will check the order before leaving the restaurant.
Fire food. Oxtails rice and corn bread was too fire. Good crew, oh and cool aid I as perfectly made. Definitely be back.
Have a craving for oxtails forget buying and cooking come to Fixins. The best soul food in the Sacramento/Roseville area. Great little cozy spot when Covid ends.
Consistently excellent. Have driven all the way across town just for the take-out. Summer is coming and the family can hang out there.
Loved the food and the environment! I had the smothered chicken entree with Mac & cheese and greens! Everything was delicious Sac Proud

Big fan of the Fried Chicken, Catfish and Mac n Cheese.  Clean and popular place to enjoy a meal and drinks.  Service can be a little slow at times, and some may find the menu a bit pricey.  Try the giant jar of some good old fashioned Kool Aid, especially if you crave sugar!!
One of my new favorite local restaurants. Loved everything about it - the food, service, drinks and the outdoor patio.

Amazing new buzz in Oak Park! FIXIN Soul Food Kitchen appears to be a trendsetter, which is reflected by the endless activity of patrons enjoying the special cuisine inside; and friendly chatter from long lines outside while waiting their turn. 

Even though the restaurant tables were packed, food service was relativity fast!

Atmosphere felt "homey" and cozy; Fabulous paintings on the walls encircling the entire room. Noise level was intense. Some adjustment in this area, would be  positive and a major step in enhancing this special gathering place!

My next visit will be my 5th and I'm 'fixin' to make this Kitchen my frequent eating place in Sacramento.

Christine Sullivan

What a disappointment.  I went on a Saturday morning with 3 others.  We ordered the chicken and waffles, Biscuit and gravy and Fried Chicken omelet.  Yes, it's a busy place and we waited for the table and yes we waited a long time for the food, but worst was that the food was served to us cool.  We returned the food and the food came back lukewarm.  The butter would not melt on the waffle.  The waffles were rubbery, yes they were stretchy.  The chicken was barely a 2 star.  We complained again about the cool food.  At least we didn't have to pay for the meal...but we left hungry and quite disappointed.

Amazing. The service is friendly and attentive. The atmosphere is great. There is a nice patio with heaters. The food is truly outstanding. I've had the fried chicken, catfish, and smothered pork chops (not all at once), all great. The peach cobbler is one of the best desserts I ever had, and I usually think it's not dessert if it's not chocolate. GO.

I had the chicken and waffles the first time I went, and they were great! The second time I went, on Labor Day,  I had the oxtails and collards and I was NOT disappointed! Kevin Johnson has a hit on his hands, in my humble opinion.  Everything looks so good! Before it's all said and done, I'm going to try everything on the menu. That's how good this place is. Kudos KJ

Other than the long wait, we enjoyed the food tremendously. I ravished my Oxtails and Collard Greens and my Gurl Kelly had the catfish, collards and grits (of which she was fairly satisfied). The service was exceptionally great, shout-out to our waitress Erin and hostess Brittany. Was even able to mingle with the owner Kevin Johnson himself. We will definitely be dining again.

Service was excellent.  We had the fried chicken and shrimp and grits. Amazing grits. The gravy is a little normal brown gravy. Kinda down played the perfectly cooked shrimp. Fried chicken seemed a little under cooked.  But very good flavor.  I'll be back for brunch. The cinnamon blueberry butter. Holy Moly.  Made up for anything else that lacked flavor. Butter and biscuits come with chicken meal.  We sat at bar because I'm lucky to get seat right away. Lol. Very busy so don't be in a rush. Once I ordered appetizer came in less than 10 minutes. Love this place.
Good food. Nice wait staff. But waitress came to our table in patio and when she spoke, she pulled down her mask. smdh Totally put me off outdoor dining in these COVID times.

The food was very good I have been here Several times  now and have not been disappointed yet the service is excellent it's always clean people polite and yeah I will be back to this place again they are doing things right

A friend and I just went to lunch at Fixin for the first time. We were seated promptly, ordered and received our yummy food in a very timely manner. She had the. Ox Tails w Greens, I had the Shrimp and Grits with a RED Koolaid.... WHAT?!! Yes, and it was all off ther hook, I'm... I'm shocked... I will be back soon.

The restaurant environment is really nice I've been like 4 times the bar is what makes it great like where else can you find a soul food Restuaraunt that sells alcohol now u know damn well a soul food owner that got a liquor license just good ya be the mayor of the city  I ain't mad at  him respect  I love it but yo Mr. Kevin Johnson I came the other day and sat at the bar and y'all brought me the wrong order then when I told them that's not what I ordered they never brought my order out I waited an over I get it y'all was busy but man y'all only had one bar tender working that day as well and he was working his ass off and I know he was frustrated being the only one there but he was still polite and handled himself good I think he was ready to give me my oxtails first free since they had never came back out with them but I was already frustrated and told him not to worry about it. So far y'all are only alight wouldn't be my first choice in sac but y'all ain't bad. If I were to make a suggestion to my liking I'd say get the smaller oxtails  they taste better than the big ones yoU guys sell. Hope this review helps you guys.
I travel all the way to Reno just for this place! Love then environment and food is to die for

Food great!! Customer service, left A LOT to be desired. 

Visited on a Sunday after church let out so it was an hour wait, no big deal and to be expected. Once seated it took about 20 minutes for our sever to take our drink order.  Since it had been so long we went ahead and ordered food at the same time.  25 minutes or more after that our sever came back to our table, no drinks, and said the wifi had gone down so our food order had not be sent back to the kitchen. She retook our order.  Finally our drinks came.  40 minutes after that, still no food, a manager came by and said sorry for the wait, I know it has been a while. That was it, and he started to walk away. Since we had not seen our sever, I asked if we could order another round of drinks, he took our order (meanwhile table after table is being served, no one else seemed to be impacted by a wifi issue). 15 minutes later our drinks arrived, and about 20 minutes after that our food was served.  Here is the kicker, three of our orders were incorrect.  A three piece meal was served with only two pieces, a white meat meal was severed with dark meat, and another meal had an incorrect side. A different manager that delivered our food said he would fix the meat, he did.  We ate, the food was REALLY GOOD, some of the best southern food I have had in a LONG time so that was a plus. We didn't see another manager or server until our bill came. I thought surely our second round of drinks, or a meal would be comped, or an extra cookie would come out to say sorry for the EXTREME wait on food, wifi breakdown, etc. but nope I was wrong.  I had seen one of the managers talking to Kevin (the owner), and thought he is definitely telling him about the situation so at least he can stop by and apologize but nope I was wrong again.  A what should have been 1 hour lunch turned into a 3 hour lunch by no fault of our own, and the response from management was poor. A quite sorry for the wait might work if we are talking 30 minutes, but not hours! Our party of 6 was there celebrating a special occasion and we didn't want to complain about any of this and ruin our good vibe. Maybe if had we made a fuss about things they would have taken their poor customer service more serious.  But then again I should not have to complain for management to do their job.

We had wonderful service and delicious food today; our first visit to Fixins! We had a large party and everyone was happy and satisfied! The fried chicken, waffles, collard green dip, fried devil eggs, smothered pork chops, Mac n Cheese, okra and peach cobbler were yummm! And as an added pleasure, Mr. Johnson was in the house and was so personable and attentive with our entire family. We are proud to support Mr. Johnson and his business!

What a pleasant surprise.  We dined at this restaurant for a joint Birthday lunch for my mom and my aunt and my cousin. First the ambiance and decor are modern but homey.  We were greeted immediately and seated.  The place was buzzing with happy chatter. I ordered the fried chicken red beans and rice and sweet yams. The chicken was out of this world,  juicy favorable to the bone. The red beans and rice were plain but very good. The yams could probably have used more nutmeg and could have been whipped a little more. My guests enjoyed their dishes as well. We were to full to try dessert do next time. The experience for the price was absolutely 4 star.
My wife and I love this place! Any of the chicken there is amazing and all the sides are fantastic! I love the Mac and cheese and collard greens. Great vibe in the restaurant and great food!

I just ate there and this place deserves five stars. The food, staff, music, speakers and timing were all great. The parking is not ideal and I didn't see the bathrooms. I arrived at about 10:40am. It was at least half full and there was no wait.
They have great soul food, their service is awesome and there food is delicious, we where so glad to go there because we met the head chef, my whole family loved there coolaid, 5 s
The food was great, the drinks were delicious, and the service was outstanding. Chandra was our waitress and she made our dining experience very pleasurable. I'd go back again!!!

Attended the soft opening and the food was on point! The sweet tea, fried deviled eggs, fried chicken, and greens....delicious! Even the grape Jelly butter with biscuits was delicious! Definitely my new fav spot, and such a great addition to Oak Park!

I really enjoyed lunch today with my family. My girls claimed they were in heaven. The atmosphere was upbeat and clean. The service was quick and attentive. The food was delicious and much thought and care was invested in the creation of the menu options. My favorite part of the experience was the sweet tea. I wish this restaurant great success! Also, I think it would be cool if the restaurant had a jukebox with blues and other southern music options. Overall, Im a fan.

I had the worse service at Fixins two times In a row. Both days happen to be my on a weekday. I just ordered a veggie omelette and my Tomatoes were not diced and, I had 5 RAW tomatoes on top my omelette, it looked like my daughter made it and presented it to me . My omelette was over cooked and hella dry. And my server was an no where to be found. He literally sat In the Back while I had to fetch for condiments and I never even revived my drink. There really needs to be more supervision on the weekdays. I only had one great experience there and it was with a older lady who was awesome.

Apps came out before our drinks. Our drinks took 20 minutes plus we saw them sitting on the bar for 5 minutes or so.  Our entrees took over an hour to arrive and we all got chicken! Waste of my Sunday.  Shout-out our server cat for making it worth it. She deserves a raise.

Food came out hot and the service was great! Ambiance 10/10. The food tastes as close to homemade as it gets. Highly recommend! And prices were great as well. Can't wait to go back and try more of the menu items. Mac n cheese is a must!
Food is amazing. Best fried chicken in town. The service is always great. Love this place. It's the first place we take people that are visiting from out of town.
Beyond amazing chicken!! I got the two piece one light one dark and it ended in an argument on which one was better!! Recommend to anyone who loves fired chicken

The food was horrible and it was some already Fried Chicken that was reheated up and the price was too much and it does not taste like soul food at all it's not the same way as it used to be when it first opened up is very nasty and also the waitress told us that the chicken was not warm because it's under a warmer they put it under a warmer she had no business telling nobody that is just not soul food I don't know who own it now
The macaroni was so good along with red beans and rice and greens and fried fish ....first soul food spot that actually has real sides

I highly recommend you DON'T go here if you want your meal to taste good, in a timely manner or want what you ordered and good service! I went to Fixins and no one was outside to take my order, so I went inside and I had to ask 2 people as to when someone would be able to take my to go order. I was told To go outside and wait! 10 minutes later I was ordering my food. I was told I'd would receive a text within 25 mins and to come back up there to get it. I ended up waiting 45 minutes for a text that never came, so I called and was told it was ready. Ready but cold and not my entire order was in the bag of which I found out when I got home 12 miles later.....WTF!! I HAD TO HEAT UP MY FOOD AND NO CONDIMENTS WERE GIVEN AT ALL.  PISS POOR SERVICE. I CALLED AND SPOKE TO SOME MILLENIAL WHO TOOK 10 MINUTES TO GIVE ME AN ANSWER AS TO WHETHER OR NOT THEY WOULD REFUND ME.... FOH WITH THAT!! KEVIN JOHNSON COME ON MAN YOU SHOULD BE DOING BETTER! WE WON'T BE BACK.

UNPOPULAR OPINION...I wanted to like this place..I really did.  I visited here from out of town with family who lives in the area.  We ordered fried green tomatoes for our appetizers, oxtails and shrimp and grits for our entrees, collards greens, mac and cheese, okra, and black eyed peas for our sides....when we arrived we were seated quickly however we waited 15 mins without anyone approaching us to bring water or take our drink orders. We got the attention of a waiter to request that he take our order, and waited another 10 minute for our drinks and food which came out within a few seconds of one another.We had to ask again for water. Fried green tomatoes had a good crunch and texture but were not seasoned well. The sauce they came with made up for that. The oxtails were large meaty and very tender but had no flavor and needed several shakes of salt and pepper. The most disappointing part about them was they promised gravy but it its was more like a watery au jus and not hearty enough. The shrimp in the shrimp and grits were JUMBO and looked like new orleans style with a roux base. The grits were creamy and shrimp well cooked but the sauce looked and tasted like it should have been paired with Salisbury steak. It actually would not have been bad with the oxtails. The greens.. whew Chile tasted like they boiled them in vinegar and hot sauce but once again no seasoning. The mac and cheese was just ok. Not creamy but just noodles with melted cheese. It was the most seasoned thing I ate though. This is heresay, my aunt said the charred  okra and black eyed peas were ok but nothing to brag about. After all that, I made the mistake of ordering the banana pudding waited about 20 minutes for it and had to ask the waiter to check on it 3 times. First two times he said it'd be out shortly The last time he said the kitchen was hectic and they'd forgotten about it. I asked for it togo..full disclosure writing this review on the car ride home and am still deciding if I'll even try it.  The only winner in the meal was the cocktails. I got the new orleans sweet tea with bourbon and my Aunt got the lavender lemon drop and both were delicious! All this being said, I do think this spot has potential. The interior and decor is clean and charming and you can tell they use quality food products. If management can figure out how to better expedite service and SEASON THE FOOD (lawry's anyone) I think they can turn it around.

The macaroni and cheese is by far the absolute best I have ever eaten. It is creamy with a slight crust and perfectly prepared. The collard greens required no additional tabletop seasoning as they were presented expertly cooked. The tender greens had pieces of smoked turkey and steeped in a pot liquor that made me want to order more. Finally, I tried the peach cobbler. A warmly spiced, balanced dessert with flaky delicious almost cookie like crust. I highly recommend Fixins and encourage all tongove them a try. The blackeyed peas were on the cold side, thick and lacked the seasonings and care that the other dishes offered.

Finally got to try this place because my son wanted it for his birthday dinner. I really wanted to like it but it was dissapointing! Ordered online and the prices were higher than on the website take out menu for one. Food was ready when we got there and I  should have checked out the order but it was so hot out there just wanted to go home. We drove all the way from citrus heights. When we unpacked the food it was missing 2 sides and order of cornbread. The oxtails didn't look anything like the pictures on website. Looked like a side dish in a small bowl for over 20 dollars. 4 small pieces of meat mostly bone. Chicken was great but upset i didn't get what I paid for! Doubt I will be back when I can get great food from tori's place for quite a bit less.
Great food.  Catfish cooked perfectly. Took off a star because their Peach cobbler had no pie crust in it!

I may just be a broke boy, but I ain't paying no $4 for some kool aid. Food was decent, i got the chicken and waffles. The waffle was on the soggy side, and it had this interesting spread with it. The chicken was cool, flavor was present but not prominent, im just glad it wasn't like the sahara dessert.
I love their fried chicken. I've been here three times, And mac & cheese it's on point!
Great food great atmosphere it's a bit busy most days so would recommend calling in a order or expect to wait a bit but it's worth it.

It has been months, their vegan menu is a farce and just a way to lure people in. For how long now there has been a menu? It has even expanded, but in actuality only the one blackened tofu dish is available. No tempeh, no cashew grits, just a waste of time and disappointment, having settled for the tofu dish multiple times now. Their house hot sauce is tobascoey and weak. The fried okra is delicious though.

finallyyyyy got to try this place out. fiancé and I came in on a Saturday morning. tried getting on the wait list through yelp but wasn't working. luckily, when we got there,m it wasn't too busy. We were seated within 10 mins, and put our orders in within 5. they were advertising some special, so my fiancé ordered that and I ordered the 2pc fried chicken with greens and Mac and cheese. our waitress came back a few minutes later and told us that the special that was advertised was not yet being offered until later in the afternoon. ooooookay. a little bummed, but was happy to order shrimp and grits instead. kind of took a while for us to get our food. two parties who were seated after us both got their food before us, and even got their bill and left before we did. kinda weird. but our food was so good, so we let it slide. ended breakfast with the peach cobbler (yes, I got dessert for breakfast) and was not a fan. canned peaches, flaky crust, and ice cream. not my preference. still would come back tho!

This was my 1st time going there, and I can say I was very dissatisfied with the restaurant. The waitress dropped at tray full of Mamosa's my niece and went on to clean it up but no apologies were given. My 3 year niece hamburger was bloody, it took them 45 minutes to bring her a new one with Mac & cheese, but the 1st one had French fries. My Mac & cheese was dry but when they started bringing everyone else plates there's was creamy... when the manager came out he said he Comp our meals, but you can't comp orders that  no one ate. If we won't ice tea bring your own cause it took 1 hour for my sister to get hers. Then instead of the waitress bringing me my card back she sits it on the other end of the table... This was a negative 3 stars down

Great restaurant for some southern style cuisine. They even have Kool-aid drinks(Grape is my fav) which are awesome. One day during the COVID take out only, Kevin Johnson served our food to our car which was an awesome surprise. Always go for the Fried Chicken but whatever you get you won't be disappointed. From their biscuits and cornbread to their catfish nuggets. This place makes my mouth water just thinking about it. It's an must try for good ol home southern cooking.

I'm so glad this restaurant has patio seating AND heaters. It was lovely to have a night out. Nicki was our server and she was excellent! She provided great drink recommendations and top notch service! We will definitely be back and request Nicki as our server!
Went here for Father's Day, and was very pleased with how this business is following safety precautions during the pandemic. Our server was very attentive and the food was amazing as usual.

A little disappointed, I ordered to go from here and everything was so lukewarm and cold. it did not taste good and by the temp and taste of everything you can tell it was not fresh at all. Normally when I eat here everything tastes amazing but today was a seriously off day for them I'm so sad because for the price you'd expect a little better.

Amazing staff. Food. Atmosphere! This was the best food I have had in a long time.  Everyone loved their meal.  Grits, candied yams, red beans and rice were enough to made this white girl from Minnesota feel like she had a little soul in her.

The first time I went to this restaurant, I was amazed. Food and service were out of this world with the assistance of this kind gentleman. He offered us refills when our drinks looked remotely empty and checked up on us frequently to ensure our food was good. As we were leaving, he offered us lemonade to go as well! Absolutely amazed by that night and thus why I came back today to give it another try. Worst decision made by me in forever. Worst service I have ever received at any restaurant. Once I was seated, the server made me and my girlfriend beyond uncomfortable. Super rude from the start. I asked for to go boxes and she gave me the "tsk" and threw the boxes at my table. Keep in mind, me and my girlfriend have done nothing to her to receive the treatment we have got tonight. And when you think it might get better it gets worse and worse. Food was good until I received my last dish, Smothered Chicken. It was burnt beyond belief and so I told the server and instantly recived attitude and rolled her eyes at me like I said something wrong or said something to piss her off. I simply said the chicken tastes a little burnt and she said basically what is she supposed to do about it. At that point, I was shocked and instantly frustrated. The interaction ended with a "whatever" from her and snatching our dishes away. From that point on to the end of the visit, not one word was spoken from her. Not a "thank for coming" or "have a nice day." I got better service at McDonalds than this, guess I'll take my money elsewhere, at least to a place where they prioritize service as much as they prioritize food. Never stepping foot here again and that's a promise from me.

I've been to the restaurant 5 times.  The food is just ok.  The taste of the food is not very consistent.  However it is a decent place to eat because it's new and clean.  I probably won't be back for a while though because I try to support new establishments but I don't like rude service at all.  The owner Kevin Johnson is not that friendly to everyone equally.  I hate to say this but he was actually kind of rude to my table the last time I went.  He was more friendly when he first opened the restaurant he went around greeting people at the tables.  Not that I expect that every time I go to a restaurant but if I speak to you I do expect you to speak back to me in a polite manner.  But when we spoke to him the last the last time I went he was so occupied with a professional party he was hosting in his private room he threw his hand up and brushed us off. But what topped it off was he still went around and spoke to other tables in the restaurant and never came back around to us. That was very rude of him.  I even bought a T-Shirt that day.  I started to leave it on the table but I didn't.  Sorry to say I will not recommend his restaurant or return for service for a long time!

Worth the wait. First the yelp wait times listed aren't accurate, we arrived and it was a 45 minute wait vs the 12 minute wait on yelp. No big deal we decided to wait and it was worth it. I ordered the fried chicken sandwich with a side of Mac and Cheese. The chicken was season and cooked perfectly, the kool aid pickle was interesting it tasted more like a sweet pickle than anything. The Mac and cheese is really good home style. I tried a piece or the corn muffin with the kool aid butter and I will be sure to order a whole one for myself next time. The food is great and I will definitely be back.

first time, ordered delivery thru door dash and WOW. not only was my meal hot still but it's so freaking delicious! cannot rec'd enough! got fried chicken, with red beans & rice and mac & chz. it was chefs kiss. thank you fixins!
Amazing food and drinks! The service was excellent, our waitress Desiree was extremely helpful and engaging!

Fixins is the best soul food restaurant in Sac, hands down. Their fried chicken and smothered chicken is super juicy and flavorful. The grits with cheese are really good. We love the fried green tomatoes and the sauce it comes with. Their corn bread and the butter it comes with it so incredibly delicious. The Mac N cheese has so much flavor and the texture is great. The kool aid is good. The greens are good.. literally everything we have tried is good.

I am sad to give this a one star, because the food was phenomenal and the atmosphere was great. The service however was so abhorrent: we wasted more than an hour extra waiting for missing items . The server forgot orders, we didn't get the drinks for our meal until the end, I had to ask for things twice, and I had to ask a manager for the bill because the waitress disappeared. It was like it was opening night with no one in charge... next time we'll order ahead and take it out.

I visited this restaurant on Sunday Jan 31, 2021. I requested a table via Yelp app for 3pm. I arrived at 3pm only to be told that all reservations/waiting list are only excepted in person. The wait time was one hour. Finally one hour later I was seated down at a table. I ordered my food which was a smothered chicken, collard greens and yams with red cool-aid. It took approximately 35 mins to receive my meal. This was very disappointing. The chickens gravy was too thick and it had entirely too much salt on the chicken.
The owner Retired Basketball player Kevin Johnson did a walk through and avoided his customers. One Latino man dressed in a suit/tie spoke to him and asked him to come over so he could get a picture and KJ blew him off and replied "I got a meeting to go too". This was very unprofessional and he could've taken one minute to make this man smile and remember eating at his restaurant. I will not be returning to this restaurant. The wait is not worth the quality of food I received. The manager John was awesome and knew his job very well. He was a true professional. I give this restaurant one star.

The crew, the food, the drinks, over all everything was a great experience for my first time there ! Des definitely made my first visit great thank you for the great hospitality it did not disappoint at all!
I went here for lunch on Juneteenth.  Great food, great vibe, good location and great service.  Pricing was perfect too!  If you want SOUL FOOD, this place is a MUST visit.

We ordered our food with a 30 min wait time. It took 1.75 hrs. No explanation or apology. we watched door dash delivery ppl pick up their orders many times before we ever saw our food. the Chicken sandwich is good, but not worth 3.5 times the wait time.
This is one of my favorite restaurants! The waiters are always really sweet and the food is amazing. I've loved everything I've tried on the menu especially the fried catfish and Mac n cheese.
Fried catfish and oxtail  "Yellow Excellence" and "Suspect" have the best customer service. Thanks y'all, I'll be back when I'm in the 916!

I'm giving this place 3 stars 4 right now, I came here with the intentions of good home cooked soul food just like my family made on thanksgiving/Christmas, I ordered the fried deviled eggs, chicken and waffles, chicken sandwich and gumbo with grape kool aid, the fried deviled eggs were new to me but they were on point.! Chicken and waffles was probably the best I've ever had that waffle was something special for sure and idk how that chicken was fried but it was great. the chicken sandwich was ridiculously almost inedible, idk if it was a joke but I had damn near a whole bottle of hot sauce poured into my chicken, and I like me some spice, but it was so much damn hot sauce I couldn't even taste the chicken, the Gumbo was bland, under seasoned just like the red beans and rice were, Disappointing. The grape Kool-Aid was a big win nice big glass mason jar full with the perfect amount of sugar. Aka a lot of sugar. Lol
Amazing food!  Exceptional service!  This place rocks.  They have it right!!! 6 stars!!

I'm so glad this place is open during COVID but sad this is my first experience. It was a good experience for the current conditions.  We just drove over prior to order but the ordering process went smoothly and the wait wasn't long to get our to go order. Let me tell ya I was glad we ordered, my food was yummy.  I had fried chicken white meat with black-eye peas and greens all delicious. Chicken breast was juicy and crispy! Greens were the best I've ordered in this area and best I've had outside of home cooked. I tasted my nephew's mac & cheese, I would say that was the only item I felt was laking, by no means was it nasty it just was nothing special or meh

I got to know about this restaurant from one of my client. So I was here with my friends and I must say the experience was so nice. We found so many options, nice customer service, good quality food and clean eating area. Thanks.

Ordered pickup here for the first time today! There was a bit of a wait, which was understandable as they were quite busy, so be prepared! But the food did not disappoint, everything was delicious! We ordered the chicken sandwich and a two piece fried chicken, with red beans & rice, Mac & cheese, and a piece of cornbread! Everything was amazing, can't wait to come back and try other items!

I've been to this place twice before and have good experiences. This time was horrendous. We were told it was going to be an hour wait (by Eryn the host) we were put on the list at 1:20 we got seated at 2:55. My dad is elderly we asked for a cup of water since we were waiting in 91 degree weather for OVER an hour. He asked once she said ok never brought it. Eventually we got seated I brought it up again and she said ok I'll get it. STILL never brought it. Luckily our server came and brought us water. Server forgot our ice tea though. Food took 20 minutes to come out. But server was doing his best since it was busy. I'm giving them two starts because we waited for almost 2 hours but also because I've had previous good experiences in the past. I suggest you guys have someone who isn't busy at the moment occasionally hand out ice water to folks waiting in front of the restaurant. I also suggest fans in the patio area. That'll help cool people down and help with the fly problem. Food tasted good as usual.

They were aiggghhhhtt.. I know Oxtails ain't cheap and they were ok.. the meat was tender and succulent however they sauce or gravy was a no go. It was sweet and I think some scotch bonnet, like a nice heat but the sweet was jacking it up. The greens? Man.. smh nvm.. imma keep this positive for once, everything was good . We had the catfish, some wings, black eyed peas, yams, potato  salad. I try to always support my peeps businesses and everything was good.. sans the gravy and I hate when they fry the chicken in the same grease as the fish..  yuck.. I wouldn't of just ordered all fish because that was definitely a man down sitcho.. fa sho..that's a against street code. Like come now bruh.. get that right then hey y'all will be alright. It was a decent meal. Next time I'll ask if I can have the oxtails without out the sauce , then it would be smakin.. on my momma.. oh we had the Mac and cheese, decent.. potatoe salad was so so.. heavy on the sweet relish...but to each their own. It was kool .mill be back for sho
this was my 4th time and i had Antoine as a waiter! he was the best!! we had a big party and he was patient and handled all of us with care. he was funny and very professional
We have been a few times and even during Covid, the food has not lost any quality! Great sides, AMAZING fried chicken. The Hot Chicken Sandwich is my favorite!

I have never eaten here before today and it was amazing! I had the fried chicken and it was some of the best I've eaten. Not only was the food good but the atmosphere was great and the service was even better. Our waitress, Des, was one of the best waitresses I've had at any restaurant. I would highly recommend this place to anyone looking for some delicious comfort food.

Food was bland and anything but soulful. I order chicken which was dry, mac n cheese which was dry and did not taste freshly cooked. Highly disappointed in the food.. will not patronize this business ever again.

The macaroni and cheese and yams are delicious !! So was the fried fish good seasoning on fish and chicken but the gravy for smothered chicken or something tasted a little burnt. Overall still good and I'll order again

Great customer service by Nicki G! The wait was looooonnnnngggggg, but worth it!! Use Yelp's waitlist and you can't go wrong. Good job Kevin Johnson! Those candied yams and that tofu succotash tho!  Can't wait for the expanded vegan menu!
My husbands first time in Sacramento and we came across this gem. Absolutely delicious food and great customer service.

Good southern comfort food. It's fresh it's tasty and the prices are reasonable.  You can't go wrong with their fried chicken and mac & cheese. It is as authentic as it gets. The place is clean and the service here are nice which is a plus. Even though it's a bit out of my way to get to this place, I'd still make the drive. That good.

I've been to this restaurant twice and had dissapointing encounters both times. I work in Oak Park, and I like the neighborhood and try to support local business. It is an area with a lot of cool shops and restaurants opening up. I hope that continues.

I went to Fixins on First Friday two weeks ago. I really like the look of the place, the hangings on the wall, and the staff t-shirts. It has a good arrangement of booths, tables high and low, and the outdoor area and bar set up is great.

I went again yesterday and had a similar experience. The physical ambience is good and the staff is nice, but the place is loud, too loud for me. 

The main problem during both visits has been the food, or lack there of. The first time I went I was with a total group of four people. We waited 35 minutes after we ordered for our food and part of our order was missing. The waitress was very gracious and kind, stopping every few minutes to check up, refill water, and appoligized multiple times for the delay in food. When part of our order was missing, she brought it out 10 minutes later and did not charge us for that part.

Last night I went around 8:30 pm with one other person. We were seated promptly and ordered food by 8:35 pm. And then we waited and waited and waited as we saw the place clear out due to the closing time at 9 pm. Our waiter that took our food order never came back. We saw multiple staff pass our booth, but from previous experience I knew it took a while to get food so we waited and waited and waited. Eventually, after 35 minutes of waiting I flagged a staff and asked him if our food was almost ready. He said he would check on it. A few minutes later our initial waiter came out with the check and asked us how our food was and if we wanted any dessert. WE NEVER RECEIVED OUR FOOD after 40 minutes of waiting yet the original waiter came out with the check??? Multiple staff passed our table throughout the night but no one ever checked up to see if we needed anything. We were trying to be patient, but to bring the check and ask us how the food was 35 minutes later and we never received our food?? That's just poor service. 45 minutes after we arrived, 40 minutes after we ordered, and still no food but a check for the food that we never got. We ended up just leaving at that point.

I like the physical lay out of this place, but the service/food is just not worth it. There are too many great restaurants in Sacramento to settle for poor service.
Friendly hostess. Friendly staff and servers. Terrific patio, plenty of space. Outstanding classic soul food. Great presentation. Quick to the table. Fair prices. It's got it all!

I am very dissatisfied with the customer service that is giving in this establishment.. when requesting to speak to a manager I Received the runaround over the phone I asked multiple times  and still did not get a chance to speak with a manager.  Then i was hung up on. This is not ok i can definitely take my money and  and my company elsewhere.
